body:

# **[NEW PODCAST EPISODE OUT NOW](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=9acc82749f&e=5bd167f239)**
---
| [ ](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=1234bc3870&e=5bd167f239 "A Wake-Up Call For Democrats | The Latino Vote Episode 63 #election2024 #latinovote")
---
A Wake-Up Call For Democrats | The Latino Vote Episode 63
| In this post-election debrief, Chuck and Mike pull back the curtain on **what went wrong for Democrats and how they've lost touch with blue-collar America**. With a sharp focus on affordability, economic frustration, and the future of the Democratic Party, Chuck shares a personal story of his political journey and how the party must return to its roots: **fighting for working-class families.** Mike emphasizes the urgency of addressing these issues before the 2028 election, warning that **if Democrats don't act now, they could see even larger shifts to the right. **
---
|
---
| | | |
**Today's Headlines:**

[Trump win leaves Democrats talking about how to start over](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=7849df0090&e=5bd167f239) By: The Hill

[Republicans hold onto the House, after clinching Senate and presidency](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=c3a281f785&e=5bd167f239) By: ABC News

[Decisive election waits for California’s results. What’s the hold-up?](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=855ea1320f&e=5bd167f239) By: The Los Angeles Times

[2024 turnout is near the 2020 record. See how each state compares.](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=7e382fb6a2&e=5bd167f239) By: The Washington Post

[Majority of Latinos voted for Harris, new poll says](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=14d6e840ff&e=5bd167f239) By: Spectrum News 1

[Hispanic groups challenge data on Trump's Latino inroads](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=8ad50f3378&e=5bd167f239) By: Axios

[Democrats are losing Latino men. Ruben Gallego has advice on winning them back.](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=7670b2f317&e=5bd167f239) By: CBS News

[Exit polls from the 2024 presidential election](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=7fa386587a&e=5bd167f239) By: The Washington Post

[Democrat Ruben Gallego wins Arizona US Senate race against Republican Kari Lake](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=cc9ffa1c0f&e=5bd167f239) By: The Associated Press

[Trump’s Gains Among Latinos Push a Civil Rights Group to Reflect on Its Past](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=d79bff8748&e=5bd167f239) By: New York Times

[Why Democrats Lost Latinos](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=706ffedade&e=5bd167f239) By: POLITICO

[Inside the 97pc Latino county where ‘nobody is scared to be a Republican anymore’](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=305c37cf67&e=5bd167f239) By: The Telegraph

[Trump's Pennsylvania win fueled by economic concerns among Latino, working-class voters](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=a4c66f2c67&e=5bd167f239) By: CBS News

[Is the Latino vote the GOP’s new powerhouse? A wake-up call for Democrats](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=2d5f1b3d49&e=5bd167f239) By: The Hill

[How counties are shifting in the 2024 presidential election](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=e7178816aa&e=5bd167f239) By: The Washington Post

[Young Black and Latino men say they chose Trump because of the economy and jobs. Here’s how and why](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=96cae80358&e=5bd167f239) By: The Associated Press

[It's simple, really' - why Latinos flocked to Trump's working-class coalition](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=988d4fbd97&e=5bd167f239) By: BBC

[Trump's return to power fueled by Hispanic, working-class voter support](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=0eea852cac&e=5bd167f239) By: Reuters

[5 key takeaways from election night 2024](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=63a8a04b19&e=5bd167f239) By: NBC News

¡Bienvenidos Todos!
The Latino Vote Podcast brings together the most sophisticated Latino voices in the country to provide you with insightful, accurate, unbiased, and timely information relating to the voting patterns and inclinations of the Nation’s Hispanics.
[**CLICK HERE FOR THE LATEST EPISODE**](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=7c6131fe76&e=5bd167f239)

# [**ORDER
THE LATINO CENTURY**](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=27e758f751&e=5bd167f239)
[](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=ae0b5cbc8e&e=5bd167f239)

An insightful investigation of how and why the two major political parties have failed to appeal to the Latino vote—the second largest ethnic voting group in the country—and the impact it will have on American democracy and politics for decades to come.
[**ORDER IT ON AMAZON**](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=a29efe76aa&e=5bd167f239)

body:
Trifecta.| | | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ad3493a4adc14601852186a8fa3bf3cc&_e=UEkzux-Xd2cYNH26QcPnADWvw_M6gpjBL0EmU6Oeuy-QHNdgcWsOeRbRZsDeYzUbODqY11l1q0Wm5exmXSnO7TcjwrvlXmMtAfktPoiUbhhcVSEHM8VpvFuK-BWkmQwkOgz_A7tzspoJGPgjoiJZn-69wdTl0fEU-2BtJdVgkrX5TRkqOYFvPaWTQKVH_9pFqrC8R3pnaEU3QwzP7cNqN58cljaHmTstcXm4cmmIyeG9zY7mL81cpzFNA3YnbKRMF5ThtTXSsdOL1isQdVZbUUv5gASB7tG3KL80KGMBlcnOam_WEnS5g7MhUQ8ve3xLtmSpZM8TpBs0DJH8DocbyzWh3j8XC7cO1RgApsAwXGxKkcqAkMKOcz-I2FX4fK_gwPSuQEepClFeC_yoQC7x1Fz4dxIesucDUb2NJ13krNaFG0CKTmXoivP3IVliO7ZiqqQE7-9Sy7AEuLZN63DiRlDHWYCJk8GItnDOAVMd0Z0%3D)

Fellow Republican, We’ve done it. We’ve put one of the greatest Presidents in American history back in charge. We re-took the Senate, and NOW we have OFFICIALLY retained the House majority! **_[But this isn’t the end of the fight, it’s just the beginning. Our House majority will be RAZOR THIN once again.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ad3493a4adc14601852186a8fa3bf3cc&_e=UEkzux-Xd2cYNH26QcPnADWvw_M6gpjBL0EmU6Oeuy-QHNdgcWsOeRbRZsDeYzUbODqY11l1q0Wm5exmXSnO7TcjwrvlXmMtAfktPoiUbhhcVSEHM8VpvFuK-BWkmQwkOgz_A7tzspoJGPgjoiJZn-69wdTl0fEU-2BtJdVgkrX5TRkqOYFvPaWTQKVH_9pFqrC8R3pnaEU3QwzP7cNqN58cljaHmTstcXm4cmmIyeG9zY7mL81cpzFNA3YnbKRMF5ThtTXSsdOL1isQdVZbUUv5gASB7tG3KL80KGMBlcnOam_WEnS5g7MhUQ8ve3xL4qL4jQuy9umTjyPiUyQo_2-2zkK61N0H0g0kOb_TeDU9NPy6Kf56xM5JOwbqfpp94Et-V7JIRTd0295Tqeuc5amRHga3IXHmKI481-4WCd1boU3MBCiIurK7s6ZIppqE7HL0FIqsgWTRpGIJMGEZoBkkogGKtbPF2HfJegetuOw%3D) _** That means if anything unexpected happens and a Special Election is called – we MUST be prepared! Needless to say, we cannot take any risks with our Republican House majority. So I am announcing TODAY that we are gathering the resources to DOMINATE the Democrats in any Special Elections that may come up and to start building our war chest to take down the Democrats once again in 2026. **_[**_Will you send in a donation of ANY amount today to ensure that we have the resources on hand to defeat the Democrats in any unexpected Special Elections that come up over the next year?_**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ad3493a4adc14601852186a8fa3bf3cc&_e=UEkzux-Xd2cYNH26QcPnADWvw_M6gpjBL0EmU6Oeuy-QHNdgcWsOeRbRZsDeYzUbODqY11l1q0Wm5exmXSnO7TcjwrvlXmMtAfktPoiUbhhcVSEHM8VpvFuK-BWkmQwkOgz_A7tzspoJGPgjoiJZn-69wdTl0fEU-2BtJdVgkrX5TRkqOYFvPaWTQKVH_9pFqrC8R3pnaEU3QwzP7cNqN58cljaHmTstcXm4cmmIyeG9zY7mL81cpzFNA3YnbKRMF5ThtTXSsdOL1isQdVZbUUv5gASB7tG3KL80KGMBlcnOam_WEnS5g7MhUQ8ve3xL2nTvMwc3pNM0-FPP8w7L-zJP19GWHuhVyVNyEdj866p5WS2v5R_a1EsYHg_xI2END9GSMgqi8i1wHb_ovMJEcxEveJBjJhzlK5M8C23zuRpnPlxO-FqJHZ7adib0ii7aY9HyxatEa-8Ohkd8WgVvKflhRaGHmsPeLQ4PbVNh-pE%3D)_**
---
[**CHIP IN NOW!**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ad3493a4adc14601852186a8fa3bf3cc&_e=UEkzux-Xd2cYNH26QcPnADWvw_M6gpjBL0EmU6Oeuy-QHNdgcWsOeRbRZsDeYzUbODqY11l1q0Wm5exmXSnO7TcjwrvlXmMtAfktPoiUbhhcVSEHM8VpvFuK-BWkmQwkOgz_A7tzspoJGPgjoiJZn-69wdTl0fEU-2BtJdVgkrX5TRkqOYFvPaWTQKVH_9pFqrC8R3pnaEU3QwzP7cNqN58cljaHmTstcXm4cmmIyeG9zY7mL81cpzFNA3YnbKRMF5ThtTXSsdOL1isQdVZbUUv5gASB7tG3KL80KGMBlcnOam_WEnS5g7MhUQ8ve3xLWMad0Y6Bp_jw3lr0M9pVC9WGkjoA9H1ui7YB8COfyChdnWGw_80uxw88rfSCJFrAJtNqJY4TPwxNi4dyqI20og97LkL9ymX_jH-WdPq-2X8wL8yNCHMxMDVmDgNis20IRZwrzgm6-gqEc6yDWyYSlrepG5qUB4lj1REzaSCw1bo%3D)
---
**_[Truthfully, Fellow Republican, you can say GOODBYE to all the things we have set out to do together if we’re not prepared to battle the Democrat’s fundraising machine. We know that the radical left will dig in their heels and pull every stunt in the book to stop us from making the changes we need.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ad3493a4adc14601852186a8fa3bf3cc&_e=UEkzux-Xd2cYNH26QcPnADWvw_M6gpjBL0EmU6Oeuy-QHNdgcWsOeRbRZsDeYzUbODqY11l1q0Wm5exmXSnO7TcjwrvlXmMtAfktPoiUbhhcVSEHM8VpvFuK-BWkmQwkOgz_A7tzspoJGPgjoiJZn-69wdTl0fEU-2BtJdVgkrX5TRkqOYFvPaWTQKVH_9pFqrC8R3pnaEU3QwzP7cNqN58cljaHmTstcXm4cmmIyeG9zY7mL81cpzFNA3YnbKRMF5ThtTXSsdOL1isQdVZbUUv5gASB7tG3KL80KGMBlcnOam_WEnS5g7MhUQ8ve3xLEuEfn0J1d6Eq_h0a-bypFfM4tY3LjW5SEiyZu0A1ukQdTKgJ5h3x2t-Lq-c3qRF2qWbW_08_2dsh-a8YnUezvPC5Hqad0vcrh6LDecfRKgJC-ImAjGAYILRfnk_hURm5ONfwU6WG3xSb6y7Q1SsaMuK_D55ihT36Jd9RNRyPxKA%3D)_** **_Do you want to secure the border and KEEP IT SECURE? We need the House majority._** **_Do you want to DRAIN THE SWAMP and demolish the deep state? We need the House majority._** **_Do you want to pass tax cuts, cut waste from the budget, make America energy DOMINANT, and restore peace through strength? We need the House majority to do that. _** It goes without saying... I am extremely grateful for you and everything that you’ve done for my team and our wonderful country. And if you can’t afford to give today, I understand. We are still mounting our great economic comeback. Do you want to secure the border and KEEP IT SECURE? We need the House majority. Do you want to DRAIN THE SWAMP and demolish the deep state? We need the House majority. name: Zoe Lofgren
subject: We must persist
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Friends: I know we’ve been writing a lot, but that’s because the fight for the House is still not over. And there are more than 2.6m valid ballots left to count here in California alone. Right now, we are on track to possibly flip three more Republican seats here — enough for a real chance at winning the majority and having a check on Trump’s power and his Republican enablers in the Senate. We must persist. We can’t afford not to right now. Can you help? LINK: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tbthzoe24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tbthzoe24]

Zoe

body:

Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | The fight is not over yet, Peter. name: Team Bell
subject: The GOP just won control of the House, officially.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Together, we’ll be ready to stand up for St. Louis and all Americans, no matter what. Peter –

Even though Wesley won in St. Louis, it’s now official: **Republicans will hold control of the House in 2025.**

We may have a tough road ahead, but Wesley is more determined than ever to get to work and make sure the voices of everyday St. Louisans are heard in Washington.

With Republicans soon to be setting the agenda in the Senate, the House of Representatives, and the White House, _we know that there will be real challenges and uncertainty as we look ahead to the future._

But make no mistake, Peter: Wesley and our team are ready to stand up for our community and fight for progress, even when the road gets steep, even when it seems impossible. We’re not backing down, but we’ll need your support to keep building the momentum that got us this far.

[**Please consider chipping in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help us stay strong as we fight for St. Louisans and stand up for our values at every turn →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97052423/512128312/1027040668?refcode=em24_241113_houser_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_241113_houser_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=b81c0f93-1fa2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjgxYzBmOTMtMWZhMi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nzLqanUGITuzLIU0YzeW5AzDuwUCJUMFw7kWPKYeYGk=)

Thank you for being with us in this fight. Let’s keep going.

Onward,

clean_body: Together, we’ll be ready to stand up for St. Louis and all Americans, no matter what. Peter – Even though Wesley won in St. Louis, it’s now official: Republicans will hold control of the House in 2025. We may have a tough road ahead, but Wesley is more determined than ever to get to work and make sure the voices of everyday St. Louisans are heard in Washington. With Republicans soon to be setting the agenda in the Senate, the House of Representatives, and the White House, we know that there will be real challenges and uncertainty as we look ahead to the future. But make no mistake, Peter: Wesley and our team are ready to stand up for our community and fight for progress, even when the road gets steep, even when it seems impossible. We’re not backing down, but we’ll need your support to keep building the momentum that got us this far. = Thank you for being with us in this fight. Let’s keep going. Onward, Team Bell | = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI PO Box 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

body:

| Peter,

It’s all going to come down to California.

**There is still a path for Democrats to flip the House Majority from red-to-blue – and it will come down to uncalled, toss up races in California.**

But our work isn't over.

**[--> In PA, Dave McCormick is hanging on but facing a possible recount.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=37abe267d559446f8a2fc25ee54bb0d9&_e=8wOaDshtvnIvZfvGvCu5ySUmyqZ_WAN5ebvNCZBwHsRdKxZDZdtT9LZ0geFxxKze1NPO58iQJ-kRftm3pfap2VY6VBhDDAbLXCFn6HnFKjQqx8O3G5yeTYgFQwZ16fCf9cBnIPNJVFI8Zdv35yRZzrALUFHzidf41g7o9vz80RRiCJ_tc6w4l23TjQz0DMtsJy1wvxAHO-Povpl8UBItMnPYUPCtKrL8UBB4oo51qXVzxTTTRgHOVUHHBebZCEgulhriewhJk-QmgBjImJFSKz56wDsxJjTdlU48hviNLPiVrI1d4GuVhQmuHbctec-7s29VFxEOBhH6lSNKt8s2NXb-WFrrNTSmCreyCBKEF-IpI-SjdFQoA4vOqfz5djkIYsfcRACu3CPX-U8PdBOpCHZmEsjr6FjW7ToXiv0NhPY_hVHwtn6Wu5Yj9b39WCro0jdl8K4kq4fFMv5F_DSDog%3D%3D)**

subject: Bob Casey

body:
Peter, I’m going to be real with you: Bob Casey needs our help right now.
His race with Connecticut Dave is still too close to call 😬 and we need your help to make sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard.
Bob’s team is working hard while votes are still being counted, but they need the resources to make that happen.
Pennsylvania is now the frontline for standing up to Senate Republicans 🛑 and I need Bob in the Senate with me to keep up the fight. 💪

clean_body: As a special thank you, can I ship you a signed victory photo? | | | | | | SIGNED VICTORY PHOTO FROM TRUMP | Friend, I couldn’t have won this election without your help! | To show you just how special you are to me and the MAGA movement, I want to send you a Signed Victory Photo! Do I have the right address for you? It even comes with a nice frame folder – FREE OF CHARGE! From the very beginning of OUR journey together, I felt your love for me! I want you to know something very important: I LOVE YOU TOO. As just a small way to show my great appreciation, I would love for you to have this signed victory photo! The greatest comeback in history wouldn’t be possible without you. Thank you, Donald J. name: Josh Harder
subject: Some good news to share
body:
We won!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97052560/512135499/-171021866?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTBjOTAzYTktMjFhMi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OtnV3Xe2tyNFYgZXyYiAXzIFJidJJGUGPY9vWd9Bdf8=) | Hi Peter, It’s been 1 week since the Election - and it feels like a month. With all the craziness in the world right now (more on that later), I wanted to share some positive news: **we have won re-election and held CA-9 blue!** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97052561/512135500/-1280984495?&refcode=E11561-20241113-VictoryEmail-Image-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTBjOTAzYTktMjFhMi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OtnV3Xe2tyNFYgZXyYiAXzIFJidJJGUGPY9vWd9Bdf8=)** We knew ballot counting would be slow, and with this week’s new batch of results, we now feel confident we will win. I’m incredibly honored and so, so grateful to this team for all your help and support. I’ll also be honest, this past week has been a whirlwind. Our race was extremely close and it’s going to be one of the last races called in the country. We knew this seat was going to be important, but given what’s happened on the national level, we had no idea. So what comes next? To be frank, I have a lot of reflecting to do. We as a Democratic Party also have a lot of reflecting to do. And we need to prepare for what’s to come. Here’s my promise to you: I will do my best to make progress where we can and resist any attempts to take our country backwards. We simply have no other choice. Thank you for everything you have done to help our campaign - we have a long road ahead but I’m not giving up. In gratitude,
Josh
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene. clean_body: Democrats are going to use every resource they have to try and take these seats, but House Republicans are fighting back with an army of political operatives headed to ensure every legal vote is counted. We can’t let the CA Democrat machine steal this from us. | | | | Peter, key battleground races in the House of Representatives are still uncalled in California. Democrats are going to use every resource they have to try and take these seats, but House Republicans are fighting back with an army of political operatives headed to ensure every legal vote is counted. "We need your support to make sure we can keep these operatives on the ground until the fight is over." | | | | | | | | Thank you for everything you've done. We're so close to the finish line. | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Peter, Donald Trump just nominated Matt Gaetz to be his Attorney General. This is the same man who remains the subject of an ongoing House Ethics Committee investigation -- even his Republicans allies are shocked by this choice and that speaks volumes. But this follows a disturbing pattern in recent days of Trump appointing unqualified people to cabinet positions, like a Fox News personality to be the Secretary of the Department of Defense. Donald Trump is making good on his promise to install loyalists who will do his bidding and that starts with nominating Matt Gatez to be Attorney General. They will weaponize the DOJ to protect themselves and their allies and we must stop them from executing Trump’s plans for revenge and retribution. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting **info@kamalaharris.com**.The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
clean_body: | | | Peter, Donald Trump just nominated Matt Gaetz to be his Attorney General. This is the same man who remains the subject of an ongoing House Ethics Committee investigation -- even his Republicans allies are shocked by this choice and that speaks volumes. But this follows a disturbing pattern in recent days of Trump appointing unqualified people to cabinet positions, like a Fox News personality to be the Secretary of the Department of Defense. Donald Trump is making good on his promise to install loyalists who will do his bidding and that starts with nominating Matt Gatez to be Attorney General. They will weaponize the DOJ to protect themselves and their allies and we must stop them from executing Trump’s plans for revenge and retribution. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you, and of course we'll be in touch. Team Harris-Walz | | | |

The Far-Left spent YEARS stacking our government with radicals ... because they know that’s who holds the REAL power in Washington. President Trump has a mandatefrom the American people to DRAIN THE SWAMP. But he can’t fire everyone UNLESS he has an army of conservatives ready to take their place. With your help, WE WILL MAKE THAT HAPPEN. | | Thank you for your help. \- Our Team at Policy Personnel Operations | | | | PAID FOR BY PERSONNEL POLICY OPERATIONS. | Team – It’s Derek Tran.

I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue.

I wanted to reach out and give you and update you on our race.

We knew this race would be close, and it’s still currently too close to call. This is a true testament to all the work this team has done to close the margin on this race.

The path to the Democratic House Majority is still in reach – and it runs through this district.

And, team, with Trump in the White House, the House Majority would be our last line of defense.

**[The way things stand, we need to make sure every vote is counted in order to win, so I have to ask for your support. Will you split a contribution between our legal fund and New Dems to help us count every vote? name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison
body:
My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.
Dear Peter,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=11a51b18b56d4cee849d36ddaf4d2dea&_e=d9zCpLZFJmHr9nxKO5IYJiilg1YcX_rPGtC9hAAslUqg2zgBb8ug-YKFBS9lV757x17JYb1OKy9RHt3cNGwFx1mXwQZikLSuqO7vCfHdDCwVbDDtx0Xljd4zvdTPxSdAiZHXIAAGTpMLArlBvC_ZENLp1Twt_HGYG1XjUfvgtBrKz7ivEDKJd2_4RwIp_K8LEAaHYhE71QeNlH5HmtGfpUJohOMdcKRDA9T3hWPFf6Z-BjED2XaGmual0oDjmw_pUwUleA9VUfyqrkIxXEaK_ip9s91r_kVzUXWA1ZMcU4dNo3y0O5TJHPWCXBPr0XtdmmzREHE0NS5Dxm0ypjGjMq3JMdWOmtrHQbTmLBKQSvWi58_yok_1MJ_nXZ2zYo6hsrp_gOA5pyR7I106I-AHOA%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=11a51b18b56d4cee849d36ddaf4d2dea&_e=d9zCpLZFJmHr9nxKO5IYJiilg1YcX_rPGtC9hAAslUqg2zgBb8ug-YKFBS9lV757x17JYb1OKy9RHt3cNGwFx1mXwQZikLSuqO7vCfHdDCwVbDDtx0Xljd4zvdTPxSdAiZHXIAAGTpMLArlBvC_ZENLp1Twt_HGYG1XjUfvgtBrKz7ivEDKJd2_4RwIp_K8LEAaHYhE71QeNlH5HmtGfpUJohOMdcKRDA9T3hWPFf6aBH7iRTIjplcrnPhCu8LZURJ9ac0nliidW_ZtCDJSVs7RTEZOAzO2Quf2gwbptCLI3Ww6FsQUhkpgVB5kH1B6eW4NTvZ1s846dGN9dP4yCJEQPaSYiDMi-y41UNP-ZyHJ4PHwtdkLxKdeGd5QbRDNoBWVYRY4Uq5GO6MY0gTH9LQ%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=11a51b18b56d4cee849d36ddaf4d2dea&_e=d9zCpLZFJmHr9nxKO5IYJiilg1YcX_rPGtC9hAAslUqg2zgBb8ug-YKFBS9lV757x17JYb1OKy9RHt3cNGwFx1mXwQZikLSuqO7vCfHdDCwVbDDtx0Xljd4zvdTPxSdAiZHXIAAGTpMLArlBvC_ZENLp1Twt_HGYG1XjUfvgtBrKz7ivEDKJd2_4RwIp_K8LEAaHYhE71QeNlH5HmtGfpUJohOMdcKRDA9T3hWPFf6ZIzTiqeEcQK2QwVNRhvDE46Iu97cxIAVQ1yJzB8GjSM3RX3MVuAKdsOQ4G8Pnfu_jSKdVACUwQ3ojBiQKro74OeDDr8zBUS7he63WNJKbzSCYblpKTCmqq4-xyQCzt90HIv3ZlYUNMzcy5jFLOCBJsoWxivgY9fkx-buE0kJKTLw%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=11a51b18b56d4cee849d36ddaf4d2dea&_e=d9zCpLZFJmHr9nxKO5IYJiilg1YcX_rPGtC9hAAslUqg2zgBb8ug-YKFBS9lV757x17JYb1OKy9RHt3cNGwFx1mXwQZikLSuqO7vCfHdDCwVbDDtx0Xljd4zvdTPxSdAiZHXIAAGTpMLArlBvC_ZENLp1Twt_HGYG1XjUfvgtBrKz7ivEDKJd2_4RwIp_K8LEAaHYhE71QeNlH5HmtGfpUJohOMdcKRDA9T3hWPFf6ad-udKw7uWsGVkIX1Kclke5dhxc8_EByfexAt1bcEQlja6VY3woseHPEgX1z--S4YxiZXvYH7QlTEKw1KCxMYq9gQFDQO6En-BN8rHJCPmD8xA1Cm-AhOUB-RKSoYocNOTZ60BDLvmc1dG91KfxNHrBJdf5fWsvz50Rmo2kkq50A%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=11a51b18b56d4cee849d36ddaf4d2dea&_e=d9zCpLZFJmHr9nxKO5IYJiilg1YcX_rPGtC9hAAslUqg2zgBb8ug-YKFBS9lV757x17JYb1OKy9RHt3cNGwFx1mXwQZikLSuqO7vCfHdDCwVbDDtx0Xljd4zvdTPxSdAiZHXIAAGTpMLArlBvC_ZENLp1Twt_HGYG1XjUfvgtBrKz7ivEDKJd2_4RwIp_K8LEAaHYhE71QeNlH5HmtGfpUJohOMdcKRDA9T3hWPFf6aOvTLOh7WbDdpK0PJojwZ2MY2DqdCJwAgDB1WGeXWY7V0AIfMHwiNVSjTLzSxZ_ccOgGAaIqtHtqThhJLV4MCZvHF86xUCtTJyhtRcvvOR-PHTcm_4nROynVDSBdz9nwdaSVCP3UUBmXreWuoA47h8UCGutEeMBXxReRpU2wg44w%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=11a51b18b56d4cee849d36ddaf4d2dea&_e=d9zCpLZFJmHr9nxKO5IYJiilg1YcX_rPGtC9hAAslUqg2zgBb8ug-YKFBS9lV757x17JYb1OKy9RHt3cNGwFx1mXwQZikLSuqO7vCfHdDCwVbDDtx0Xljd4zvdTPxSdAiZHXIAAGTpMLArlBvC_ZENLp1Twt_HGYG1XjUfvgtBrKz7ivEDKJd2_4RwIp_K8LEAaHYhE71QeNlH5HmtGfpUJohOMdcKRDA9T3hWPFf6Zx2buuNeioS5-__2ALfcTjSQG4wO4Q-ZHosV1KRDQJnQi5kqAlN3hcWilyjXPsXuUEwlk8O2N4tFWuyVeyh1KJR5WAtXNVotr4C5P12vK_r0RKoWQETbGVtPPoABBsdG0-eNj8BsXUDmFa4t_SiTd76eQqAyLrlGqryGI-3wnvgA%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. clean_body: My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. Dear Peter, My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him. Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy. He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy. I was so proud that night. Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch. – but first, let me explain what happened. Our nightmare started in October of 2020. Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory. Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge. When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter. Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs. My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car. Then it happened. Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car. After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn... Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy. They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist. There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires. Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death. The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder. Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison. Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear. My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year! But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal. If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments. We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone: I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help. But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me. Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help. And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today. And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers. Gratefully, Patti Reilly P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! Trump Picks Matt Gaetz for Attorney General Months After Members of IL GOP Delegation Turn Their Backs on him During RNC Convention Speech (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/11/trump-picks-matt-gaetz-for-attorney-general-months-after-members-of-il-gop-delegation-turn-their-backs-on-him-during-rnc-convention-speech.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4f7cd7eab4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)

Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-FL) (L) shakes hands with President Donald Trump during a rally at the Banks County Dragway on March 26, 2022 in Commerce, Georgia. (Megan Varner/Getty Images)
By Illinois Review

On Wednesday, President-elect Donald Trump announced that he was nominating Florida Congressman Matt Gaetz to be his attorney general – calling him “a deeply gifted and tenacious attorney” who would “end weaponized government, protect our borders, dismantle criminal organizations and restore Americans’ badly-shattered faith and confidence in the Justice Department.”

The pick caught many by surprise, but the President-elect is focused on cleaning up the DOJ, writing that Gaetz – who has been a staunch defender of the president, “will root out the systemic corruption at DOJ, and return the Department to its true mission of fighting crime, and upholding our Democracy and Constitution.”

http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4f7cd7eab4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4f7cd7eab4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4f7cd7eab4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 IllinoisReview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4f7cd7eab4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
During the Republican National Convention in Milwaukee this past July, several members of the Illinois delegation turned their backs on Gaetz while he delivered a primetime address – a humiliating moment that was caught on national television and highlighted the dysfunction within the IL GOP rank and file. And no other delegations besides Illinois protested during any of the speeches that week – a week that was meant to show unity and strength.

name: Letter to Trump
subject: Thank you, President Trump. From: Fellow American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
You’ve been with the MAGA movement for so long, and as one of the most dedicated patriots in the movement, it would mean a lot if your name was on this thank you letter.
Will you sign our thank you note to President Trump?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.

But he never stopped fighting for us.

And now, President Donald J. Trump will once again be President of the United States.

We are so grateful for all he has done for us, so House Republicans are sending him a letter to show our thanks.

**[Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4aad2c2318fe49dcbb651b047ac6bd1c&_e=Eap4zjxDrsmvOWHL6EUaoUAgVYlVZ2xoP1jf22SLaWTtG_ugW07HY-RDZidTYZNKPdwT0r_fzTI03regLj91dUuMEzW7CRc2snH9NFY0lTdmkD46A_2stb7zBpSGQnLnkoPQxnMyXa2DMxod2kwx3i29hDsDVDA0wgw323Nohtypj_3RG6SCwIayPPJwhNe4qou4kHK4nKQfMZpiS_TErKfGG92OTQSNmbHCMMGmA4PKcGAftyFkCjOeSa3NNUlCkHGapFV_R0LYBkui3NAZRpau7M4JAroblGzP9qyxWrF_YfstkBrnr3G3_OmamcM6u7uP80VPx4OyjVNzRAie2cm50jQcJWvHHKqASZLeikoYN1dSFn1wH8zeUkHqopTanb3Ey3K38prqNl84MSqJkm5vepEG2-eg9rHPnt-tKgo%3D "Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?")**

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: The future of our public lands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97053705/512154397/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20241113_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjZiN2I4Mi0zMGEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAUIQjxwn19Xbsf1YDyEq-sXP4kglfa7e9iQ1wzjPXs=&emci=0a66bc4e-2ba2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=5f6b7b82-30a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=252045)
---
I will always be a champion for our public lands. But Donald Trump and Republicans want to sell off our country’s natural wonders — lands that belong to _you_. The state of Utah recently filed a lawsuit to take control of millions of acres of public lands and open them up to development — with the support of Republican federal lawmakers. But that is only the start. Now that Donald Trump will be president, he will continue his assault on our public lands. In 2017, Trump shrank the size of the Bears Ears and Grand Staircase Escalante national monuments in the largest rollback of federal land protections in U.S. history. While President Biden thankfully restored the boundaries of these monuments, Donald Trump will undoubtedly come after our lands again. Trump’s Project 2025 calls for oil, natural gas, and coal production on federal lands, undermining wildlife protections, and more. I will combat these attacks on our public lands every step of the way. I helped create the Rio Grande del Norte and Organ Mountains-Desert Peaks national monuments and establish the White Sands National Park alongside local communities in New Mexico. **We will not let Trump touch our public lands without a fight.** Together, we will hold the line and defend the values that make New Mexico and our country strong. — Martin | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97053706/512154398/-1809892047?refcode=AU_MTH_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20241113_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjZiN2I4Mi0zMGEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAUIQjxwn19Xbsf1YDyEq-sXP4kglfa7e9iQ1wzjPXs=)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Defend the next generation
body:
Well... Times have certainly changed.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zakg8c3b5v90rdnhvn0a6ht424ffdi7p7irs5tk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0rc8kq89hvplktti0o0cu290c6hkru9n53dgbmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)
---
| | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. **Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.** That's why we need your help to [**Take Back Our Libraries**.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zico818erhdbcqd8e4c3pjs2koajtoorhrs2hghg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created _As You Grow_ , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: **reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.** To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z21olmd1fj75qkf87ku12bi5dh4uaiil9i5pgmk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z85bhai7gr3sp5q7dhap2jmkq5ss94os2kq0mhi8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbb490vst4aqrvtgpjtu1vjloa8qf78e8jug56ag_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)
---

Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children. | | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like Woke Baby , A is for Activist , and The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies. | | | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values. That's why we need your help to My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created As You Grow , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values. To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. A gift of $175 sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America, | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Rand Paul
subject: Have they all forgotten how the economy works?
body:
The Foundation for Economic Education’s (FEE) high school students know more about basic economics and math than Joe Biden

|
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0hrtjhusi1f18ms2upkck6ch2f16k0j7qvrc4jo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs) Friend,

Biden, Pelosi, and AOC all seem to have forgotten anything they learned in an economics class... or even basic 8th-grade math classes.

Do you see the horrific ideas coming out of Washington D.C.?
* Raising the minimum wage to $20+
* Passing over $3 Trillion budgets
* Allowing inflation to destroy the value of the dollar
* They’ve even proposed minting a “$1 Trillion coin” to fund the budget...

These ideas are not only madness but economic suicide.**The Foundation for Economic Education’s (FEE) high school students know more about basic economics and math than Joe Biden (and they can stay awake during class)!**

FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility. Their flagship program,**“FEE In the Classroom”** is teaching students these important lessons and values in order to save our Republic from socialism.

**Make no mistake:** If AOC had attended a FEE In the Classroom seminar we would not be in this mess.

[Which is why I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqramka2pn2omnv0000ccr7lbmg3eb1trtv1hiqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)

_You and I will never win unless we reach young people with our message_.

The truth is we have an uphill battle ahead of us.

Big government, Critical Race Theory, radical activists, and cancel culture have all played a part to indoctrinate our country’s youth inside the classroom.

But I am optimistic and fully believe FEE can turn the tide against socialism in the classroom. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqpcf7bltg1bhel1oq8gm9d1l606d7v0ngsobb5g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)
When young people hear our message it resonates with them.
* Young people want to be free and independent
* Entrepreneurship and problem-solving are appealing to young high school and college students
* Privacy and individual liberty are important to younger generations
* Our country’s youth want fulfilling and well-paying jobs... Well, you’re not going to get that with socialism

**DO NOT give up on young people. **

We can win hearts and minds. And that’s exactly what FEE is doing with FEE In the Classroom.

FEE students are among the brightest men and women I meet. In fact, I’ve even had FEE staff testify in front of Congress and some former FEE students have worked in my office or on my campaigns.

[I am inviting you to support the Foundation for Economic Education by making a donation of $10, $20.24, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkkrlb8ip4qp7csopma66fo0f18g6rpced9302j0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)
[Donate $10 ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztp656gahgcf0h28catgq7rqj4e70q65ap902qt0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)
[Donate $20.24 ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zscjs1rjttsuh4tg0et46i1frmen1een61787j7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)
[Donate $50](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znhvdfjdajs1sidjjbb5b7jq8lqo7uav056sj1qo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)
[Donate $100](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfo735lg2oa0uc13ik056qn7qo6d66cqv92icdfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)
[Donate $250](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfnudeki8p6itucqpoaha7cdjparshvht7isbm6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)
[Donate $500](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpshhmrfmorjmhpvv9p27foe4nfaeeip8r1stdf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)
[Donate $1,000](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr5odave73gahef0hlqs7gvveq7gm4109d0kmgq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)
[Donate Any Amount ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr3k1a3j3h797jdi0bsn0durm55oi2bc8g09fqjg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)
**_I am asking you to make a long-term investment in the future of our Republic_.**

FEE’s students learn the ideas of liberty, free enterprise, the principles of our Founding Fathers, and have an impact on our culture and public policy process. But it takes time.

The organization was founded in 1946 and rose to prominence during the Cold War. FEE served as the greatest voice for the ideas of liberty in this time and influenced many leaders such as Ronald Reagan and Margaret Thatcher.

The ideas of liberty defeated communism and we can win again against the rising tide of socialism in the classroom. But I need your help.

[Please make a generous donation to FEE today and help me reach my goal of raising $10,000 for this important organization. You can click here to donate.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh3bqlkb3n6g1hsb27agqn0ds2ens0rplhcvrn4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)

Thank you,

Senator Rand Paul

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Some social media companies won’t let us tell you this
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsdq89pd0oq30nbi3i0vugpi60kh18h63eg9k48g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjgn9051qt4k6qd2nhfdpnfbbq6q8gvdrf5u2hao_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaoliammfmqpc59vdv3q3duunv15ulglha6rsbf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm2o71cph2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: Sorry to bother you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
But I wanted to make sure you saw the headline from the New York Post

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zj7if4gop3jmsukh8nforjhi5j3rvm65cd618ukg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm1ob6c1h2bs)

Friend,

Hey, it's Matt, Dave McCormick's Campaign Manager. Sorry to bother you, but I wanted to make sure you saw the headline from the New York Post.

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znvc5rqd5povltqkk7etlevulagidkb645khl478_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm1ob6c1h2bs)

The AP declared Dave McCormick the winner of Pennsylvania's senate seat, but now the Dems refuse to concede the race. **[Will you join our fight to support Dave against the Dems' dirty tricks?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9di12skmqtq55stbval6tjlr6322fs5dg38pjtg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm1ob6c1h2bs)**

******************************************************[DONATE](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3r63s4ika061oisn4s6krrcs5snbgd2ucon8m60_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm1ob6c1h2bs)******************************************************

As the New York Post reported, "A shady Democratic attorney...is now at the heart of a desperate legal effort to snatch Pennsylvania's Senate race away from its rightful winner -- Republican Dave McCormick...Marc Elias, a longtime Democratic election attorney and dirty trickster, is attempting to force the Pennsylvania Senate race into a recount, even though it was called for McCormick by the Associated Press on Thursday, with even the state's most liberal news outlets echoing the call since."

The fact is, Dave McCormick won! We need to make sure we have the resources to fight against whatever dirty tricks are played. **[Will you chip in $25 now?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg3uismal64gt7ph1vlgq2uhfkft31q6v1ru4488_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm1ob6c1h2bs)**

Dave was able to win because of your support. We truly appreciate everything that you did to push Dave over the finish line. **[Anything you are able to chip in to help us battle back is very appreciated.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5nvvhmltuscuifrpdjfh410vgve1n0beglecla0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cljm1ob6c1h2bs)**

Thank you!
Matt

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Take back the libraries
body:
Our mission is simple: reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd30devt07ggbtdkepppee912jbptcirtuud1fq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge0oj6c3h2bs)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr1rhch3kirafdh40omn9i840o5dran0jsl99mfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge0oj6c3h2bs)
---
| | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. **Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.** That's why we need your help to [**Take Back Our Libraries**.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z033ue2pbqi3tuijoeaf8eh2v8dtjleu3t7mahu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge0oj6c3h2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created _As You Grow_ , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: **reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.** To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhg2cv43ihpqejjkb3hr8c7ubsagutsq3q9c9lj0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge0oj6c3h2bs)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvpk5qdg63pgt8ccr80q0nrpn8lokrbpc4qct75g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge0oj6c3h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zao11jkap79djo00jgnvf2jbjpt78oi0oseqthsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge0oj6c3h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---

name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: The answer is to ORGANIZE / La respuesta es ORGANIZAR
body:
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
Reflecting, recharging, and ready for the fights ahead
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/BlackTOP%202024.jpg]
We don’t give up and don’t give in. Instead, we regroup, retool, stay true to our values, and come back stronger with full hearts and even more fire in our belly.
TOP was built on the belief that communities too often ignored by those in power deserve a voice and a seat at the table. Over the past 15 years, we’ve brought thousands of Texans into the movement, electing community champions and changing policies that impact everyday lives. And while we won’t have the full data from this election for a few weeks, early indicators show that the turnout we fueled in our communities remained strong. Though we’re devastated by this election outcome, we have no regrets about our efforts.
Our commitment to building real political power in Texas remains steadfast. Donald Trump’s latest win only strengthens our resolve to fight even harder for Black and Latino communities that fuel our state. We are a trusted messenger to our communities, understanding of what core issues matter to the well-being of Black and Latino Texans, and the conversations it takes to move people to vote, organize for change, and become more civically engaged.
Texas’ future will be built on conversations that matter — the ones we’re having in neighborhoods across our state’s urban centers. Now more than ever, as far-right efforts grow to spread misinformation and stoke fear, our work becomes essential. By engaging Black and Latino communities with a bold vision of shared safety and prosperity, we protect the progress we’ve made and win new ground.
Just as in his first term, we’ll be rolling up our sleeves to counter Trump’s increasing viciousness (as well as Greg Abbott’s) while getting back to building the progressive political infrastructure we need to move Texas forward.
We’ll see you in the streets.
Championing better housing for mobile home residents in Houston
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Houston%20TOP%20mobile%20home%20action.jpeg]
Residents from four mobile home communities in Harris County held a press conference with TOP today to shine a light on livability concerns at their complexes and urge Harris County officials to step up and act.
For months, residents at County Road Park, Windfern Oaks, Parkview Mobile Park, and Shady Village have worked with TOP to hold their landlords accountable and address issues impacting their living conditions. These tenants are now amplifying their calls for more to be done, so they can stay in their homes and avoid having to pay outrageous fines and fees.
Check out news coverage of our work here. [https://www.houstonchronicle.com/news/houston-texas/trending/article/moorpark-village-texas-organizing-project-19913438.php]
TOP believes housing is a human right, and each and every resident of our state — regardless of their age, race, gender, preferred language, or economic status — deserves a safe, affordable, and secure place to call home.
For more information on this organizing campaign, contact Damaris at dgonzalez@organizetexas.org [dgonzalez@organizetexas.org] .
NEXT MONTH:
Dallas County TOP housing justice campaign meet-up
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Dallas%20housing%20action%20-%20Meadows%20at%20Ferguson.jpg]
TOP's Dallas County Housing Justice campaign is ramping up and looking to have a greater impact as we prepare for 2025.
Join us at our next campaign meeting on December 11 from 5 - 7 p.m. at the Dallas TOP office (3910 Gaston Ave., Ste. 250) where we'll break bread and plan out our campaign organizing efforts for the coming months.
Come drop by and find out how you can plug in!
For more information, contact Iman at ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
TOP Tip: Explore shopping alternatives to Amazon this holiday season
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Amazon%20mailbox.jpg]
We all at some point have bought goods off Amazon. It's anywhere and everywhere! While the prices and fast shipping can sure be tempting, it's worth considering other websites for everyday products and gifts — especially if you're looking to support small businesses and be a more socially conscious shopper. Check out these alternatives. [https://blog.credo.com/2024/11/07/conscious-consuming-for-the-holidays-try-these-alternatives-to-amazon/]
Español
Reflexionando, recargando energías y preparándonos para las luchas que se avecinan
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/BlackTOP%202024.jpg]
No nos rendimos ni nos damos por vencidos. En cambio, nos reagrupamos, ajustamos nuestras herramientas, permanecemos fieles a nuestros valores y regresamos con más fuerza, con corazones llenos y aún más pasión en nuestro interior.
TOP se construyó sobre la creencia de que las comunidades, a menudo ignoradas por quienes están en el poder, merecen una voz y un lugar en la mesa. En los últimos 15 años, hemos traído a miles de texanos al movimiento, eligiendo campeones de la comunidad y cambiando políticas que impactan la vida cotidiana. Y aunque no tendremos todos los datos de esta elección por algunas semanas, los primeros indicadores muestran que la participación que impulsamos en nuestras comunidades se mantuvo fuerte. Aunque estamos devastados por el resultado de esta elección, no tenemos arrepentimientos sobre nuestros esfuerzos.
Nuestro compromiso con la construcción de un poder político real en Texas permanece firme. La última victoria de Donald Trump solo fortalece nuestra determinación de luchar aún más fuerte por las comunidades negras y latinas que impulsan nuestro estado. Somos un mensajero confiable para nuestras comunidades, entendiendo cuáles son los temas centrales que importan para el bienestar de los texanos negros y latinos, y las conversaciones necesarias para mover a la gente a votar, organizarse por el cambio y participar cívicamente.
El futuro de Texas se construirá en conversaciones que importan, como las que estamos teniendo en los vecindarios de los centros urbanos de nuestro estado. Ahora, más que nunca, mientras los esfuerzos de la extrema derecha crecen para difundir desinformación y sembrar miedo, nuestro trabajo se vuelve esencial. Al involucrar a las comunidades negras y latinas con una visión audaz de seguridad y prosperidad compartida, protegemos los avances logrados y conquistamos nuevos espacios.
Al igual que en su primer mandato, nos arremangaremos las mangas para contrarrestar la creciente agresividad de Trump (así como la de Greg Abbott) , mientras volvemos a construir la infraestructura política progresista que necesitamos para hacer avanzar a Texas.
Nos vemos en las calles.
Luchamos por mejores viviendas para los residentes de casas móviles en Houston
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Houston%20TOP%20mobile%20home%20action.jpeg]
Residentes de cuatro comunidades de casas móviles en el condado de Harris realizaron hoy una conferencia de prensa con TOP para resaltar sus preocupaciones sobre la habitabilidad en sus complejos y pedir a los funcionarios del condado de Harris que actúen y tomen medidas.
Durante meses, los residentes de County Road Park, Windfern Oaks, Parkview Mobile Park y Shady Village han trabajado con Texas Organizing Project para responsabilizar a sus propietarios y abordar problemas que afectan sus condiciones de vida. Estos inquilinos ahora están amplificando sus llamados para que se haga más, con el fin de que puedan permanecer en sus hogares y evitar tener que pagar multas y tarifas desmesuradas.
Vea la cobertura de noticias sobre nuestro trabajo aquí. [https://www.telemundohouston.com/noticias/local/continua-la-disputa-en-parqueadero-de-casas-moviles-tras-orden-desalojo/2447339/]
TOP cree que la vivienda es un derecho humano y que todos y cada uno de los residentes de nuestro estado, independientemente de su edad, raza, género, idioma preferido o situación económica, merecen un lugar seguro, asequible y protegido al que llamar hogar.
Para obtener más información sobre esta campaña de organización, comuníquese con Damaris en dgonzalez@organizetexas.org [dgonzalez@organizetexas.org] .
EL PRÓXIMO MES:
Reunión de la campaña TOP por la justicia en materia de vivienda del condado de Dallas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Dallas%20housing%20action%20-%20Meadows%20at%20Ferguson.jpg]
La campaña de TOP por la justicia en la vivienda en el condado de Dallas está cobrando impulso y busca tener un mayor impacto mientras nos preparamos para 2025.
Únase a nosotros en nuestra próxima reunión de campaña el 11 de diciembre de 5 a 7 p. m. en la oficina de TOP en Dallas (3910 Gaston Ave., Ste. 250), donde compartiremos ideas y planificaremos nuestros esfuerzos de organización de campaña para los próximos meses.
¡Ven y descubre cómo puedes participar!
Para obtener más información, comuníquese con Iman a ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
Consejos de TOP: Explora alternativas de compras a Amazon durante esta temporada navideña
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Amazon%20mailbox.jpg]
Todos hemos comprado productos en Amazon en algún momento. ¡Está en todas partes! Si bien los precios y el envío rápido pueden ser tentadores, vale la pena considerar otros sitios web para productos y regalos cotidianos, especialmente si desea apoyar a las pequeñas empresas y ser un comprador con mayor conciencia social. Echa un vistazo a estas alternativas. [https://blog.credo.com/2024/11/07/conscious-consuming-for-the-holidays-try-these-alternatives-to-amazon/]

San Antonio, TX 78207

clean_body: Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español] Reflecting, recharging, and ready for the fights ahead [] We don’t give up and don’t give in. Instead, we regroup, retool, stay true to our values, and come back stronger with full hearts and even more fire in our belly. TOP was built on the belief that communities too often ignored by those in power deserve a voice and a seat at the table. Over the past 15 years, we’ve brought thousands of Texans into the movement, electing community champions and changing policies that impact everyday lives. And while we won’t have the full data from this election for a few weeks, early indicators show that the turnout we fueled in our communities remained strong. Though we’re devastated by this election outcome, we have no regrets about our efforts. Our commitment to building real political power in Texas remains steadfast. Donald Trump’s latest win only strengthens our resolve to fight even harder for Black and Latino communities that fuel our state. We are a trusted messenger to our communities, understanding of what core issues matter to the well-being of Black and Latino Texans, and the conversations it takes to move people to vote, organize for change, and become more civically engaged. Texas’ future will be built on conversations that matter — the ones we’re having in neighborhoods across our state’s urban centers. Now more than ever, as far-right efforts grow to spread misinformation and stoke fear, our work becomes essential. By engaging Black and Latino communities with a bold vision of shared safety and prosperity, we protect the progress we’ve made and win new ground. Just as in his first term, we’ll be rolling up our sleeves to counter Trump’s increasing viciousness (as well as Greg Abbott’s) while getting back to building the progressive political infrastructure we need to move Texas forward. We’ll see you in the streets. Championing better housing for mobile home residents in Houston [] Residents from four mobile home communities in Harris County held a press conference with TOP today to shine a light on livability concerns at their complexes and urge Harris County officials to step up and act. For months, residents at County Road Park, Windfern Oaks, Parkview Mobile Park, and Shady Village have worked with TOP to hold their landlords accountable and address issues impacting their living conditions. These tenants are now amplifying their calls for more to be done, so they can stay in their homes and avoid having to pay outrageous fines and fees. Check out news coverage of our work here. [] TOP believes housing is a human right, and each and every resident of our state — regardless of their age, race, gender, preferred language, or economic status — deserves a safe, affordable, and secure place to call home. For more information on this organizing campaign, contact Damaris at dgonzalez@organizetexas.org [dgonzalez@organizetexas.org] . NEXT MONTH: Dallas County TOP housing justice campaign meet-up [] TOP's Dallas County Housing Justice campaign is ramping up and looking to have a greater impact as we prepare for 2025. Join us at our next campaign meeting on December 11 from 5 - 7 p.m. at the Dallas TOP office (3910 Gaston Ave., Ste. 250) where we'll break bread and plan out our campaign organizing efforts for the coming months. Come drop by and find out how you can plug in! For more information, contact Iman at ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] . TOP Tip: Explore shopping alternatives to Amazon this holiday season [] We all at some point have bought goods off Amazon. It's anywhere and everywhere! While the prices and fast shipping can sure be tempting, it's worth considering other websites for everyday products and gifts — especially if you're looking to support small businesses and be a more socially conscious shopper. Check out these alternatives. [] Español Reflexionando, recargando energías y preparándonos para las luchas que se avecinan [] No nos rendimos ni nos damos por vencidos.
