name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: Help us understand CRT’s influence
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z634mno7ja1m8921041tpdbp9lrhems2agiij390_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4o32cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg4le46m3bg7p0l2uo57re5eavu9h24l5354v38g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4o32cth2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zstoa4n9qh340ch38b4uccbsd36vqdsl6upgt1ag_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4o32cth2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zol6i2db2qrdasno3v1jeghoigljpplqktqiqs7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4o32cth2bs)
---
| |
---

American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrfjpr8t19akedgig8kfn5g4v2r4jrnaru6h8pcg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpimeob0sjh238h1e8he4937cpi6ao72c1h6eoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6qc2degbpc750pjm1oak7dpq6sgqd518fk4he60_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4o32cth2bs)_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvrkvj4brjjtthuh9shfnb3tejh5tjbfu3iemlvo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6chim1oj0c9jm49fg)

name: Matt
subject: Sorry to bother you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
But I wanted to make sure you saw the headline from the New York Post

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2065qlr81v9i03h2170fteu99e846emnps6ad80_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4o32c1h2bs)

Friend,

Hey, it's Matt, Dave McCormick's Campaign Manager. Sorry to bother you, but I wanted to make sure you saw the headline from the New York Post.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt0pf9fevmvid1tdjgisb8bj4mfcqcte873f87o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4o32c1h2bs)

The AP declared Dave McCormick the winner of Pennsylvania's senate seat, but now the Dems refuse to concede the race. **[Will you join our fight to support Dave against the Dems' dirty tricks?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuqfakpkrljkllb4q27ru03g66b1b6nrqscvpkdo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4o32c1h2bs)**

******************************************************[DONATE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zca93tlrltkmr7ul1krd9f2m758mqmteqtna61lo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4o32c1h2bs)******************************************************

As the New York Post reported, "A shady Democratic attorney...is now at the heart of a desperate legal effort to snatch Pennsylvania's Senate race away from its rightful winner -- Republican Dave McCormick...Marc Elias, a longtime Democratic election attorney and dirty trickster, is attempting to force the Pennsylvania Senate race into a recount, even though it was called for McCormick by the Associated Press on Thursday, with even the state's most liberal news outlets echoing the call since."

The fact is, Dave McCormick won! We need to make sure we have the resources to fight against whatever dirty tricks are played. **[Will you chip in $25 now?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvljrs48hct3gc85j9bb2g1pordb7p5bh7fns1ro_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4o32c1h2bs)**

Dave was able to win because of your support. We truly appreciate everything that you did to push Dave over the finish line. **[Anything you are able to chip in to help us battle back is very appreciated.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp4anr05nbhka6h3k9mqcbiql2aiqibgsc5vr390_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4o32c1h2bs)**

Thank you!
Matt

******************************************************[DONATE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z47gnbadm2ecok75216pj6e0t42789uesv8reln0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4o32c1h2bs)******************************************************

name: Dave McCormick
subject: Democrats refuse to accept the PA results and I need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
I need your help

[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zgdbus4061fgelcsb7eklqp7575cpr86q8mue59o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4o35chh2bs)

Friend,

It's Dave McCormick.

The AP called our race and we won!

But Democrats refuse to accept the results and I need your help.

Please rush in a donation to help us keep liberal lawyers like Marc Elias out of Pennsylvania!
[RUSH IN $500](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zcnq6kkq6ipkbq4nc1liut1it8g8vabmgsdc6l90_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4o35chh2bs)

---

The election is over.

But that hasn't stopped my opponent Bob Casey and the national Democrat machine from organizing and fundraising to try and force a recount.

[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zu9g6ui8ihq2trfgntpkng0pmfdl748mldp8i14g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4o35chh2bs)

_If you are not in a position to give right now, please don 't. I mean it._

But Bob Casey and the national Democrats won't accept it. And we're fighting back. We have attorneys who have been deployed to fight back. We can't be caught flat-footed and allow liberals to deny this election.

**[Can I count on you to chip in $25 today to help us keep up our fight?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z7pvj2bpkontn2qeb4fbh8ds0b5tsgqje04kqbfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4o35chh2bs)**

The AP declared Dave McCormick the winner of Pennsylvania's senate seat, but now the Dems refuse to concede the race. **[Will you join our fight to support Dave against the Dems' dirty tricks?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zamacrt2pc949kkrsu5mpf9k5j8uattldfd56j0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4o32cth2bs)**

Matt

name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: Share your thoughts on CRT and its influence
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z6h5iipqjo5e1k009g3suk0jr00lutgmmmlfcqqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4p74c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z3k7q10iqhcvjoaubvr4hbf0mvkh67stvpl49nv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4p74c9h2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z91rpujgukppo2tuic5t54pdvccspsq03bhu6do8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4p74c9h2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zupjgnp58p0h4pti1ctlh7sv08jsqjqd9sngf55o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4p74c9h2bs)
---
| |
---

Real American Reporting
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z3acvg5u5e2926hd2npprbbumpsrc249lh25qhvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4p74c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq4t9k66q3bd9ieir38ctieko7fcjheiprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni6cpb7c5ieaoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zptuv3hldgvbhhuico12m12q8j7lfmcgjbp56le0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge4p74c9h2bs)_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Reclaim our libraries
body:
Well... Times have certainly changed.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zigfps8ilv4d8or2mcdh3ci59mvm5657bi7e5v38_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clgeaor4cjh2bs)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z43jvdvso96ins4jij7av7lrimh87hbvvedk3ga0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clgeaor4cjh2bs)
---
| | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. **Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.** That's why we need your help to [**Take Back Our Libraries**.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ziubdb03k2vl0v178f36k02lsm2aqc2n7nes891o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clgeaor4cjh2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created _As You Grow_ , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: **reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.** To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu496td7hhb0k1n6ipgd6s9ijlmtjai4qhj6ig08_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clgeaor4cjh2bs)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3bvhhkh2neodtunl8c1fv4camfiu1dq9i4c44tg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clgeaor4cjh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z36uemkjallrv8nra12etsjrg4dcounhjo17ss6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clgeaor4cjh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | [ **DONATE **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhsg6sh9p4ahglv0itf2k0n2lsceu162bjta3pho_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clgeaor4cjh2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children. | | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like Woke Baby , A is for Activist , and The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies. | | | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values. That's why we need your help to My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created As You Grow , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values. To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. A gift of $175 sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America, | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# Trump’s Plan To Avoid

Donald Trump has reclaimed the White House, and America is on the path to victory once again.

But don’t think for a second that the Dems on the inside will go down without a fight.

Whether stirring up controversy through identity politics in the liberal media, or creating economic turbulence through market manipulation, there are many present threats to your financial future.

They use these tactics to enrich themselves while everyday Americans watch their retirement accounts slowly erode under market volatility.

The constant volatility benefits them, but it’s draining the hard-earned money in your retirement accounts.

Whether it’s a 401(k), IRA, TSP, or pension, your post retirement future could be in serious danger if you are not aware of the options you have to protect your wealth from their game.

**Trump's Win: Your Financial Game Plan for the Next 4 Years**
| | Donald Trump's return is a cause for celebration, but [there's something important you must remember](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znaam3o47vim75n3h0mjajjtb12il2j7shn26jfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clge9oj6c3h2bs). The road to economic recovery will be long and challenging. Why? Because President-elect Trump inherits a nation facing **significant economic problems:** 1\. A national debt exceeding $35 trillion and still growing
2\. Inflation that has eroded a chunk of the dollar's purchasing power
3\. A weakened American position on the global stage
4\. Growing support for socialism among young people While Trump's policies aim to address these issues, change won't happen overnight. In fact, **it might take _decades_ to reverse the damage**. Which means now, more than ever, it's critical for your savings to be diversified so that you can weather the ups and downs of economic recovery. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/s846Vz9VKSHk8_AvCcT7Aw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGFCwP0ScaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLUNCLTIwMjQxMTE0VwNzcGNCCmcsQbo1Z0rrStlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/s846Vz9VKSHk8_AvCcT7Aw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGFCwP0ScaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLUNCLTIwMjQxMTE0VwNzcGNCCmcsQbo1Z0rrStlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/s846Vz9VKSHk8_AvCcT7Aw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGFCwP0ScaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLUNCLTIwMjQxMTE0VwNzcGNCCmcsQbo1Z0rrStlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/s846Vz9VKSHk8_AvCcT7Aw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGFCwP0ScaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLUNCLTIwMjQxMTE0VwNzcGNCCmcsQbo1Z0rrStlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
| |
---

Conservative Broadcast
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/opif4dHjKqjdmJKCfRyudg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGFCwP0RwaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQuY29uc2VydmF0aXZlYnJvYWRjYXN0LmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmUtQnJvYWRjYXN0LU9mZmVycyZlPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclMjU0MGdtYWlsLmNvbVcDc3BjQgpnLEG6NWdK60rZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oJCU2eLDdTGQBEVKy6W96Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGFCwP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly9jb25zZXJ2YXRpdmVicm9hZGNhc3QubmV0L3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnLEG6NWdK60rZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

clean_body: The United Sovereign Americans (USA) Election Study Session has been moved from Tuesday to Thursday nights starting Nov. 14, 2024. | | | | | | Dear Peter, The United Sovereign Americans (USA) Election Study Session has been moved from Tuesday to Thursday nights starting Nov. 14, 2024. Our mission is to secure transparent, lawful, and trustworthy elections for all Americans as a matter of civil rights. The American people strive toward our national vision of honoring the life, liberty and property of every citizen, yet some would replace our freedom with their will. United Sovereign Americans painstakingly measured the extent of apparent illegal conduct and filed nine federal lawsuits between March-September 2024 which ensure standing for citizens in all 50 states. Have you experienced a problem voting? Please complete our election complaint form or share it with someone who did have a problem voting. | | Our walks you through the steps to file an election complaint. State and federal officials are responsible for investigating, and we intend to hold election officials accountable for violation of your civil right to vote in a fairly conducted election. Citizen submitted reports are the real-time evidence we need to support our lawsuits as we move forward after the election. With your help, we will halt the certification** of elections that haven't upheld our civil rights. We will hold election officials personally accountable for election fraud. | | Have you seen our latest media? Check out these highlights. Click the buttons to see all our material: "What happened to over 10 million votes?" On Twitter X, shares insights from a Nov 8, 2024 . Learn about an election "Marauder" in an October 30 and Things are heating up in Ohio. Read the press release about the August 8 Ohio lawsuit. Read about newly exposed registration violations in the press release. United Sovereign American posts are now found on a new social media platform called . Our handle on this platform is UnitedSovereignAmericans. Citizens In Action presented to local boards and groups in Greeley, CO. Learn More video highlight: | | | | United Sovereign Americans has devoted volunteer auditors, and thousands of other volunteers who bring our forensic evidence to representatives all over the country. Our high caliber analysis continues to uncover new devastating evidence about the state of our elections. Your voice and your vote matters. | | | Do you want to play a part in our citizen-led movement for valid elections? Follow, Comment and Share our social media to expand our mission reach: , , , , & Encourage family and friends who love America to subscribe to our weekly update using our Share the** on your social media. Report what you see, and make your voice heard! Contribute to our legal fight. We have a goal of $2 million for accountability actions following the election on November 5. | | Finally, please join us tonight, THURSDAY evening, at 7:00pm Eastern, to bolster your understanding of your civil right to a valid election. We study our founding documents and relevant case law to build unity and restore our elections. Here is hope: we have a solution and strategy to fix elections going forward. You can view past study sessions I look forward to seeing you tonight! Marly Hornik CEO, | | | United Sovereign Americans, Inc., a 501(c)(4) nonprofit organization, Suite 194, 167 LAMP & LANTERN VILLAGE, CHESTERFIELD, MO 63017

name: Add Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: Don't dismiss Trump's criminal charges just because he won the election
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't dismiss Trump's criminal charges just because he won the election](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7589455-d716-41c1-962a-3ef76f018994/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf224e013-3bf2-4a40-a8fb-61e36a84d33c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump's lawyers are pushing to overturn his convictions in the so-called "hush money" case, because he won the presidential election. And the court is [considering](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta05dd5f8-bd17-4d4f-877a-65a2ed464d78/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) it. **How the hell does this make any sense?** If a student burns down the school, but then wins the vote for homecoming queen, would there be no punishment? If I rob a bank, but then get a coffee mug with "world's greatest dad", do I get to keep the money? Trump was convicted of a crime. 34 of them, in fact. And he should be punished and serve his time. At worst, that could be delayed. But overturned? Hell no. [**Add your name, and demand that Trump's convictions not be dismissed, and that he be punished for his crimes.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcf980089-16c3-4cd9-b2a4-0fd9ba175ce6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4fbdbabb-e8e2-4d06-a124-bbc9ac11b7ee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Rwk6PZSnX1fZa9xjFhtsvA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGF-SP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTExNFcDc3BjQgpnK-vHNWfNEijQUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Rwk6PZSnX1fZa9xjFhtsvA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGF-SP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTExNFcDc3BjQgpnK-vHNWfNEijQUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Rwk6PZSnX1fZa9xjFhtsvA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGF-SP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTExNFcDc3BjQgpnK-vHNWfNEijQUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Rwk6PZSnX1fZa9xjFhtsvA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGF-SP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTExNFcDc3BjQgpnK-vHNWfNEijQUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yV-SahZA0T72AmApC5EiCg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGF-SP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmcr68c1Z80SKNBSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/BgqRMRuqMpp8OkmMoCjXFg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGF-SP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnK-vHNWfNEijQUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

Friend,

Hey, it's Matt, Dave McCormick's Campaign Manager. Sorry to bother you, but I wanted to make sure you saw the headline from the New York Post.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=817f863d40b04048838d4e1a602d0779&_e=uep9xEWDhED3Y1DP14XCr2XNpiX4gg3tPRnR2Lhltfw3jv01LBkUEMRLzvI9wF_9USvVweRkeTbG2ku9ljkXOWDdWLwhPoWsab1b_wVieKutLRV0fNVnyuFOCoYWYkZc3xVp8msDjRo7-xI8l0Pl5Jv0oIpvWpxYC_uwSXMekvmnIwO2FSUrThXzuQVI0IgDBf9rpnL1AaobyMDoWwSeJI3IuE90bzhNFVfnH4cnYi3fazuo920W0H5cMXIP_1t_5ArLlYEBGT4LX5MD46sSc9ZT-SEyJR5Lbw9vzfc5Pfo0C3hT0r1odR_9d4qgcgzGldr7bgTx0qiMQ9qJ_y7jlygyTELybBe-369wll0KkJH70mmetG17p4tdCMtOvy_wVFeAcHSbOF5tB2uiRC_zWoFqrhYzwwQW-08NkDU1qSnjzAe4rrbxEBhyOeM8R2uz9R2oyri8pLFsDJUlZ6URIA%3D%3D)

The AP declared Dave McCormick the winner of Pennsylvania's senate seat, but now the Dems refuse to concede the race. **[Will you join our fight to support Dave against the Dems' dirty tricks?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=817f863d40b04048838d4e1a602d0779&_e=uep9xEWDhED3Y1DP14XCr2XNpiX4gg3tPRnR2Lhltfw3jv01LBkUEMRLzvI9wF_9USvVweRkeTbG2ku9ljkXOWDdWLwhPoWsab1b_wVieKutLRV0fNVnyuFOCoYWYkZc3xVp8msDjRo7-xI8l0Pl5Jv0oIpvWpxYC_uwSXMekvmnIwO2FSUrThXzuQVI0IgDBf9rpnL1AaobyMDoWwSeJI3IuE90bzhNFVfnH4cnYi3fazuo920W0H5cMXIP_1t_5ArLlYEBGT4LX5MD46sSc9ZT-SEyJR5Lbw9vzfc5Pfo0C3hT0r1odR_9d4qgcgzGDsutnEB1sO38FXVRI1yfrNRDZ1rah8gcfJxxMBJHaXxbLE9eTLzVO89ei2Ec3Ypw9zCkZFobZ5iPfn9FbhU4vjFX0OhtrqZqokTB4IFcVxl9KqV2XnCwXgEf9kh-tnXVI4o3vGki4GXt7BMwq6S3sQ%3D%3D)**

******************************************************[DONATE](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=817f863d40b04048838d4e1a602d0779&_e=uep9xEWDhED3Y1DP14XCr2XNpiX4gg3tPRnR2Lhltfw3jv01LBkUEMRLzvI9wF_9USvVweRkeTbG2ku9ljkXOWDdWLwhPoWsab1b_wVieKutLRV0fNVnyuFOCoYWYkZc3xVp8msDjRo7-xI8l0Pl5Jv0oIpvWpxYC_uwSXMekvmnIwO2FSUrThXzuQVI0IgDBf9rpnL1AaobyMDoWwSeJI3IuE90bzhNFVfnH4cnYi3fazuo920W0H5cMXIP_1t_5ArLlYEBGT4LX5MD46sSc9ZT-SEyJR5Lbw9vzfc5Pfo0C3hT0r1odR_9d4qgcgzG2_EfWoPe95lh7yiROaNzJq5MiNUCzARToEntal5bSSWDwG7GirYlwzk4bun-gXucza92UpTV345U4igiwM5PzjXXKxiv2Uu-LfSN8sCQnWiy0ao1PX24uj5UCobibuyHuCV9y9f6NtpbnPSfYFPp-A%3D%3D)******************************************************

As the New York Post reported, "A shady Democratic attorney...is now at the heart of a desperate legal effort to snatch Pennsylvania's Senate race away from its rightful winner -- Republican Dave McCormick...Marc Elias, a longtime Democratic election attorney and dirty trickster, is attempting to force the Pennsylvania Senate race into a recount, even though it was called for McCormick by the Associated Press on Thursday, with even the state's most liberal news outlets echoing the call since."

The fact is, Dave McCormick won! We need to make sure we have the resources to fight against whatever dirty tricks are played. **[Will you chip in $25 now?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=817f863d40b04048838d4e1a602d0779&_e=uep9xEWDhED3Y1DP14XCr2XNpiX4gg3tPRnR2Lhltfw3jv01LBkUEMRLzvI9wF_9USvVweRkeTbG2ku9ljkXOWDdWLwhPoWsab1b_wVieKutLRV0fNVnyuFOCoYWYkZc3xVp8msDjRo7-xI8l0Pl5Jv0oIpvWpxYC_uwSXMekvmnIwO2FSUrThXzuQVI0IgDBf9rpnL1AaobyMDoWwSeJI3IuE90bzhNFVfnH4cnYi3fazuo920W0H5cMXIP_1t_5ArLlYEBGT4LX5MD46sSc9ZT-SEyJR5Lbw9vzfc5Pfo0C3hT0r1odR_9d4qgcgzGZ0FRibPPQEdxDhPhTaBNogMPNfGozTLwTFf1BdY--e1xLUiJI9x6l2ALAKqoseTmU2BMpyjrBiASgtEofsgxys_DYP5nslaDiGgpQgxSr2QodUkAxKqDJEUQd2Bl20bSrfPbCsKeEdVkp2s7Bs48VA%3D%3D)**

Dave was able to win because of your support. We truly appreciate everything that you did to push Dave over the finish line. **[Anything you are able to chip in to help us battle back is very appreciated.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=817f863d40b04048838d4e1a602d0779&_e=uep9xEWDhED3Y1DP14XCr2XNpiX4gg3tPRnR2Lhltfw3jv01LBkUEMRLzvI9wF_9USvVweRkeTbG2ku9ljkXOWDdWLwhPoWsab1b_wVieKutLRV0fNVnyuFOCoYWYkZc3xVp8msDjRo7-xI8l0Pl5Jv0oIpvWpxYC_uwSXMekvmnIwO2FSUrThXzuQVI0IgDBf9rpnL1AaobyMDoWwSeJI3IuE90bzhNFVfnH4cnYi3fazuo920W0H5cMXIP_1t_5ArLlYEBGT4LX5MD46sSc9ZT-SEyJR5Lbw9vzfc5Pfo0C3hT0r1odR_9d4qgcgzG0qB0pFo5tzuC7VGezTvc_lehBO_DSD95hSn1HIEB-8X5rBiqnSW7I0xdkdLe-LCJjn_QJsbPHadcPgivizHj0DbfjeBiuQ3vQgD5wHBwr-n-dqiDRomBZNq5cqY3cPyn2nDYmsYwexC3kfYmWINliQ%3D%3D)**

Thank you!

clean_body: But I wanted to make sure you saw the headline from the New York Post Friend, Hey, it's Matt, Dave McCormick's Campaign Manager. Sorry to bother you, but I wanted to make sure you saw the headline from the New York Post. The AP declared Dave McCormick the winner of Pennsylvania's senate seat, but now the Dems refuse to concede the race. ****************************************************************************************************** As the New York Post reported, "A shady Democratic attorney...is now at the heart of a desperate legal effort to snatch Pennsylvania's Senate race away from its rightful winner -- Republican Dave McCormick...Marc Elias, a longtime Democratic election attorney and dirty trickster, is attempting to force the Pennsylvania Senate race into a recount, even though it was called for McCormick by the Associated Press on Thursday, with even the state's most liberal news outlets echoing the call since." The fact is, Dave McCormick won! We need to make sure we have the resources to fight against whatever dirty tricks are played. Dave was able to win because of your support. We truly appreciate everything that you did to push Dave over the finish line. Thank you! Matt ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0656d4a0464481f97f102be673e48ac&_e=ZHN6-dog_PoENRK2ltEXYmvxd1kx3cvlco5AOO1ufBci8g_db0rk5X0_8U5teiIcBaRAZs-j2YHywJVS3t6NmFJ_ReVeScI3lOzXYsgG56EHi9LWZhwh2KbGOmCeiRblPcFGRCFTAa3KRb7A7ku5EyhdTI3gjm31fE3lB6u-Fsh_RbOwsfGbLbLremuDZHgtBEG2NDgZOHsimp2EnU3Viocqa-q6FmAE8Oz8HY7GMsrhalnJi3sQjeshQ1D-Z4Z1V6t4-Y9fmXOFaR3Aji1cdfWTmmGlxtumh_NPYQlUaooTwd1Jf4zcscnR3Bpami6Y_6Po_MZ7lEbyWqMDDgWrk3BsAhVtYd8iyLuuOLXiO3qEH5HlDx3XghuscgPtho6jFOveYML7EdIEIKPoQ-oBTw%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0656d4a0464481f97f102be673e48ac&_e=ZHN6-dog_PoENRK2ltEXYmvxd1kx3cvlco5AOO1ufBci8g_db0rk5X0_8U5teiIcBaRAZs-j2YHywJVS3t6NmFJ_ReVeScI3lOzXYsgG56EHi9LWZhwh2KbGOmCeiRblPcFGRCFTAa3KRb7A7ku5EyhdTI3gjm31fE3lB6u-Fsh_RbOwsfGbLbLremuDZHgtBEG2NDgZOHsimp2EnU3Viocqa-q6FmAE8Oz8HY7GMsrhalnJi3sQjeshQ1D-Z4Z1xrczuuszEtD8T21gOkF26kwvPzrK7k65fxbQnrnmQZjqqH3E6w3GcPROLV53_tTt4-556WUOUwMknqiKZ9EGinQnKUvFdyjBXhd5tTdmYoPwncgn4Q9jqki4-Xc9KC4AIcL6YEvk77C-fLDOZmj2GQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0656d4a0464481f97f102be673e48ac&_e=ZHN6-dog_PoENRK2ltEXYmvxd1kx3cvlco5AOO1ufBci8g_db0rk5X0_8U5teiIcBaRAZs-j2YHywJVS3t6NmFJ_ReVeScI3lOzXYsgG56EHi9LWZhwh2KbGOmCeiRblPcFGRCFTAa3KRb7A7ku5EyhdTI3gjm31fE3lB6u-Fsh_RbOwsfGbLbLremuDZHgtBEG2NDgZOHsimp2EnU3Viocqa-q6FmAE8Oz8HY7GMsrhalnJi3sQjeshQ1D-Z4Z10EaGl3Y4dJv1oPKaJXwnHyn7yjFL5-RWyFKhwvKiuPrs9HBnnWoRpuKfitjaJLM-jH-j-0b_aKq_ORHotzTObSHmHV0B66TB8jM6FIX-BNXhh4gPi79i5bEZO_VZKrhYQT9-vNWgau3lbr_LQEwIpQ%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we... Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations. Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.** Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# [Matt Gaetz as Attorney General? HELL NO! Tell the Senate to REJECT his confirmation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0f9ba2a1-ccf2-4807-add7-412b83f35c5b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Donald Trump has chosen Matt Gaetz as his attorney general. Matt Gaetz -- the guy under investigation for sex trafficking, drugs, sex with minors, and God only knows what else. Gaetz was chosen solely because he is a Trump cultist who will carry out Trump's orders -- legal or illegal. He will turn the Justice Department into a weapon to exact vengeance on Trump's opponents. Senate Republicans were apparently blindsided by the announcement, and some are considering voting against Gaetz. We can defeat him. All it will take is a small handful of Republicans to oppose him, and there are a number of GOP senators who really, really, hate this guy. [**Sign on, say NO to Matt Gaetz as AG, and tell Senate Republicans to do the same.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82c9968f-1f94-4a33-8e8f-f39dd3aea11a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Have they all forgotten how the economy works?
body:
The Foundation for Economic Education’s (FEE) high school students know more about basic economics and math than Joe Biden

|
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8b6e577cfa4a4d7e9598df15314b9d0a&_e=2VJ925LY3cLvii6Su9QrhsXxbpKCkFOdR-i1qJYjrZtRJi4sN6NOI2Rkk9qBvnPY9oOiEcJDEq82_mUNaj_LQswMeZwL5fpYfo-xq7--9ogsMcjr9PzLxHGUEq_Zg2UbSOMX8CzsEFTdegAcrDlTLbxtKN-8DmpGh9UrK3w1E-vdJc9O1JrLa9B5D4pzDXXU8JpHkV__iyTLOFcz_TNaa_QxY6CuVX1h7P2gX3PDoch0DnLDHklvyYZbKH9Faj7igWf4zWWv1ECjox2YNdNr0wg7LKgXMfwbgSDUpWCySGo83BotXWg0Wmu3ThcxTjWq) Friend,

Biden, Pelosi, and AOC all seem to have forgotten anything they learned in an economics class... or even basic 8th-grade math classes.

Do you see the horrific ideas coming out of Washington D.C.?
* Raising the minimum wage to $20+
* Passing over $3 Trillion budgets
* Allowing inflation to destroy the value of the dollar
* They’ve even proposed minting a “$1 Trillion coin” to fund the budget...

These ideas are not only madness but economic suicide.**The Foundation for Economic Education’s (FEE) high school students know more about basic economics and math than Joe Biden (and they can stay awake during class)!**

FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility. Their flagship program,**“FEE In the Classroom”** is teaching students these important lessons and values in order to save our Republic from socialism.

**Make no mistake:** If AOC had attended a FEE In the Classroom seminar we would not be in this mess.

[Which is why I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. As the New York Post reported, "A shady Democratic attorney...is now at the heart of a desperate legal effort to snatch Pennsylvania's Senate race away from its rightful winner -- Republican Dave McCormick...Marc Elias, a longtime Democratic election attorney and dirty trickster, is attempting to force the Pennsylvania Senate race into a recount, even though it was called for McCormick by the Associated Press on Thursday, with even the state's most liberal news outlets echoing the call since."

The fact is, Dave McCormick won! clean_body: But I wanted to make sure you saw the headline from the New York Post Friend, Hey, it's Matt, Dave McCormick's Campaign Manager. Sorry to bother you, but I wanted to make sure you saw the headline from the New York Post. The AP declared Dave McCormick the winner of Pennsylvania's senate seat, but now the Dems refuse to concede the race. ****************************************************************************************************** As the New York Post reported, "A shady Democratic attorney...is now at the heart of a desperate legal effort to snatch Pennsylvania's Senate race away from its rightful winner -- Republican Dave McCormick...Marc Elias, a longtime Democratic election attorney and dirty trickster, is attempting to force the Pennsylvania Senate race into a recount, even though it was called for McCormick by the Associated Press on Thursday, with even the state's most liberal news outlets echoing the call since." The fact is, Dave McCormick won! We need to make sure we have the resources to fight against whatever dirty tricks are played. Dave was able to win because of your support. We truly appreciate everything that you did to push Dave over the finish line. Thank you! Matt ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Keep Congress Republican PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

**[Reality Check: Are You Prepared for What's Next?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjzGv2yAUhX8N3mxxr8GQgeG1ljv0qcNT1TZdKgLEpoXgYJw0_75yGmV667nf0XeujnPwx5si4gNBnLxdCCJpXwjieX-Nef0dP3-qf9BvsT53XyLfrvjxgV7wCZ-Mhj5Nb39v5nUZx_PX1z_7nxd44uU2uyf8kDYuah-2VPSVVe3RUlY5BaIFLkEyWU0KD500x44xSQWXFBzbGQ4UrGDcdM5UXiFFBgAMKBfIGyEPTO-co5IburNIGL17Gh1d9kbDUq4655RiY1KsgppKmZf7sIHgEOZGh-BGr0_GjSnYjSI4lCk7XeqS6jK52qYQdN4a7bCW-GtJazaOtP3Lf8ng81K-6_yWtnK3IdFZv0bS9r0p9pEZHWftx9P7RYAaWJWVna8-BL90gjA63n_Zll8U_gsAAP__bN2Lxw)** With everything going on today, it’s natural to feel a growing sense of unease about the future. Rising costs of everyday essentials, inflation eating into the value of our hard-earned dollars, and news of escalating national debt are impacting people across the board. The middle class feels the pinch acutely, with many left wondering how long they can maintain their standard of living without making sacrifices. Global shifts, like the alliance of BRICS nations pushing for economic independence from the U.S. dollar, and ongoing market volatility add layers of unpredictability that complicate even the best-laid financial plans. It’s easy to find yourself asking: **[What happens if the world doesn’t return to “normal”?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjzGv2yAUhX8N3mxxr8GQgeG1ljv0qcNT1TZdKgLEpoXgYJw0_75yGmV667nf0XeujnPwx5si4gNBnLxdCCJpXwjieX-Nef0dP3-qf9BvsT53XyLfrvjxgV7wCZ-Mhj5Nb39v5nUZx_PX1z_7nxd44uU2uyf8kDYuah-2VPSVVe3RUlY5BaIFLkEyWU0KD500x44xSQWXFBzbGQ4UrGDcdM5UXiFFBgAMKBfIGyEPTO-co5IburNIGL17Gh1d9kbDUq4655RiY1KsgppKmZf7sIHgEOZGh-BGr0_GjSnYjSI4lCk7XeqS6jK52qYQdN4a7bCW-GtJazaOtP3Lf8ng81K-6_yWtnK3IdFZv0bS9r0p9pEZHWftx9P7RYAaWJWVna8-BL90gjA63n_Zll8U_gsAAP__bN2Lxw)** One pressing concern that keeps emerging is the U.S. dollar’s diminishing purchasing power. According to recent data from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics and the World Bank, the dollar has lost over 20% of its purchasing power since 2020. In practical terms, this devaluation means that a dollar today buys far less than it did just four years ago, impacting everyday expenses, savings, and the value of long-term assets. **[For the average middle-class American, each percentage point lost further erodes financial security, forcing them to either cut back or explore alternative ways to protect and grow their savings.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjzGv2yAUhX8N3mxxr8GQgeG1ljv0qcNT1TZdKgLEpoXgYJw0_75yGmV667nf0XeujnPwx5si4gNBnLxdCCJpXwjieX-Nef0dP3-qf9BvsT53XyLfrvjxgV7wCZ-Mhj5Nb39v5nUZx_PX1z_7nxd44uU2uyf8kDYuah-2VPSVVe3RUlY5BaIFLkEyWU0KD500x44xSQWXFBzbGQ4UrGDcdM5UXiFFBgAMKBfIGyEPTO-co5IburNIGL17Gh1d9kbDUq4655RiY1KsgppKmZf7sIHgEOZGh-BGr0_GjSnYjSI4lCk7XeqS6jK52qYQdN4a7bCW-GtJazaOtP3Lf8ng81K-6_yWtnK3IdFZv0bS9r0p9pEZHWftx9P7RYAaWJWVna8-BL90gjA63n_Zll8U_gsAAP__bN2Lxw)**
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjzGv2yAUhX8N3mxxr8GQgeG1ljv0qcNT1TZdKgLEpoXgYJw0_75yGmV667nf0XeujnPwx5si4gNBnLxdCCJpXwjieX-Nef0dP3-qf9BvsT53XyLfrvjxgV7wCZ-Mhj5Nb39v5nUZx_PX1z_7nxd44uU2uyf8kDYuah-2VPSVVe3RUlY5BaIFLkEyWU0KD500x44xSQWXFBzbGQ4UrGDcdM5UXiFFBgAMKBfIGyEPTO-co5IburNIGL17Gh1d9kbDUq4655RiY1KsgppKmZf7sIHgEOZGh-BGr0_GjSnYjSI4lCk7XeqS6jK52qYQdN4a7bCW-GtJazaOtP3Lf8ng81K-6_yWtnK3IdFZv0bS9r0p9pEZHWftx9P7RYAaWJWVna8-BL90gjA63n_Zll8U_gsAAP__bN2Lxw)
For many, day-to-day routines, busy schedules, and opinions from advisors, family, and friends often pull attention away from the bigger picture. When it comes to finances, it’s tempting to put off critical decisions, assume the status quo will hold, or rely on others’ advice without evaluating what’s truly best for long-term security. **[But in times like these, with so many factors shifting all at once, taking proactive steps has never been more important.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjzGv2yAUhX8N3mxxr8GQgeG1ljv0qcNT1TZdKgLEpoXgYJw0_75yGmV667nf0XeujnPwx5si4gNBnLxdCCJpXwjieX-Nef0dP3-qf9BvsT53XyLfrvjxgV7wCZ-Mhj5Nb39v5nUZx_PX1z_7nxd44uU2uyf8kDYuah-2VPSVVe3RUlY5BaIFLkEyWU0KD500x44xSQWXFBzbGQ4UrGDcdM5UXiFFBgAMKBfIGyEPTO-co5IburNIGL17Gh1d9kbDUq4655RiY1KsgppKmZf7sIHgEOZGh-BGr0_GjSnYjSI4lCk7XeqS6jK52qYQdN4a7bCW-GtJazaOtP3Lf8ng81K-6_yWtnK3IdFZv0bS9r0p9pEZHWftx9P7RYAaWJWVna8-BL90gjA63n_Zll8U_gsAAP__bN2Lxw)** The question is no longer whether to take action but what kind of action to take. How can we prepare for an economic environment that feels as unpredictable as it is challenging? How can we maintain our lifestyles, protect our families, and still plan for the future, regardless of what uncertainties arise? **[Diversification—spreading out assets to manage risk—has long been a cornerstone of financial planning in uncertain times.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjzGv2yAUhX8N3mxxr8GQgeG1ljv0qcNT1TZdKgLEpoXgYJw0_75yGmV667nf0XeujnPwx5si4gNBnLxdCCJpXwjieX-Nef0dP3-qf9BvsT53XyLfrvjxgV7wCZ-Mhj5Nb39v5nUZx_PX1z_7nxd44uU2uyf8kDYuah-2VPSVVe3RUlY5BaIFLkEyWU0KD500x44xSQWXFBzbGQ4UrGDcdM5UXiFFBgAMKBfIGyEPTO-co5IburNIGL17Gh1d9kbDUq4655RiY1KsgppKmZf7sIHgEOZGh-BGr0_GjSnYjSI4lCk7XeqS6jK52qYQdN4a7bCW-GtJazaOtP3Lf8ng81K-6_yWtnK3IdFZv0bS9r0p9pEZHWftx9P7RYAaWJWVna8-BL90gjA63n_Zll8U_gsAAP__bN2Lxw)** Throughout history, people have turned to various methods to safeguard their wealth with assets that retain value even when the market fluctuates. In today’s world, including options in your portfolio that offer stability, and long-term resilience can bring peace of mind and create a more secure future. **Why Gold and Silver?** These assets are not tied to any single economy, currency, or policy, giving them a unique role in a diversified portfolio. Unlike assets solely tied to market performance, gold and silver possess intrinsic value that has historically held up through market and economic shifts. They’re valued not because of fleeting trends but because of their enduring role as stores of value across civilizations, providing an extra layer of security when times feel uncertain. **[This is precisely why central banks and governments are steadily increasing their reserves of gold and silver.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjzGv2yAUhX8N3mxxr8GQgeG1ljv0qcNT1TZdKgLEpoXgYJw0_75yGmV667nf0XeujnPwx5si4gNBnLxdCCJpXwjieX-Nef0dP3-qf9BvsT53XyLfrvjxgV7wCZ-Mhj5Nb39v5nUZx_PX1z_7nxd44uU2uyf8kDYuah-2VPSVVe3RUlY5BaIFLkEyWU0KD500x44xSQWXFBzbGQ4UrGDcdM5UXiFFBgAMKBfIGyEPTO-co5IburNIGL17Gh1d9kbDUq4655RiY1KsgppKmZf7sIHgEOZGh-BGr0_GjSnYjSI4lCk7XeqS6jK52qYQdN4a7bCW-GtJazaOtP3Lf8ng81K-6_yWtnK3IdFZv0bS9r0p9pEZHWftx9P7RYAaWJWVna8-BL90gjA63n_Zll8U_gsAAP__bN2Lxw)** We understand that taking action can seem complex, especially with so much information and influence pulling us in different directions. However, the biggest risk isn’t taking action—it’s staying fully exposed to a financial system already showing signs of cracks. The question isn’t whether assets like gold and silver value have—central banks and governments worldwide have already answered that for us. The real question is: How comfortable are you leaving your wealth fully exposed to a system under strain? Having clarity about your financial direction matters. Discover steps you can take toward a more diversified, secure future aligned with your goals. **[Our complimentary Learning Kit](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjzGv2yAUhX8N3mxxr8GQgeG1ljv0qcNT1TZdKgLEpoXgYJw0_75yGmV667nf0XeujnPwx5si4gNBnLxdCCJpXwjieX-Nef0dP3-qf9BvsT53XyLfrvjxgV7wCZ-Mhj5Nb39v5nUZx_PX1z_7nxd44uU2uyf8kDYuah-2VPSVVe3RUlY5BaIFLkEyWU0KD500x44xSQWXFBzbGQ4UrGDcdM5UXiFFBgAMKBfIGyEPTO-co5IburNIGL17Gh1d9kbDUq4655RiY1KsgppKmZf7sIHgEOZGh-BGr0_GjSnYjSI4lCk7XeqS6jK52qYQdN4a7bCW-GtJazaOtP3Lf8ng81K-6_yWtnK3IdFZv0bS9r0p9pEZHWftx9P7RYAaWJWVna8-BL90gjA63n_Zll8U_gsAAP__bN2Lxw)** offers valuable information on alternative assets so you can make informed decisions about your financial well-being. **[Request Your Free Learning Kit Today!](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjzGv2yAUhX8N3mxxr8GQgeG1ljv0qcNT1TZdKgLEpoXgYJw0_75yGmV667nf0XeujnPwx5si4gNBnLxdCCJpXwjieX-Nef0dP3-qf9BvsT53XyLfrvjxgV7wCZ-Mhj5Nb39v5nUZx_PX1z_7nxd44uU2uyf8kDYuah-2VPSVVe3RUlY5BaIFLkEyWU0KD500x44xSQWXFBzbGQ4UrGDcdM5UXiFFBgAMKBfIGyEPTO-co5IburNIGL17Gh1d9kbDUq4655RiY1KsgppKmZf7sIHgEOZGh-BGr0_GjSnYjSI4lCk7XeqS6jK52qYQdN4a7bCW-GtJazaOtP3Lf8ng81K-6_yWtnK3IdFZv0bS9r0p9pEZHWftx9P7RYAaWJWVna8-BL90gjA63n_Zll8U_gsAAP__bN2Lxw)**

The election is over.

But that hasn't stopped my opponent Bob Casey and the national Democrat machine from organizing and fundraising to try and force a recount.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=11d8891a5c6941909a209395727316cf&_e=mc8KLDv5dbyyizkJmSeHOlrOusEr-12al3FSzGK8H4_o8OyqzzcY6_v7IYDdxutMq_djXABmIToqLpLHIFJaydWiQU7SPtKb13ylG3n1fpWjB-gsVnKk8krxTu7XiEGbqqrvHT4E7RgVJ5v2hj2cOmJ1-xKG9QQPOtzJQ7T_YvpxRS3ALL4B0_zNiBK7sOPYwgTkkiM3XTjo3_dp23u6vbnTi3GBWyQMC0eWBWNridt3cDZNqyJ_z_LaHt-NuIE7Ix70iqH-pLuEa7UqsFgjvpCq77b1odLXwM-103-fp6rHD8Nzo1QzMHDrgZvuP3fjUJGw2eBppZ5hkJhKRn9exF8tMb3Q9x_Jsvm6gOeE1CYxuHLDbMgcFMmWA2qG5gsiLgIw45b6vOYbngkdgVpTq_SmQHx07WOi7qo3QluToUo%3D)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Have they all forgotten how the economy works?
body:
The Foundation for Economic Education’s (FEE) high school students know more about basic economics and math than Joe Biden

|
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6ffde53963a74d22ac49bcc3aa14f793&_e=pnOQxXWSNh86JfyfcoqMpCXnVycftgRyr-S_ufkWwM-TXM-xUtA0DRfiC7S5li-FkGuquL68QEpK3vGibhAO79esjZpa9lS5o2s6jH9Ig2xdcXhfRrn0WHvJgcUJhbmH1hurQhO9QC3fQT8IDM3p6o7aP0kdjDQwiDLZ7f-V5AqZ74PyqR3DnuVI9UxEcsJD7daaBiUzf0FvETFFkKYhuXwXY6OvfwHwg1PFcC-YK6DVCxAGLr07t72RaN8ya4Hpb33xst1ex_cYW9MtC48rlh1Z2cxu8Y4S-i02V58Hj0WKuNlgiaP6z5-Tu8UMOL2l) Friend,

Biden, Pelosi, and AOC all seem to have forgotten anything they learned in an economics class... or even basic 8th-grade math classes.

Do you see the horrific ideas coming out of Washington D.C.?
* Raising the minimum wage to $20+
* Passing over $3 Trillion budgets
* Allowing inflation to destroy the value of the dollar
* They’ve even proposed minting a “$1 Trillion coin” to fund the budget...

These ideas are not only madness but economic suicide.**The Foundation for Economic Education’s (FEE) high school students know more about basic economics and math than Joe Biden (and they can stay awake during class)!**

FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility. Their flagship program,**“FEE In the Classroom”** is teaching students these important lessons and values in order to save our Republic from socialism.

**Make no mistake:** If AOC had attended a FEE In the Classroom seminar we would not be in this mess.

[Which is why I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6ffde53963a74d22ac49bcc3aa14f793&_e=pnOQxXWSNh86JfyfcoqMpCXnVycftgRyr-S_ufkWwM-TXM-xUtA0DRfiC7S5li-FkGuquL68QEpK3vGibhAO79esjZpa9lS5o2s6jH9Ig2xdcXhfRrn0WHvJgcUJhbmH1hurQhO9QC3fQT8IDM3p6o7aP0kdjDQwiDLZ7f-V5AqjsVsxF5B8q3CdJZGXW6AGbPQ6ViJHDCKLeK8CRpGbovhc3pu78skYN4kIUQXyl-JFPZ-HpPQWwr0m3wMqQHRBt3f31shERQ5BOLBr-fIqfkWlO2ZpJ-Owjs52ZDlRDX3ZI6UuNPxCTPlGBxDGPwqr)

_You and I will never win unless we reach young people with our message_.

The truth is we have an uphill battle ahead of us.

Big government, Critical Race Theory, radical activists, and cancel culture have all played a part to indoctrinate our country’s youth inside the classroom.

But I am optimistic and fully believe FEE can turn the tide against socialism in the classroom. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6ffde53963a74d22ac49bcc3aa14f793&_e=pnOQxXWSNh86JfyfcoqMpCXnVycftgRyr-S_ufkWwM-TXM-xUtA0DRfiC7S5li-FkGuquL68QEpK3vGibhAO79esjZpa9lS5o2s6jH9Ig2xdcXhfRrn0WHvJgcUJhbmH1hurQhO9QC3fQT8IDM3p6o7aP0kdjDQwiDLZ7f-V5ArjQX684PQaW8R50sr49uIRBLI4UOSc8iDFrkW91zWo8VECQQyuPQQ6Ju3U7ApfehSzs7gNRP-MfYAne7W6W_oVyKtaBQSHVDjtqPsdUwTN_jDM9oy-HRyKZ81c4nA7CBx3TEGS8tkBxrWYZfEbUc8Q)
When young people hear our message it resonates with them.
* Young people want to be free and independent
* Entrepreneurship and problem-solving are appealing to young high school and college students
* Privacy and individual liberty are important to younger generations
* Our country’s youth want fulfilling and well-paying jobs... Well, you’re not going to get that with socialism

**DO NOT give up on young people. **

We can win hearts and minds. And that’s exactly what FEE is doing with FEE In the Classroom.

FEE students are among the brightest men and women I meet. In fact, I’ve even had FEE staff testify in front of Congress and some former FEE students have worked in my office or on my campaigns.

[I am inviting you to support the Foundation for Economic Education by making a donation of $10, $20.24, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6ffde53963a74d22ac49bcc3aa14f793&_e=pnOQxXWSNh86JfyfcoqMpCXnVycftgRyr-S_ufkWwM-TXM-xUtA0DRfiC7S5li-FkGuquL68QEpK3vGibhAO79esjZpa9lS5o2s6jH9Ig2xdcXhfRrn0WHvJgcUJhbmH1hurQhO9QC3fQT8IDM3p6o7aP0kdjDQwiDLZ7f-V5ApL8bYaB4SRS9A50-XNewlPIimzRmI1WOrd_3nPJxRPgQNTLJxP4iGbg5_mllg9U77GEt4w-1dLe0qF73gnEPQ8tkQZo66n1BJtRHfxIFRoBMxBtQU1NuntqCPGKwIxe0VW4AzN860MvAd2MysIPjkW)

President-elect Donald Trump [announced three key nominations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQhX8NbEY-2zjO4CEd2NK1IzrgINeAjYwJSn99RfdO70lPT_r0fd3bO_LMYfrEhXweY4t95he1AAKMUOajNeXgRyJFuiQPFw21M1pC-fDOjfoKtZW6ljS6Di1Yh_ZKaM2ls7pkr6QyAGAApFOqMsZaI43G0dlagSuMpIFzTNV35JAfNM7v-KJU9XEpZ__Ied0KfStUU6jmOI5q2cK5FaqhIPatUE2g44w1zpy5P2tO-7KKjOsm0t5xFBNS_hETdh2mQYwxiSe9RY8dB8pijRtnjuG8YhK3G-zqGfsy-WE9eJ55s5fCyGlBnv-48n-eXl79BgAA___YlGrf) on Wednesday, naming Sen. Marco Rubio secretary of state, Tulsi Gabbard director of national intelligence, and Florida Rep. Matt Gaetz attorney general.

# Thursday, November 14, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this day in 1851, Herman Melville's [_Moby Dick_](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQgOGnMZuR73w4ZPDQDmzp2hEZfIRrTRyBC-Ltq1ZdO3_Dr__91t-CJHnc38LCvky5D2ORnXsADaSRXnuqop-YkW3FHi4WmpasgWr2gzXQDDA2bhoAWhPtNUxjaK-OHPHIlXg0SABAAKZFrImcI0M2TK1rEFpFhqOUvNYfWR5l5imdeee1HvNSJT-X8tyUfVHYKeyO46hn2Upezx9X2JVZNh3DqeWh_0Rht-Th1FHGT_38GpJsM8dq9fF5SEqyuYsic1-CpN9I-W969_gdAAD__75iWf4) was published. Now hailed as one of the greatest classics of American literature, the novel was initially both a critical and commercial failure. We're excited to announce that next Tuesday marks the launch of our newest state edition, **_The Tennessee Flyover_**. This daily digest will cover news across the Volunteer State, Monday through Friday. [Click here to sign up!](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFOwzAQxvGnsbdWvvPZcQcPoCoLaickxBRZ9qU1OHWVmCDeHlUwdIDxTv_f8r0chkPIJV9OxzCxb2MdQmx55QFgA7RBehxIJj8yI2vJHjoNxpFWIM8eHJBjpcwYXUchgTGYul0kJL3bkZLZo0ICAAJQDnFLZC0p0mF01iA4QYpTbnXevtV8aWcey1dded7GOsniz61dF6EfBPYC-6n8UQnsf69bEU45lnx5F7rnKeQi9D5dP3MpebGdQEPqdHv_QLu00HiINbHQ--ejQPvRJqH3T69y9nfuTsn230irx-8AAAD__9PnZ7A) We are sponsored today by [OneHope](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uszAUhq_GbEH4-OCQwcMX8bGlQ5eOyOCDOZV_EHGoevdVqqxdH-n90fNxG2-WAyf_ZiOZsuTRzoUPGqU8STwBXkesnFmIgFRFRp6VbDtUjaxWg1o70vPimmW6TDRdaCKc0bWWls7ptmIDDaCUEqVsOoAaUWtsUNml0y3ITmBDjkve68_Mqay0hO980F7POVbBrKVsd6H-CRgEDJ4PTr7Oida8UZ2oCBg260nA8NxJ7GlnK9TwKHG858c-k1D9q1KAfuJIjh9RqJ6i5fCCs42bZZ-E6vvhHRD09X8M1W7c9sUh8F2fBTb-mfh9Vv4ydRj4CQAA__8RfmvA), the non-profit helping Christians in need in Nigeria.

## Trump Taps Rubio, Gabbard, and Gaetz
President-elect Donald Trump [announced three key nominations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQhX8NbEY-2zjO4CEd2NK1IzrgINeAjYwJSn99RfdO70lPT_r0fd3bO_LMYfrEhXweY4t95he1AAKMUOajNeXgRyJFuiQPFw21M1pC-fDOjfoKtZW6ljS6Di1Yh_ZKaM2ls7pkr6QyAGAApFOqMsZaI43G0dlagSuMpIFzTNV35JAfNM7v-KJU9XEpZ__Ied0KfStUU6jmOI5q2cK5FaqhIPatUE2g44w1zpy5P2tO-7KKjOsm0t5xFBNS_hETdh2mQYwxiSe9RY8dB8pijRtnjuG8YhK3G-zqGfsy-WE9eJ55s5fCyGlBnv-48n-eXl79BgAA___YlGrf) on Wednesday, naming Sen. Marco Rubio secretary of state, Tulsi Gabbard director of national intelligence, and Florida Rep. Matt Gaetz attorney general. Both Rubio and Gabbard were [presidential candidates](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQRn-N2UC-s8EweGgHb-naETlwJK4MRvgCyr-v3L3L6Q3vpKfv-zbefIhhe3z5lSwvafQTh5NGgBp0jfpz1NVsFyIkVZEFo6DttZJQPS30RkOPvlWG5IJKquE-3GVnBi-VN10VLErUAKABZI_YaN11Wmrll75rEXqhJc2B09H8pLDxk5b4TicdzZTWKton856F-hDoBLrruppX9pxm_y6CQJc5HW-BbqMrC3R7ioHDVJAiTRzSVrhECHQA5SiBjo_Xutd8-C2HItUxnFS_9tkz5drve4lZaePybTpEbHGQ0gh01WHn_QoxhtwZoeVj9SH-5fJ_850WfwMAAP__WU5vQw) and Trump opponents. Rubio was reported to be on Trump's vice president shortlist, while Gabbard, a former Democratic congresswoman, became an independent in 2022 before joining the GOP last month. Trump's decision to tap Rep. Matt Gaetz as attorney general [received mixed reviews](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQRn-N2Rz5zgbM4KEd2NK1I7qEA1wZjMwlUfrrq7Rz50_fe9L7PA9niilu8wetHGTKA10l3nkA0OA0uvfBVWOYmJFtxQFaC7V31kC1hKmuqfFjzZ7Qm4sh22I30tjS6DvbQRUDGnQA4ACMRzw51zTOOEuTb2oEr5zhMUoup68cN1l4Ss9853K65rVKYRHZD2XfFPYKe1l4iSm9NoX9klfe-HEo7A_eSFhh7zrfWQN6JRE9E8u3JpFcNn7qmTculLSU27rrv4suvN8uKV5pe3GqEsb9EVOKR9MqZ-aV4q-ukv_S3AP-BAAA___Ln2aT), given the Florida congressman's polarizing role within the GOP in ousting former Speaker Kevin McCarthy. Gaetz resigned his seat in Congress late Wednesday following the announcement, but some GOP Senators [predicted he wouldn't win confirmation.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQhX8N3rA4TBx3YEgHb-nYjtYVHw4VBgsusdJfXzl7p_f0vuXp-7pOVwwxpOUDV7Ls84SOw4MmAAlGavM-mWa2nkhT15CFcwenwXQKmps1Hpyhbn47O1AnNQ8DKOrmAWdEp75VE6xW2gCAAVCD1q0xfW-U6dAP_UnDIIyiOXAu7U8OiW_k4zM_qLQur020N-atiu4i9Cj0uO97u9Z0MKFHSvJehR4T7UdsOQYO7qgrMssFiX-lR0dVLnmTlRIyybxtuQYOOUn0TEVyua8HjeReq89FInMuiZ5yoUQFo9AjFnm5wF3HT2iKnbc9xBhqfxZGLSuG-DrM_wl8WP0XAAD__xo3dUA)
## GOP Picks Thune for Senate Majority Leader
Republicans elected [Sen. John Thune](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb_GdEae8YB5hYu3BV223RI5ZhwcGRyRWVD-fpXtt7nNlc6RztdluoRc8nb7DCt7SXUKUfLBE4AG0kgfEzWzT8zItmEPzkI3kDXQLN7FHq6DDf9StMGEjq4xORc75yCm2GOTPRokACAAMyC2RH1PhmxIQ98hDIoMz1nq3t5r3mThVF714L2NdW2KX0QeT2X_KxwVjud5tnG7xvepcHyjFY4A77EKxydvQViv4V73LC9dOMy866MKa9m_14fmwlFy3dpF1tLsfn6cuZT87J0ic1tDLr9i-SvE4fEnAAD__0igXxk) of South Dakota as Senate majority leader on Wednesday, defeating Sen. John Cornyn and Sen. Rick Scott to succeed former leader Mitch McConnell. Thune, [the No. 2 Republican in the Senate](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQAL8GOkfseg2koHivoMu1V1oErwMRhsjmEt3fny79tTPSFPN5mS8hl1xvH2Fj19c2h9jzk2eAAWhA-j-TXNzKjDxKdmBGmCyNCmRyFEOIMK1WqUlrcwUD1l6RljFGRQZkdqiQAIAAlEU8EWlNisawWj0hWEGKl9zbfrq3XHvitXy3J--n2DZZXOr9cYjxn0Av0PfEKZfy6wT61Dau_DoE-oNr6CzQ09ma83Qe3qDtw72lOvT0VXngwrHzItDL3S2PVy4lH9oIUrct5HdU9r8GPB3-BAAA__8MiFvW), has chaired the Senate Republican Policy Committee and served as conference chair. As the Senate GOP whip, he managed operations of the Senate floor after McConnell suffered a concussion in 2023. ## Women Getting a New League of Their Own
The Women's Professional Baseball League announced plans to launch a six-team league for female players in 2026, marking [the first pro league for women](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAQQL_GbETccWAyMLRDtnTtaGE4EipsLJsm6t9X6d7x6S1P7_M6XUOpZb19hIV9z20KsZcHTwASSCK9TySSz8zIWrCHUYNxpBWIuzcqmUSGswFjYmLrtLLZRkjZKTonUTwqJAAgAOUQT0TWkiIdsrMGwQ2kOJXe9tNXK2u_c64_7cH7KbZFVH_vfTsG_TbgZcBL2FZ-Hi_1gr2XWHnAy7MtvB5y25ucw8FzqFVWDrdvlqjQSjYjMjtyEInVHHTG2QJwyDTmc0xi92l7llrLYceB1G0Jpf4F9P-GPDz-BgAA__8pGWBr) since the All-American Girls Professional Baseball League dissolved in 1954. Co-founded by Justine Siegal, [the first woman to coach](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOtCAUhZ9Gu2vggoxTUPx_YTfbbmlAL8oGwQgjmbffzG691WlOzvnyfT6mh_HBx_XD7KSLS5OZi79o4hy4BJT_J9ku2hEhiZY0vwneD1Iw3m7a8PuCgu7CklOz65lTwgmmejlby4e-9RoZSs655JwNiJ2USkkmhXGD6pEPjWS0-JLO7iv5WDZy4ZUuOrs57W3QWylHbsS_BscGx1prN9ucj3SW_G40OO7BNjhGqvk3oKadYobjTGBNJmtCgEBmfRKUBME847yBj4AMFVSCzVwElihCNb74uML7H24MXmTO92p76uWoPgSf1a2RbN2NDz-A5S9hl8bvAAAA__9cUm4J) for an MLB team, the WPBL aims to capitalize on the growing interest in women's sports and is expected to generate $1 billion in global revenue this year. Siegal acknowledged [the recent success](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L9ugzAQgPGngc3Idz4IDB7aIVu6dkT-cw6uDEbYCcrbV-ne_Sd90vd9m28mprjdv8zKuoY8G1fjk2cAASSQPmdqvQ7MyKplDRcF_UhKQrtoBY5tr6y_eDupqSevLE7OWeQQlHRt1CiRAIAA5IjYEQ0DSVImjEOPMDYk2ceaj-4nx60uHNIrP_noXF7bpJda99KojwavDV7P8-yCKdXldTfb620avE6AOALBG-SVtyKsKWxNSiKxuT9YnLtNIpnH5hZR9nzU0h7a72dMKZbh0pC8ryamv2b978FT428AAAD__1FZXuo) of the WNBA and the inaugural season of the Professional Women's Hockey League, stating, "_We 're standing on the shoulders of the success of the other pro leagues"_ to help the WPBL. More than 400 athletes from the U.S., Japan, Canada, and Great Britain have registered to try out so far, reminiscent of the 1992 blockbuster _ [A League of Their Own](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwjAQANCvsTci3_kwZvDQqkqX0rVql-jAZ2JkMEqcIP6-Uvf-wJPe12E4cC75dv7kq4SW6sCnllcZADZAG6TXgXQMSQTFagmws7D1ZA3oMUhMTN4dI-_32x0wRsdwAhdN5KOPSeeABgkACMB4xI7IOTJkOXm3RfCKjMTc6tRdar61UVJ51lWm7lSvuoSxtfus7IvCXmH_rEtbuqMo7P3HeP9Ol_ef9aFsn4TbMomyb_PIk0Q9hXh_5FLy7HaKzPnKufyR7b_iGvA3AAD__8ZGUys)._

clean_body: President-elect Donald Trump on Wednesday, naming Sen. Marco Rubio secretary of state, Tulsi Gabbard director of national intelligence, and Florida Rep. Matt Gaetz attorney general. | | | | | | Thursday, November 14, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1851, Herman Melville's was published. Now hailed as one of the greatest classics of American literature, the novel was initially both a critical and commercial failure. We're excited to announce that next Tuesday marks the launch of our newest state edition, The Tennessee Flyover. This daily digest will cover news across the Volunteer State, Monday through Friday. We are sponsored today by , the non-profit helping Christians in need in Nigeria. | Trump Taps Rubio, Gabbard, and Gaetz President-elect Donald Trump on Wednesday, naming Sen. Marco Rubio secretary of state, Tulsi Gabbard director of national intelligence, and Florida Rep. Matt Gaetz attorney general. Both Rubio and Gabbard were and Trump opponents. Rubio was reported to be on Trump's vice president shortlist, while Gabbard, a former Democratic congresswoman, became an independent in 2022 before joining the GOP last month. Trump's decision to tap Rep. Matt Gaetz as attorney general , given the Florida congressman's polarizing role within the GOP in ousting former Speaker Kevin McCarthy. Gaetz resigned his seat in Congress late Wednesday following the announcement, but some GOP Senators GOP Picks Thune for Senate Majority Leader Republicans elected of South Dakota as Senate majority leader on Wednesday, defeating Sen. John Cornyn and Sen. Rick Scott to succeed former leader Mitch McConnell. Thune, , has chaired the Senate Republican Policy Committee and served as conference chair. As the Senate GOP whip, he managed operations of the Senate floor after McConnell suffered a concussion in 2023. After Wednesday's vote, Thune on President-elect Trump's agenda, stating that "the Republican team is united." Wyoming Sen. John Barrasso won Wednesday to replace Thune as GOP whip after serving six years as Senate GOP conference chair. Women Getting a New League of Their Own The Women's Professional Baseball League announced plans to launch a six-team league for female players in 2026, marking since the All-American Girls Professional Baseball League dissolved in 1954. Co-founded by Justine Siegal, for an MLB team, the WPBL aims to capitalize on the growing interest in women's sports and is expected to generate $1 billion in global revenue this year. Siegal acknowledged of the WNBA and the inaugural season of the Professional Women's Hockey League, stating, "We 're standing on the shoulders of the success of the other pro leagues" to help the WPBL. More than 400 athletes from the U.S., Japan, Canada, and Great Britain have registered to try out so far, reminiscent of the 1992 blockbuster . # Thursday, November 14, 2024
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1954, the _Cuero Record_ published an article [revealing fraud and bribery](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z72urCAUxfGngU7D5kstKG5jN7c9pYHZWyVBmSAZx7c_cfpT_av1S9bPY3r4mOK-_PcbufqZ8ySF1A1AA3pCH9M1aY4uCByAk4NOgenVYAe-Oi2IRDdbOwsUgzdotFL0VEHaEKg3PLobAwANIDvo2h4QVCCDgL3qrWFaEMaaS1tXqvTxx5yu_KbSPvPGk1trfR1M_WNyZHI8z7Otx-rznuJObS4Lk-N31aC_mnDdYXKkvZa7oDQvDl9nTCketmNaLJuP6YvXP9--nfwNAAD__1MhVqY) within the Veterans' Land Program, prompting a multi-agency investigation that resulted in 20 indictments. The _Record '_s reporting earned a Pulitzer Prize. It's a beautiful sunny day! We hope you're enjoying this [fabulous weather](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu4yAQRb_G7rAYwAEXFNuky7ZbWuPMJEaLwTIkJH__lPSvv_fo6Py7zBcMMaT7X9zY19ctz0oqIwAEmJkwxPdsevKLpAl69mA1jE5Pp6lfPUka5U0C2hHQkV4mJ1FN2tkFyVjug__AAMAAKAt2cECgFx4JyGl3GjsjmULNx1BXrvzCcovv_ORjuOatj36tdS-d_tOpc6fOrbUhcSuN-f9n0Knz9yOuOZIoCXfxSIWx5IRRNDw2UXnb-cD6OLiINT9KzUkUTAJTzSlkAZMblTT94WlvIcZQTrYz8r5hiF-J-muVp1c_AQAA___ll2Zs).
