## Trump Appoints Texans To Leadership Roles
President-elect Donald Trump [selected former Texas congressman John Ratcliffe](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGTgyAUBOBfgx2OD1CwoLjGLtde6RDfM3CD4CCJyb-_Sfqrv9mdnf25zBcXYki3b7eRrc81z6ITigNwUDO6EF-zatBeOxyhIQtaQm_kOIyNt6OWpMEoQ1p1PV6hIxyQVjBGOklDE-y7DAAUgNCgWwMI8ko9Ahpphp6pjjDUXNrqqdLTHWt85QeVdslbE62vdT-Y_GJiYmI6z7NdfMnprUxMic6Dicnn-1Fz4p88E5MrNSyRmJgwJxeR13Lf9g8n_pt94sXVJYZ1Jb4Ex2EcQfRyaHe_N8XifoYYwzFoprrb5kL8jKn_vvOw4i8AAP__a3pnhg) on Tuesday to lead the Central Intelligence Agency. Ratcliffe represented several counties in Northeast Texas from 2015 to 2020 before he became Director of National Intelligence in the final months of the first Trump administration. Trump also appointed Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk to [lead the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2u4yAQRp8Gd0QeDDYuKLZxl223tEhmEtACtmASJ29_lfS3_n50dP6d17OPKZb7X5_J8eu2rapXWgJI0Cv6mN6r7tBdepyhIwfTAMYO8zh3wZG-msH0lmaNhLdxhIuxxs6jNf3gle6i-5wBgAZQE0wnCwjDhQwC2sGORuieMPJWTxyI6eXbLb23J9XTdctdcoF5b2L4I9Qi1MKBQkzpkwm1hC1ToaMJtejZ2glAHsGzjE3idifJgWShQyLtvnKmwjI_2n_pC8rqs2-Hz295xJRkIo_yUZDqd8X1kXfpMccSG1fPcStCLV11uH_6sY2T0P09-_iF6fhXc0-nfgIAAP__P7hyRg) with entrepreneur Vivek Ramaswamy. The temporary commission will identify government waste and unnecessary regulations. Trump said he would appoint Musk to an advisory role at an August campaign event, prompting the billionaire to post a photo of himself with a fictional seal for DOGE, saying, "I am willing to serve." Musk said he could [cut up to $2 trillion from the federal budget](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7uO6yAUAL8Gd7Z8eBkKitu4y223tHA4JGh5WIaE5O9X2X770Yzm67JdbIgh3_7bhKa9fNnoTPkIMALfnA3xvfHBmX12GgY0sDAQimmph7tRaJnXV0GV3eWspVgE9VpKz_mOM_ohmI8MADgAXWCZFDhgOwoHTjElBeEzutDKObU7NnzZ6uO7PPGcriUN0dxbOyph_whdCV1771PGXrNtoeRc-ocidD1KDC1cK6ErxpLH9KjfdWznIx2jKzccT5ts7Ta9CV2H07ijhxhDlQvh8y3ZEH9z7c__p6E_AQAA__9Rpl7E). DOGE is an [apparent reference to an internet meme and cryptocurrency](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z71yhCAUxfGngQ7HC6hYUKSx27QpHZSr3gnIjrDr-vaZfLTpz5z__D5u481RoH19dxFteS1plLXUAkCAHr2jcI2aezvVvgeOFjoFjVF92_PN9ko505hZu0kuc1cvskc3zTAv2jglkZP9PgMADSA76CoDHtSEjQdvlGkbpmv0VNJRlQ0LvlxewpWeeFRzijzYrZR7ZuqNyYHJ4TzPanpk2jFn2jP53x2Tg08riogRxUa5pOMSGNIu4iN_ij8PP6y_nxQC5bZjul6jo_CTKf-6n1Z-BQAA__9l_1sW) by the same name, both of which Musk has popularized through frequent social media posts.
## East Texans Oppose Battery Storage Facility
Hundreds of Van Zandt County residents gathered at the Whitton Community Center on Tuesday to voice their opposition to a [planned lithium-ion battery storage facility](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAQRp_GdEYeY_4KF7ehy223RAYPYRSDI3sI4e1XWW275adPOjo6X7fx5ijQfv_vNrT8XuKolTYSQIIZvaNwjabwdlK-hwIttBXUXdU3fbFagL7tKsQJ68b1HpzpdT0ppZyfGzRLQfYDAwADoFtoyw48VBPWHnxXdU0tjEJPHFPJKzK-XV7CFV-YyjluRbAr8zOL6p_Qg9DDeZ7lA_nxOYUedjyz0EOIswvydyTM5HHnLJOjjHKO-4xpz9JN8WC5HHwklIF4pWOTk2PGdMnMMbk7ysXNFIgvoYciWf88KQTKTSuMum-Owo8V_5npZfV3AAAA__8j_m02), citing concerns about the risk of a potential explosion. Taaleri Energia, a Finnish-based renewable energy developer and fund manager, plans to break ground on the project in [late December or early January](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL0OnDAQhJ_GdEaszW_hIg3dpU2JjHfvWMXYJ9iDI08fkT7NNCN9M_p-PaaH58jp9dOv5OT7zJOpTK0BNNQTeo7XVBfo5goHKMhBZ6Hp7dAOxeLagLYmnG1H_Yy2CdhWgbqeGsIWhrZgd8MAoAYwHXRlDwh2pgYBe9u3jaorQpa8lbKQ0Nfvz3jlg7Yy5LWIbhF578r-UGZUZjzPs_wd5bhLZcabrcwIcIdVZjx80n98QtEhf5JceqOdkZLs-sgcSIecAm1p1_eEjiwLf1bNOenZi9B26V3y5l-knz5wZLmUGYvN4fvkGHlvO1VXr9Vz_PdP_ivscOZvAAAA__-7x28T). However, residents have raised concerns about the risks associated with lithium-ion batteries overheating. A petroleum pipeline is located right next to the proposed facility. Fire departments in the area—many staffed by volunteers—are relatively small. Additionally, some residents have expressed concerns that an explosion [could release toxic gases](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2u4yAQRp8Gd2N5MP4rXGzj7m67ZTTAOEEiYMHcON6nX2X7237Fd3TOn6_bF4UY0v03PXmV955vutMGEAHNzVOI1800frWdX7DhFaceh7lfxqV5rCORJXJ6J997Mw6LsROafR_7id2EfRPWzxkiGkQ94dTO6LG3PHj0cz-PgzId-yC5tPJg4TfVPV75xaV1-dnE9SFyVNX_UnpTejvPs3W24tLKS-mNigQXWekt8VmV3mJ2FJXejpKPXNlDDPII30-okgvdGXZyIQa54EUJ_lLyAi5_J7mgUKhcweXkuKQKkqFwDZ6TVKDkYQ-lymc7cvJcPrihQ7Aa9TKgg8XqGcyAI8yzIbCWHGlatB2oKas_zhBjqOOkTHd_Uoj_BeXH4q9V_wsAAP__4VWEjg). “ _It makes me nervous, a lot of the people that live around it, it makes them angry and it scares them_ ,” said opposition organizer David Dunagan.
## Astrodome Redevelopment Plans Revealed
Houston’s Astrodome Conservancy [unveiled a $1 billion redevelopment plan](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOpCAURp8GOybeK6gUFNvYzbZbGvReR7IIRtAZ334z2__t9yUnJ-fPc3w6H3x8_XYb2_JZ0og1KgkgQY3kfLhHVZGdajJQsYWuAd03pjXVag2olgyopu81Gq0cOjbKdLSQnsi0lbdfGAAoAOyge_RA0EysCahv-lYLVTP5ko5HWbnwx-Ul3Oni4zGnrQp2LWXPovklcBA4uGmG5vsIHPaUy3fK5UiUNpZzipmPy8X5lme82AcJk9yDi3I5y3mw9HOKfpZrOnNJUQYXaXPHX_lmipzJ3QIH0FphhyhwqA5L-9uH4HPbCVW_NufDf6_yY6jL4r8AAAD__7FsawA) to transform the historic structure into a multipurpose space with four modern buildings, a retail village, and a central boulevard inspired by New York’s High Line. When it opened in 1965, the Astrodome was dubbed the “Eighth Wonder of the World.” It was the longtime home of the Astros and Oilers. It hosted a Muhammad Ali fight, the famous Battle of the Sexes tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs, and performances by Elvis, Pink Floyd, and Madonna. In 2005, it housed [up to 25,000 Hurricane Katrina refugees](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uhSAUAOCnge0azxH5GRi6uN2uHc1BUElQboDY69s37d4X-JLv6zk_KaZ4bp90BNvea56xR_EAeICYPcV0z4J763pvgAcLaoBRD0YavtsRnQsrKgLjDCoi9FpoAieVEmgkj_YXAwABgApUp8HD4MLowetBy5GJPvjYcunaHlp4U13Tna9QuiUfPNm9tVdlwwfDieFEtZXs8xGWfNZQLjqXu8tlYzjtsbZcboYTL9a_vmNKsUrFRL8dFNMf1_79XRZ_AgAA__-zd1Ko). Closed to the public since 2009, the Astrodome is structurally sound, asbestos-free, and paid off. The Conservancy hopes to [raise up to $750 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPhCAUhH8NdhrfA0ULimvs9torDSvPhQSBALfu_vuL2183yWQmX76f23rTzrvw-NYHqfra44o9ihagBbEa7fx7FY1R997M0JACyWGY-DzOjVWcSAxGSrmLfcOpRyLAcec0aCLYx8ap6wwABABKkN0EBvidBgNm4tM4MNGTcTXmrlqq9NJl9-_4pNxt8Wi8srWmwvgXw4Xhcp5nt9kcw9UyXAKdheFi42-pMbSfPcNF5-o2T1cqNUcTD2oNPcnHdFCobfI6tDDPgOMgu2RTk5VJp_PelVEy0T8O7fyHoP6r5KnwLwAA__9-ZmRU) from private sources to minimize the burden on taxpayers.

| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80LvOnDAQhuGrMd0ijw9gCheRVttt2pTIMANYsg2yvae7j9gqTf56Ho30fn_u49354NP620Wy9b3so-BCXQAuoEZ0PnxG1aCdOA7QkIVegjZy6IZms7xbcCKzDNIARzMPAvSiUWjR0aQcNt6ezwBAAYge-tYAgpxII6CRptNMcUJf99zWjSq9XVnCZ39Sbuc9NsFutR6FyV9M3Ji4-fSkUttEr-IOT2mmk503eXvUOJb9kWdi8oox_4OCS-jTeriVmOhOGAn9IzJ5PVyuiXLZ_AGGXxTvx285E11NLlL5wYygJEgAYbRussXj5UPwpeuZ4mt0Pnwb6n9HfVrxNwAA__8kaXhp) **The Last Step in AI: Why New Sapience Outpaces Big Tech** Big Tech is searching for the next step in AI, but New Sapience is delivering the last step: [Synthetic Intelligence that learns, understands, and interacts like a human.](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80LvOnDAQhuGrMd0ijw9gCheRVttt2pTIMANYsg2yvae7j9gqTf56Ho30fn_u49354NP620Wy9b3so-BCXQAuoEZ0PnxG1aCdOA7QkIVegjZy6IZms7xbcCKzDNIARzMPAvSiUWjR0aQcNt6ezwBAAYge-tYAgpxII6CRptNMcUJf99zWjSq9XVnCZ39Sbuc9NsFutR6FyV9M3Ji4-fSkUttEr-IOT2mmk503eXvUOJb9kWdi8oox_4OCS-jTeriVmOhOGAn9IzJ5PVyuiXLZ_AGGXxTvx285E11NLlL5wYygJEgAYbRussXj5UPwpeuZ4mt0Pnwb6n9HfVrxNwAA__8kaXhp) Platforms like ChatGPT rely on massive, expensive supercomputers and regurgitate information without true comprehension. [New Sapience’s patented technology](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80LvOnDAQhuGrMd0ijw9gCheRVttt2pTIMANYsg2yvae7j9gqTf56Ho30fn_u49354NP620Wy9b3so-BCXQAuoEZ0PnxG1aCdOA7QkIVegjZy6IZms7xbcCKzDNIARzMPAvSiUWjR0aQcNt6ezwBAAYge-tYAgpxII6CRptNMcUJf99zWjSq9XVnCZ39Sbuc9NsFutR6FyV9M3Ji4-fSkUttEr-IOT2mmk503eXvUOJb9kWdi8oox_4OCS-jTeriVmOhOGAn9IzJ5PVyuiXLZ_AGGXxTvx285E11NLlL5wYygJEgAYbRussXj5UPwpeuZ4mt0Pnwb6n9HfVrxNwAA__8kaXhp) is fundamentally different. Why is New Sapience better?
* Learns and comprehends like a human
* Doesn't have bias or misinformation
* Doesn't steal data from creators

Ratcliffe represented several counties in Northeast Texas from 2015 to 2020 before he became Director of National Intelligence in the final months of the first Trump administration. Trump also appointed Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk to with entrepreneur Vivek Ramaswamy. The temporary commission will identify government waste and unnecessary regulations. Trump said he would appoint Musk to an advisory role at an August campaign event, prompting the billionaire to post a photo of himself with a fictional seal for DOGE, saying, "I am willing to serve." Musk said he could . DOGE is an by the same name, both of which Musk has popularized through frequent social media posts. East Texans Oppose Battery Storage Facility Hundreds of Van Zandt County residents gathered at the Whitton Community Center on Tuesday to voice their opposition to a , citing concerns about the risk of a potential explosion. Taaleri Energia, a Finnish-based renewable energy developer and fund manager, plans to break ground on the project in . However, residents have raised concerns about the risks associated with lithium-ion batteries overheating. A petroleum pipeline is located right next to the proposed facility. Fire departments in the area—many staffed by volunteers—are relatively small. Additionally, some residents have expressed concerns that an explosion . “ It makes me nervous, a lot of the people that live around it, it makes them angry and it scares them ,” said opposition organizer David Dunagan. Astrodome Redevelopment Plans Revealed Houston’s Astrodome Conservancy to transform the historic structure into a multipurpose space with four modern buildings, a retail village, and a central boulevard inspired by New York’s High Line. When it opened in 1965, the Astrodome was dubbed the “Eighth Wonder of the World.” It was the longtime home of the Astros and Oilers. It hosted a Muhammad Ali fight, the famous Battle of the Sexes tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs, and performances by Elvis, Pink Floyd, and Madonna. In 2005, it housed . Closed to the public since 2009, the Astrodome is structurally sound, asbestos-free, and paid off. The Conservancy hopes to from private sources to minimize the burden on taxpayers. name: Rand Paul
subject: Have they all forgotten how the economy works?S
body:
The Foundation for Economic Education’s (FEE) high school students know more about basic economics and math than Joe Biden

|
---
| | [](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkLuK5DAURL9Gzmx09XQHChYaZ73phuJakt1a9DCyPMP8_dANk09WVEHVof497ANjimX_izmYlm07bT263UKwmNK41bbXbhllYgQYQVg-eKNuTM8wBAOag7xRqejwNFyiX7lXQt3UHJT2cmUgnKSrdtsscYjm1QMAAkBowSeEDeYNpdYrxdUJImgLx7Wm6LBk_F9b7F9TCX1I5tn7cRL-h7CFsOUM7mphwhJ87ZOrmbBlq1fx2GMtL-wxuFpqjm4M_nJvm7DlwBHdW_Pl6tk6zAfGvRB-_2EjTL2TWnoonfB7y0Mz_viMKcVTaSLonjGm1-rQf_nZh2HfAQAA__-wcHVS) Friend,

Biden, Pelosi, and AOC all seem to have forgotten anything they learned in an economics class... or even basic 8th-grade math classes.

Do you see the horrific ideas coming out of Washington D.C.?
* Raising the minimum wage to $20+
* Passing over $3 Trillion budgets
* Allowing inflation to destroy the value of the dollar
* They’ve even proposed minting a “$1 Trillion coin” to fund the budget...

These ideas are not only madness but economic suicide.**The Foundation for Economic Education’s (FEE) high school students know more about basic economics and math than Joe Biden (and they can stay awake during class)!**

FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility. Their flagship program,**“FEE In the Classroom”** is teaching students these important lessons and values in order to save our Republic from socialism.

**Make no mistake:** If AOC had attended a FEE In the Classroom seminar we would not be in this mess.

[Which is why I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkLuK5DAURL9Gzmx09XQHChYaZ73phuJakt1a9DCyPMP8_dANk09WVEHVof497ANjimX_izmYlm07bT263UKwmNK41bbXbhllYgQYQVg-eKNuTM8wBAOag7xRqejwNFyiX7lXQt3UHJT2cmUgnKSrdtsscYjm1QMAAkBowSeEDeYNpdYrxdUJImgLx7Wm6LBk_F9b7F9TCX1I5tn7cRL-h7CFsOUM7mphwhJ87ZOrmbBlq1fx2GMtL-wxuFpqjm4M_nJvm7DlwBHdW_Pl6tk6zAfGvRB-_2EjTL2TWnoonfB7y0Mz_viMKcVTaSLonjGm1-rQf_nZh2HfAQAA__-wcHVS)

_You and I will never win unless we reach young people with our message_.

The truth is we have an uphill battle ahead of us.

Big government, Critical Race Theory, radical activists, and cancel culture have all played a part to indoctrinate our country’s youth inside the classroom.

But I am optimistic and fully believe FEE can turn the tide against socialism in the classroom. [](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkLuK5DAURL9Gzmx09XQHChYaZ73phuJakt1a9DCyPMP8_dANk09WVEHVof497ANjimX_izmYlm07bT263UKwmNK41bbXbhllYgQYQVg-eKNuTM8wBAOag7xRqejwNFyiX7lXQt3UHJT2cmUgnKSrdtsscYjm1QMAAkBowSeEDeYNpdYrxdUJImgLx7Wm6LBk_F9b7F9TCX1I5tn7cRL-h7CFsOUM7mphwhJ87ZOrmbBlq1fx2GMtL-wxuFpqjm4M_nJvm7DlwBHdW_Pl6tk6zAfGvRB-_2EjTL2TWnoonfB7y0Mz_viMKcVTaSLonjGm1-rQf_nZh2HfAQAA__-wcHVS)
When young people hear our message it resonates with them.
* Young people want to be free and independent
* Entrepreneurship and problem-solving are appealing to young high school and college students
* Privacy and individual liberty are important to younger generations
* Our country’s youth want fulfilling and well-paying jobs... Well, you’re not going to get that with socialism

**DO NOT give up on young people. **

We can win hearts and minds. And that’s exactly what FEE is doing with FEE In the Classroom.

FEE students are among the brightest men and women I meet. In fact, I’ve even had FEE staff testify in front of Congress and some former FEE students have worked in my office or on my campaigns.

[I am inviting you to support the Foundation for Economic Education by making a donation of $10, $20.24, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkLuK5DAURL9Gzmx09XQHChYaZ73phuJakt1a9DCyPMP8_dANk09WVEHVof497ANjimX_izmYlm07bT263UKwmNK41bbXbhllYgQYQVg-eKNuTM8wBAOag7xRqejwNFyiX7lXQt3UHJT2cmUgnKSrdtsscYjm1QMAAkBowSeEDeYNpdYrxdUJImgLx7Wm6LBk_F9b7F9TCX1I5tn7cRL-h7CFsOUM7mphwhJ87ZOrmbBlq1fx2GMtL-wxuFpqjm4M_nJvm7DlwBHdW_Pl6tk6zAfGvRB-_2EjTL2TWnoonfB7y0Mz_viMKcVTaSLonjGm1-rQf_nZh2HfAQAA__-wcHVS)

clean_body: The Foundation for Economic Education’s (FEE) high school students know more about basic economics and math than Joe Biden | | | Friend, Biden, Pelosi, and AOC all seem to have forgotten anything they learned in an economics class... or even basic 8th-grade math classes. Do you see the horrific ideas coming out of Washington D.C.? Raising the minimum wage to $20+ Passing over $3 Trillion budgets Allowing inflation to destroy the value of the dollar They’ve even proposed minting a “$1 Trillion coin” to fund the budget... These ideas are not only madness but economic suicide.The Foundation for Economic Education’s (FEE) high school students know more about basic economics and math than Joe Biden (and they can stay awake during class)! FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility. Their flagship program,“FEE In the Classroom” is teaching students these important lessons and values in order to save our Republic from socialism. Make no mistake: If AOC had attended a FEE In the Classroom seminar we would not be in this mess. You and I will never win unless we reach young people with our message. The truth is we have an uphill battle ahead of us. Big government, Critical Race Theory, radical activists, and cancel culture have all played a part to indoctrinate our country’s youth inside the classroom. But I am optimistic and fully believe FEE can turn the tide against socialism in the classroom. When young people hear our message it resonates with them. Young people want to be free and independent Entrepreneurship and problem-solving are appealing to young high school and college students Privacy and individual liberty are important to younger generations Our country’s youth want fulfilling and well-paying jobs... Well, you’re not going to get that with socialism DO NOT give up on young people. We can win hearts and minds. And that’s exactly what FEE is doing with FEE In the Classroom. FEE students are among the brightest men and women I meet. In fact, I’ve even had FEE staff testify in front of Congress and some former FEE students have worked in my office or on my campaigns. I am asking you to make a long-term investment in the future of our Republic. FEE’s students learn the ideas of liberty, free enterprise, the principles of our Founding Fathers, and have an impact on our culture and public policy process. But it takes time. The organization was founded in 1946 and rose to prominence during the Cold War. FEE served as the greatest voice for the ideas of liberty in this time and influenced many leaders such as Ronald Reagan and Margaret Thatcher. The ideas of liberty defeated communism and we can win again against the rising tide of socialism in the classroom. But I need your help. Thank you, Senator Rand Paul FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law. name: Mattea Mrkusic, Evergreen
subject: Act now to Trump-proof climate progress
body:
Tell President Biden to deny six LNG projects while he still can
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3031664/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi there,

I know these are difficult times, and I hope you're doing what you need to take care of yourself and your community. **I hope you can take one minute right now to help with the urgent work of Trump-proofing some critical climate progress.
**
Now that we're just _two months away_ from handing over the keys to a fascist who believes the climate crisis is a "hoax," President Biden must act fast to cement his strong climate legacy.

Number one on his to-do list should be working with the Department of Energy (DOE) to conclusively determine that liquefied "natural" gas (LNG) exports are not in the public interest and quickly denying six pending export authorizations for six super-polluting gas projects that would poison frontline communities.

[**Send a message to President Biden right now to stop these six super polluter projects while we still can.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3031665/87SdQ4wZ) |
[](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3031666/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| We know that LNG presents a massive threat to our climate, public health, and economy. Just last month, over half a million people submitted comments to DOE, asking for an end to LNG expansion, which sacrifices our collective future in favor of the short-term profits for a select few.

Throughout his presidency, President Biden has shown his willingness to listen to the people most affected and knowledgeable when making policy decisions—whether they are scientists, frontline and environmental justice leaders, or healthcare professionals. **As he closes out his term, he should heed the will of the country and do what's best to secure wins for the long haul— _regardless of who is in office._**

The task of preserving our democracy, values, and a safer climate future from a Trump administration will no doubt be challenging and will require a movement-wide effort that goes beyond these next few months. **But President Biden can set the stage to help us succeed if we get loud enough.**[**Tell him to finish the job ASAP on LNG.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3031667/87SdQ4wZ)

Thanks for raising your voice in this critical moment, |
---
| | |
---
### Mattea Mrkusic
Senior Policy Lead
Evergreen Collaborative
---
---
| **P.S.** If you want to learn more about why LNG should be the Biden administration's #1 climate priority until January, [**check out our latest blog.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3031668/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3031669/87SdQ4wZ)

| | | | **Trump's Win: Your Financial Game Plan for the Next 4 Years**
---
**Trump's Win: Your Financial Game Plan for the Next 4 Years**
| | Donald Trump's return is a cause for celebration, but [there's something important you must remember](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ad5471a1aa242efaa9eba30410e21eb&_e=x4WYPUNYp4htxJb_lajXyVj5HDEHDYnxEftV6gWA2-MPVUHqPi_AQ5WpQk67mIgrgYJpRoN4WYutDqvh_KuCLAfYYqm3iL7McdaWtOs0QvfKko-gV5XpQZfvpZ4xVNqfSFQpoqYzXR-dcf4Fn44AiPdswA3pCFjA6Jwp2DRFB6aTIek77dGYXXdkDYzhg3ze-v1sQVKXE8ggQN8iGHePLK5iDGqrDNYnm-iPufVp2xCzsGjAtloFlrR3yKummra1qanvWzEAbHiKmOB1ajE4O-X8HDcZWCKeE_HFdcILaFHMtoekT-4jCNYZ2U5Tx6JDWgLcENzD5kO6cmwqxP8VlsKjsr-rwuQ5fW9CSYQ03kIyLfiJWZ2yQ4Y8F1FLHuTly0E8bfJS7aRslnTnj8vVcA%3D%3D). The road to economic recovery will be long and challenging. Why? Because President-elect Trump inherits a nation facing **significant economic problems:** 1\. A national debt exceeding $35 trillion and still growing
2\. Inflation that has eroded a chunk of the dollar's purchasing power
3\. A weakened American position on the global stage
4\. Growing support for socialism among young people While Trump's policies aim to address these issues, change won't happen overnight. In fact, **it might take _decades_ to reverse the damage**. Which means now, more than ever, it's critical for your savings to be diversified so that you can weather the ups and downs of economic recovery. This is why savvy Americans are turning to precious metals. And a Gold IRA can protect your IRA or 401(k) in a **tax-sheltered account** , regardless of market fluctuations or policy changes.

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 11/14/2024
body:
‘We only needed to flip three seats’: In House District 16, Keltie leads and is working to keep it that way
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Today, we’re taking a look at [Keltie’s lead](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in House District 16 and [Dan Woog expanding his lead](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in District 19, as Republicans continue to defend critical seats and push back against a Democrat supermajority. We’re also discussing Mesa County’s vote to approve [Measures 4A and 4B](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), promising new school upgrades and transparency for local families. On a national level, Turning Point Action’s [ballot-chasing operations](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) proved instrumental in driving conservative votes, and get a glimpse inside the historic White House meeting between Biden and Trump.
Also, we have some great RMV original commentaries for you below: ➡️ [Kalam: How Denver became a city of plywood and hollow plinths](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) ➡️ [Walcher: Who decides what’s a public road?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) ➡️ [Sloan: The conservative’s duty in a second Trump presidency](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) ****
**🇺🇸 Update on Trump's latest appointments:** President-elect Trump’s new appointments emphasize a strong conservative direction, naming Tulsi Gabbard as [Director of National Intelligence](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), Marco Rubio as his pick for [Secretary of State](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), Matt Gaetz as [Attorney General](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), Pete Hegseth as [Secretary of Defense](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to lead the new [Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and John Ratcliffe to [lead the CIA](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). On a separate note, Sen. John Thune (R-S.D.) has been [elected Senate majority leader](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), succeeding retiring Sen. Mitch McConnell (R-Ky.), who led Senate GOP leadership for 18 years.
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, November 14, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[‘We only needed to flip three seats’: In House District 16, Keltie leads and is working to keep it that way](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
The final act of a mother’s life has come to symbolize the stakes in Colorado’s House District 16 race.
A late mother’s son ensured his mother’s ballot was cured, honoring her final wish to participate in the electoral process.
“She saw herself as a patriotic American,” said Rebecca Keltie, the House District 16 Republican candidate. “That was her last act on Earth, and it touches my heart to know she voted for me. It’s humbling.”
In one of the last two uncalled Colorado House races, the story highlights the weight of every vote.
As of today, Keltie leads incumbent Democrat Steph Vigil by 21 votes. The razor-thin margin triggers an automatic recount per state law. With a midnight Wednesday, Nov. 13, deadline to cure ballots, Keltie and her team are working non-stop to count every eligible vote, she said Wednesday.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Update: Republican Dan Woog expands lead in tight House District 19 overnight](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Republican Dan Woog has expanded his lead in Colorado's House District 19, now leading by 228 votes over Democrat Jillaire McMillan, with his margin increasing overnight.
* In a close House District 16 race, Republican Rebecca Keltie holds a narrow lead over Democrat Steph Vigil, with only 21 votes separating them, potentially triggering an automatic recount if the margin remains under 0.5%.
* With Ryan Gonzalez's recent win in House District 50, Colorado Republicans have gained one seat and now look to secure Districts 16 and 19 to prevent a Democratic supermajority in the Colorado House.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Mesa County voters approve measures 4A and 4B for schools, promising upgrades, transparency](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Mesa County voters passed measures 4A and 4B with strong majorities, securing funds for school renovations, safety improvements, and additional educational resources.
* The measures aim to make schools more accessible, especially for students with disabilities, and establish transparent tracking of spending and progress through a public online platform.
* The updates funded by these measures will not only enhance the learning environment but are also expected to make the area more attractive to businesses and families considering relocation.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Biden hosts Trump at White House in first sign of transition after election win](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [WASHINGTON EXAMINER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* President Joe Biden met with President-elect Donald Trump today at the White House following Trump’s victory in the recent election.
* Biden expressed a commitment to ensuring a smooth transition of power, as did Trump. This meeting marks a shift from 2020, as Trump did not extend a similar invitation to Biden following Biden’s election win.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Ballot chasing operations led by Turning Point Action made difference in 2024 election](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [BREITBART](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Turning Point Action’s ballot-chasing operations in key swing states, particularly Arizona and Wisconsin, were crucial in helping Donald Trump secure victories in the 2024 presidential election by mobilizing low-propensity voters.
* In addition to the presidential race, Turning Point's efforts contributed to Republican wins in competitive congressional districts, including Michigan's seventh district and Arizona’s district for Rep. Juan Ciscomani, where ballot-chasing efforts exceeded the final margins of victory.
* Led by Charlie Kirk and involving thousands of staff and volunteers, Turning Point Action collaborated with other groups, effectively increasing conservative turnout and possibly impacting the Republican majority in the House.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Kalam: How Denver became a city of plywood and hollow plinths](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY AHNAF KALAM, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_In the heart of Denver, what once stood as a mosaic of statuesque history and pride has become a city of empty plinths, iron bolts and plywood cover-ups—monuments, not to the past, but to a peculiar present._ ___The city, known for the quiet dignity of its Pioneer Monument, Civil War memorials and an enduring homage to figures of historic Colorado, has found itself sacrificing the aesthetic that once conveyed its cultural soul. In a surge of post-George Floyd “anti-racism,” Denver’s leaders have erased long-standing symbols, replacing artful bronzework with exposed screws and fenced-off pedestals. Denver, it seems, has become a city obsessed with forgetting._

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Walcher: Who decides what’s a public road?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY GREG WALCHER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_Several years ago, Utah filed a suit insisting that the federal government turn over to the state 12,000 roads that cross federal lands within Utah. Few officials noticed, as disputes over who controls public roads on federal lands are nothing new. But the federal judge hearing this case just sent shock waves through Washington with an 80-page ruling containing an analysis worthy of the highest court, refusing to dismiss the case, and excoriating the government for trying to thwart the clear intent of the law._ ___It is at least the 10th time in recent memory that federal courts reigned in federal agencies asserting absolute authority over public roads across public lands._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Sloan: The conservative’s duty in a second Trump presidency](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY KELLY SLOAN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_We are now a week past election day, and it is time for a bit of circumspection._
_Donald Trump won, convincingly, both the electoral college and the popular vote. He is due his victory lap, as are Republicans in general, after having endured months of being called every rotten thing in the book. And yes, there is, in that vein, some amusement to be had at the expense of those on the left who are –- to put it mildly — not handling the results well._ __
_But schadenfreude is an emotion best indulged in small doses, lest it eventually corrupts the soul. The Democrats are forced to undergo a considerable degree of introspection as they travel their post-election “Via Dolorsa”. But conservatives too, after the celebratory fireworks have subsided, need to take a step back and review the scene with a critical and unyielding eye to hold the second Trump administration accountable, not only to deliver on the beneficial items promised, but to offer a check on populist impulses that could divert from the path._

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---

**[Northwest Colorado open to prospect of nuclear power generation, survey says](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY LINDY BROWNING | STATE | NOVEMBER 12** _With the impending closure of the Craig and Hayden Power Stations, the closing of the coal mines in Northwest Colorado and the state and federal push to rid the area of traditional fossil fuel base load generation, Rio Blanco, Moffat, and Routt county governments are trying to figure out how to replace the imminent job loss, revenue loss and tax loss that are certain to devastate their local governments and the residents in those communities that have relied on a fossil fuel economy for decades._
[**‘Uncle Benny’ urges Republicans to change approach to down-ballot funding**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) **BY BRIAN PORTER | STATE |****NOVEMBER 12** _With the outcome of a few races still in doubt Monday morning, Republican Ben Aste was already focused on the next one. Aste, the man who ran as “Uncle Benny” for the Larimer County District 3 seat, proposed a new approach to campaign funding, on a Republican call with several candidates and former Sen. Kevin Lundberg, that he hopes might gain some support._

We’re also discussing Mesa County’s vote to approve , promising new school upgrades and transparency for local families. On a national level, Turning Point Action’s proved instrumental in driving conservative votes, and get a glimpse inside the historic White House meeting between Biden and Trump. Also, we have some great RMV original commentaries for you below: ➡️ ➡️ ➡️ ** 🇺🇸 Update on Trump's latest appointments: President-elect Trump’s new appointments emphasize a strong conservative direction, naming Tulsi Gabbard as , Marco Rubio as his pick for , Matt Gaetz as , Pete Hegseth as , Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to lead the new , and John Ratcliffe to . On a separate note, Sen. John Thune (R-S.D.) has been , succeeding retiring Sen. Mitch McConnell (R-Ky.), who led Senate GOP leadership for 18 years. This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, November 14, 2024. – Heidi Ganahl | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY JEN SCHUMANN, The final act of a mother’s life has come to symbolize the stakes in Colorado’s House District 16 race. A late mother’s son ensured his mother’s ballot was cured, honoring her final wish to participate in the electoral process. “She saw herself as a patriotic American,” said Rebecca Keltie, the House District 16 Republican candidate. “That was her last act on Earth, and it touches my heart to know she voted for me. It’s humbling.” In one of the last two uncalled Colorado House races, the story highlights the weight of every vote. As of today, Keltie leads incumbent Democrat Steph Vigil by 21 votes. The razor-thin margin triggers an automatic recount per state law. With a midnight Wednesday, Nov. 13, deadline to cure ballots, Keltie and her team are working non-stop to count every eligible vote, she said Wednesday. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. With Ryan Gonzalez's recent win in House District 50, Colorado Republicans have gained one seat and now look to secure Districts 16 and 19 to prevent a Democratic supermajority in the Colorado House. | Mesa County voters passed measures 4A and 4B with strong majorities, securing funds for school renovations, safety improvements, and additional educational resources. The measures aim to make schools more accessible, especially for students with disabilities, and establish transparent tracking of spending and progress through a public online platform. name: Haneefah
subject: Mike Schmuhl - Indiana Democratic Party Chair - Call for Resignation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah _
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
#### Announcement
# Dear Hoosiers,
**Shortly after the presidential election, I was just as disappointed as you were. The DNC Chair Jaime Harrison announced he will not seek renomination, and it is my opinion that neither should our state party leader, Mike Schmuhl.

It will be sad to see Jaime go because he was a hard worker, but respectfully, I have no regrets if Schmuhl leaves us. ** **Like many of you, I am not only disappointed in the election results, but I am also disappointed in our state party leadership.

For far too long, Democrats in Indiana have faced a streak of losses created by people with the same energy as Schmuhl who just aren’t angry enough or calculated enough to make any real changes. ** **Even worse, I'm afraid our party has been infiltrated by fake Democrats, old ones who have lost vision, and new ones who don’t appreciate our long-term vision or goals.

Need examples?

New Democrats like Jennifer McCormick who voted for Trump in the 2016 election and became a Dem for revenge or Mayor Tom McDermott of Hammond who became a Dem because it was convenient for him, should never have been allowed to lead our party ticket! ** **Because of a lack of strong party leadership and accountability, we now have to sit here and watch a racist narcissist (Trump) fall into hole after hole as he implements[Agenda 47](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=e726575db0&e=a49cb82bb3) ****that will never work for the American people!

Banks (Indiana’s newest U.S. Senate-Elect) is nothing but a Trump foot soldier marching to the sound of everything that comes out of Trump’s mouth instead of coming up with his own original plans or ideas. ** **_COME MARCH 2025...NO MORE SMILES, HANDSHAKES AND GRINS! WE MEAN BUSINESS!_** **I’m calling on new, sharp minds across the State of Indiana to consider running for state party leadership now! Share this newsletter with someone you know.

We NEED people that won’t be afraid to start a fire, clap back, and dare this Trump administration to try something in Indiana. I know the talent is here. _Will you join me in the search?_

We need party leaders who demand fair press coverage and do more than just make social media posts! We need party leaders who take action and won't take no for an answer. ** **_DID WE GET WHAT WE DESERVED WITH THE ELECTION RESULTS?_ ** **Schmuhl is a weak leader just like his predecessor!

Plain and simple.

He lacks courage to confront Indiana’s Republican party or hold them accountable for anything they do.

Each year we sit by as they dance around and play in our faces like a bunch of misbehaving children! ** **If you’re like me, you refuse to accept another decade streak of losses like we did with Zody and that means a changing of the guard.

We need someone who can carry this Democratic torch and carry it high!**

_**WE GAVE HIM A CHANCE!**_ **In 2021, soon after Schmuhl’s election, we gave him a solid chance. ** **We all waited anxiously for him to do something. Anything. We gave him money, ideas, constructive criticisms, and ammunition to create a better, more robust party.

We sent him letters, emails, made phone calls, requested meetings, etc. He listened...a little, but ultimately did absolutely nothing. It's just mind-boggling. ** **Schmuhl allowed nonsense to play out again and again and refused to take action when necessary on a number of issues, ranging from allowing great candidates to be knocked off the ballot to not fulfilling his responsibilities to statewide candidates. ** __**Heavy is the head that wears the crown! **__ **Schmuhl knew what a great responsibility he was taking on as a state party leader. He knew it would take constant 24/7 work, but instead, he told himself it wouldn’t take that much, and now here we all are standing at the gates of hell.

Schmuhl hasn't been clear or transparent about any of his work or what he is doing. He doesn't even give us progress reports. **

**If you donate to the Indiana Democratic Party and its candidates like me, then it's okay to respectfully demand results and see where our money is going! ** __**THE RED WAVE**__ **The red wave was preventable, but it happened because our state party didn’t do its part in setting up strong enough communications. ** **One of the biggest mistakes Schmuhl made was being afraid to aggressively make a push for newcomers like Valerie McCray. McCray was the first African American to successfully meet ballot requirements. Schmuhl had the audacity to be preoccupied with old Democrats instead, such as Joe Donnelly. ** **We all respect Joe, but our party needs to focus on new people now!**

**It was unbelievable and embarrassing to watch how this qualified woman (McCray) had to beg for press coverage and seating at the DNC Convention when Banks was the headliner at the RNC Convention! ** _**Schmuhl does not rise to the occasion or respond to the need for a party revival! **_ **Let's be honest. Our state conventions and gatherings are boring. We all fall asleep there. It's Schmuhl's responsibility to keep us engaged and that ain't happened in years!

Aside from being an intern, working at a few news stations, and who he knew giving him a chance to run a now lost and forgotten presidential campaign, _Schmuhl is unqualified for the position he holds._ ** **Mark my words!

If he remains in this role as-is, the only thing we can look forward to is more party deterioration and more losses.

We will keep the same pattern of losing time after time and the same sad email at the end of it all sharing how “well we did” when we know we were trash. ** **One thing we know for sure with Schmuhl: 2024 looked alot like 2022! 2028 will look alot like 2024, and 2030 will be the same as 2028! **

_**Oh, you thought I was finished? I'm just getting started. **_ **_THE BUCK STOPS HERE!_ ** **It’s no secret. The Indiana Republican party has had the Indiana Democratic Party by the balls for decades.

We're giving them the time of their lives! ** **Republicans choose Democratic candidates most likely to be the next bouncy balls in the next general election. Backroom door deals and using Indiana’s outdated signature collection process system is sure to keep strong Democratic candidates out each time. ** **When Republicans see a strong candidate who is a real life threat to their party, they go to great lengths to find weak Dems, such as Jennifer McCormick, Terry Goodin, and the like. ** **Need proof? Both McDermott (2022 U.S. Senate Race) and McCormick (2024 Gubernatorial Race) eagerly filed challenges against long-time fellow Democrats to avoid a primary instead of doing the right thing and running alongside them in the spirit of unity. ** **Each of the candidates they filed challenges against were making history, but they didn’t care. Not surprisingly, they each lost their campaigns. ** _**It isn't rocket science! Such acts that waste our time could've easily been avoided if Schmuhl had properly advised the candidates. **_ **The Indiana Democratic Party is a joke as long as Schmuhl remains in power.

Schmuhl is the reason why Hoosier Democrats think Young (Indiana U.S. Senator) is better than Banks when they are equally as bad! ** **Being more silent or docile (as in this case with Senator Young) doesn’t make you better! Make no mistake about it. Young is silently killing us all behind close doors with his votes and policies just as much as Banks! ** _**Hoosiers, please! Don't you get it? **_ **Young is excited the Trump-backed Banks won his senate race so Indiana Democrats can flock to Young and talk about how grateful we are for him so he can easily win reelection in 2028.

If this party leadership doesn’t change now, you can bet Banks’ election has positioned Young to win again in 2028 because after all, we’re supposed to believe Young is so much better than Banks, right? ** _**TRUMP IS MOVING FAST! WE NEED TO MOVE FASTER! **_ **We've heard it all before. Insanity is doing the same thing over and over again and trusting the same people to do better things for us. **

_**We need someone in position who can keep pace with reality.**_ **Like many of you, I was happy to see a new face when Schmuhl came aboard in 2021, but I was quickly disappointed by a lack of innovation and accountability.

Strangely enough, I felt somewhat supported by Schmuhl in the 2022 senate campaign, but again, I was saddened by his refusal to address internal party problems and conflicts. ** **We all sat and watched him do things we disagreed with. We observed his strange silence. We quietly shook our heads, but never said a word.

But now is the time.

Enough is enough. ** **Mr. Schmuhl, ** **Respectfully, while I appreciate the time we spent together, and I respect you as a person, no one should have to tell you how to do your job. ** **It’s been three years now since you assumed your post. That’s more than enough time to develop a plan of execution and give Hoosier Democrats, Independents, and the Undecided hope. ** **You said you wanted the job. You got it and did nothing with it. ** **It’s my duty, as your fellow Democrat, to hold you accountable.

I present to you an opportunity to get it together now or resign.

It's just that simple. ** **Lead our party with a plan and a voice or step aside and let someone who can. ** **Respectfully Yours, ** **Haneefah Khaaliq, ESQ. ** **Former Indiana U.S. Senate Candidate ** **haneefahkhaaliq.org **

McCray was the first African American to successfully meet ballot requirements. Schmuhl had the audacity to be preoccupied with old Democrats instead, such as Joe Donnelly. We all respect Joe, but our party needs to focus on new people now! It was unbelievable and embarrassing to watch how this qualified woman (McCray) had to beg for press coverage and seating at the DNC Convention when Banks was the headliner at the RNC Convention! Schmuhl does not rise to the occasion or respond to the need for a party revival! Let's be honest. Our state conventions and gatherings are boring. We all fall asleep there. It's Schmuhl's responsibility to keep us engaged and that ain't happened in years! Aside from being an intern, working at a few news stations, and who he knew giving him a chance to run a now lost and forgotten presidential campaign, Schmuhl is unqualified for the position he holds. Mark my words! If he remains in this role as-is, the only thing we can look forward to is more party deterioration and more losses. We will keep the same pattern of losing time after time and the same sad email at the end of it all sharing how “well we did” when we know we were trash. One thing we know for sure with Schmuhl: 2024 looked alot like 2022! 2028 will look alot like 2024, and 2030 will be the same as 2028! Oh, you thought I was finished? I'm just getting started. THE BUCK STOPS HERE! It’s no secret. The Indiana Republican party has had the Indiana Democratic Party by the balls for decades. We're giving them the time of their lives! Republicans choose Democratic candidates most likely to be the next bouncy balls in the next general election. Backroom door deals and using Indiana’s outdated signature collection process system is sure to keep strong Democratic candidates out each time. When Republicans see a strong candidate who is a real life threat to their party, they go to great lengths to find weak Dems, such as Jennifer McCormick, Terry Goodin, and the like. Need proof? Both McDermott (2022 U.S. Senate Race) and McCormick (2024 Gubernatorial Race) eagerly filed challenges against long-time fellow Democrats to avoid a primary instead of doing the right thing and running alongside them in the spirit of unity. Each of the candidates they filed challenges against were making history, but they didn’t care. Not surprisingly, they each lost their campaigns. It isn't rocket science! Such acts that waste our time could've easily been avoided if Schmuhl had properly advised the candidates. The Indiana Democratic Party is a joke as long as Schmuhl remains in power. Schmuhl is the reason why Hoosier Democrats think Young (Indiana U.S. Senator) is better than Banks when they are equally as bad! Being more silent or docile (as in this case with Senator Young) doesn’t make you better! Make no mistake about it. Young is silently killing us all behind close doors with his votes and policies just as much as Banks! Hoosiers, please! Don't you get it? Young is excited the Trump-backed Banks won his senate race so Indiana Democrats can flock to Young and talk about how grateful we are for him so he can easily win reelection in 2028. If this party leadership doesn’t change now, you can bet Banks’ election has positioned Young to win again in 2028 because after all, we’re supposed to believe Young is so much better than Banks, right? TRUMP IS MOVING FAST! WE NEED TO MOVE FASTER! We've heard it all before. Insanity is doing the same thing over and over again and trusting the same people to do better things for us. We need someone in position who can keep pace with reality. Like many of you, I was happy to see a new face when Schmuhl came aboard in 2021, but I was quickly disappointed by a lack of innovation and accountability. Strangely enough, I felt somewhat supported by Schmuhl in the 2022 senate campaign, but again, I was saddened by his refusal to address internal party problems and conflicts. We all sat and watched him do things we disagreed with. We observed his strange silence. We quietly shook our heads, but never said a word. But now is the time. Enough is enough. Mr. Schmuhl, Respectfully, while I appreciate the time we spent together, and I respect you as a person, no one should have to tell you how to do your job. It’s been three years now since you assumed your post. That’s more than enough time to develop a plan of execution and give Hoosier Democrats, Independents, and the Undecided hope. You said you wanted the job. You got it and did nothing with it. It’s my duty, as your fellow Democrat, to hold you accountable. I present to you an opportunity to get it together now or resign. It's just that simple. Lead our party with a plan and a voice or step aside and let someone who can. Respectfully Yours, Haneefah Khaaliq, ESQ. Former Indiana U.S. Senate Candidate haneefahkhaaliq.org | | | | Share this newsletter with friends! | | Visit haneefahkhaaliq.org for more information. | | "Find Out More" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:hoosiersforhaneefah@gmail.com | | Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah To unsubscribe from this list just send a quick email to hoosiersforhaneefah@gmail.com! You will be removed promptly! | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Hoosiers for Haneefah PO Box 2936 Gary, IN 46403 * USA

This is our next leader of the United States of America, Peter. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Donald Trump has reclaimed the White House, and America is on the path to victory once again.

subject: ICYMI: State Committeewoman, Stephanie Mulroy Appears on Fox to Call Out Governor Healey’s Hypocrisy on Public Safety
body:
| | | | |
---
| [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011XjLn5qJx6ZHqhk1XQZ9wR1Vsu41FYvdEH9R3zI6SJE8MIL-6xcEcBmR4izz0A-GtIhPwdbPSPS48r7kBcAx-lzyTEUj7ClZHZ50bPhNGTBvv_phV8WmdDUtxu010X-NDWqi0IFZXWVkO2p88Ifgfg==&c=j3PqTuFQsuc0GhAMJNb6L18OhciN4B31Wg2Qq3VOMTPHQYWrDa9iGA==&ch=Bo84b3k1euEVkJGeaSYrNOplOvTCcZVTHBpubBKsijKUHuCajfyHtA==)
---
| ICYMI: State Committeewoman, Stephanie Mulroy Appears on Fox to Call Out Governor Healey's Hypocrisy on Public Safety
---
---
| ICYMI: Massachusetts State Committeewoman, Stephanie Mulroy,[ ](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011XjLn5qJx6ZHqhk1XQZ9wR1Vsu41FYvdEH9R3zI6SJE8MIL-6xcEcNlUh6SrgwCgxdcb6ykkNe_QkArLCjz2qpcY_-j35BC_BRKcnMPU3xKieTsivtdf8t9OQeYqbE88OtFWdkNTNflNHpidU_6o1cM3L5OJgkXUS6lZsqydYr171UpWVRWHcg==&c=j3PqTuFQsuc0GhAMJNb6L18OhciN4B31Wg2Qq3VOMTPHQYWrDa9iGA==&ch=Bo84b3k1euEVkJGeaSYrNOplOvTCcZVTHBpubBKsijKUHuCajfyHtA==)[appeared on America Reports yesterday](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011XjLn5qJx6ZHqhk1XQZ9wR1Vsu41FYvdEH9R3zI6SJE8MIL-6xcEcNlUh6SrgwCgxdcb6ykkNe_QkArLCjz2qpcY_-j35BC_BRKcnMPU3xKieTsivtdf8t9OQeYqbE88OtFWdkNTNflNHpidU_6o1cM3L5OJgkXUS6lZsqydYr171UpWVRWHcg==&c=j3PqTuFQsuc0GhAMJNb6L18OhciN4B31Wg2Qq3VOMTPHQYWrDa9iGA==&ch=Bo84b3k1euEVkJGeaSYrNOplOvTCcZVTHBpubBKsijKUHuCajfyHtA==) to discuss Governor Healey's statement that Massachusetts will NOT cooperate with federal authorities on deportation efforts.
When asked on MSNBC if she would cooperate with deportations of illegal immigrants here in Massachusetts, Gov. Healey said "no. Absolutely not."
But in that very same interview, Gov. Healey also stated that Massachusetts needs to "use every tool in the toolbox to protect our citizens, protect our residents, and protect our states and certainly hold the line on democracy and the rule of law."
How can we "hold the line" on democracy and the rule of law while at the same time refusing to comply with federal authorities?
Committeewoman Mulroy was right to call out Gov. Healey's hypocrisy.
---
| | [STAND WITH STEPHANIE - DONATE TO THE MASSGOP](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011XjLn5qJx6ZHqhk1XQZ9wR1Vsu41FYvdEH9R3zI6SJE8MIL-6xcEcAP_1a50PfbQVsc0qhkXawgGvsNSBao_MP1sZPJXDTsuQUybCQEpv5EZubLXxvSy7jwEsvhSaVgEjvQb6V5pxc2NpkZp5w2Xu43Jop29l3zrgpryVWsHI3oPkpQYroQF0uNZQjxUDVet&c=j3PqTuFQsuc0GhAMJNb6L18OhciN4B31Wg2Qq3VOMTPHQYWrDa9iGA==&ch=Bo84b3k1euEVkJGeaSYrNOplOvTCcZVTHBpubBKsijKUHuCajfyHtA==)
---
| Mulroy, a mother of four school aged children, stood up for parents across Massachusetts stating under the Healey-Driscoll Administration "Parents can't just let their kids go downtown to go get a soda without wondering who might intercept them along the way."
She continued to state that the Right To Shelter law has been abused and is no longer serving its intended purpose. Instead, it's prioritizing migrants over life-long Massachusetts families.
Watch the full video by clicking below:
---
| [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011XjLn5qJx6ZHqhk1XQZ9wR1Vsu41FYvdEH9R3zI6SJE8MIL-6xcEcNlUh6SrgwCgxdcb6ykkNe_QkArLCjz2qpcY_-j35BC_BRKcnMPU3xKieTsivtdf8t9OQeYqbE88OtFWdkNTNflNHpidU_6o1cM3L5OJgkXUS6lZsqydYr171UpWVRWHcg==&c=j3PqTuFQsuc0GhAMJNb6L18OhciN4B31Wg2Qq3VOMTPHQYWrDa9iGA==&ch=Bo84b3k1euEVkJGeaSYrNOplOvTCcZVTHBpubBKsijKUHuCajfyHtA==)

body:
I emailed you specifically because I was hoping I had earned your support.

| |

| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoudiq6mu7odgh3i8ia685p6dvp3ka576as507sg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdg69o36cth2bs "DVO")
---
Friend,

I emailed you __**specifically**__ because I was hoping I had earned your support. I don't take this lightly, so let me tell you why I believe I've earned your respect & support.
● I served as a Navy SEAL for over 2 decades
● My favorite title I've ever held is "Grandpa"
● I fight tirelessly for farmers and dairy farmers
● I want to make sure every veteran has access to quality care when they get home
● I always speak my mind, and my opinion and my vote are not for sale
---
| | | [SUPPORT DERRICK](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhlbdbrcvruja1fjc7hglc99cgfhrh21e10oag80_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdg69o36cth2bs "SUPPORT DERRICK")
---
**If I 'm not your cup of tea, then I won't bug you again for your help.** **[But, if I sound like the kind of man you'd want speaking for you in Congress, I'd be honored to earn your support, Friend.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbhl9kqifp9vg27q9n5tspv2b0d8s1opbhmka0mo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdg69o36cth2bs "But, if I sound like the kind of man you’d want speaking for you in Congress, I’d be honored to earn your support, Friend.")**

Have a good rest of your day!

Derrick Van Orden

name: Ted Cruz
subject: From the bottom of my heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
I'm grateful beyond words to have your support. It means the world.

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9UZWQtQ3J1ei1UaGFuay1Zb3VfMjAyNDExMTQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1UZWQtQ3J1ei1UaGFuay1Zb3UmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NzUmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/TwwKOE357htAVr6hoydpGg)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, My team wrote you the other day to express their gratitude for all your help in this historic election year, and I wanted to follow up with a quick note to share my gratitude as well.

**Together, united and strong,_we got the job_ done to Keep Texas, Texas! **

While the polls all showed it was a tight race, and the National Democrats and dark money PACs went all-in to defeat us, in the end we prevailed by 9 points - a solid margin of victory that was beyond what we'd expected.

I'm grateful beyond words to have you on the team and I can't wait to get back to work.

The people have spoken. The political landscape has shifted. _It 's time to SAVE AMERICA_.

We have big plans for the year ahead and we're going to continue to count on your help. This is an incredible opportunity we have before us to advance a common-sense conservative policy agenda - to restore freedom and opportunity, we need to cut taxes and government waste, secure the border, restore our nation's energy independence, and end the weaponization of our legal system by the radical left for good.

**Thank you again for your support this year. I 'm so proud of what we've accomplished.**

If you can **[pitch in again as we prepare for 2025 and beyond](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9UZWQtQ3J1ei1UaGFuay1Zb3VfMjAyNDExMTQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1UZWQtQ3J1ei1UaGFuay1Zb3UmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NzUmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/-NScuT1J98GdktDcFbSFwQ)** , it would be a huge help too.

I'll be in touch again soon!

\- Ted
---

name: MAGA Action
subject: In spite of everything they threw at him:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Overhaul PAC
body:
| | | In spite of everything they threw at him: **TRUMP WON!** The Left threw everything they had at him and Trump came out on top. After the slander, phony charges, and assassination attempts... any reasonable person would have thrown in the towel. **BUT NOT TRUMP!** When things got tough he doubled down. That’s how much he loves our country. And now he’s going to **MAGA!** We couldn’t be more thankful for the work he’s done. And we’re going to continue to stand behind him and help him any way we can. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
I emailed you specifically because I was hoping I had earned your support.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl0rkldfdt15jp1tjv4f64o9ua1ea66u9aced278_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdi60o74c1h2bs "DVO")
---
Friend,

I emailed you __**specifically**__ because I was hoping I had earned your support. I don't take this lightly, so let me tell you why I believe I've earned your respect & support.
● I served as a Navy SEAL for over 2 decades
● My favorite title I've ever held is "Grandpa"
● I fight tirelessly for farmers and dairy farmers
● I want to make sure every veteran has access to quality care when they get home
● I always speak my mind, and my opinion and my vote are not for sale
---
| | | [SUPPORT DERRICK](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgjr11kh7k1rmq0m88utt0qriccjr0jad0oag0q0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdi60o74c1h2bs "SUPPORT DERRICK")
---
**If I 'm not your cup of tea, then I won't bug you again for your help.** **[But, if I sound like the kind of man you'd want speaking for you in Congress, I'd be honored to earn your support, Friend.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zri4bjgdekrgphniejt1mk4nq10c89r9omo6tnf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdi60o74c1h2bs "But, if I sound like the kind of man you’d want speaking for you in Congress, I’d be honored to earn your support, Friend.")**

Have a good rest of your day!

Derrick Van Orden

---

name: Katie Porter
subject: Will you join me in supporting Christina?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39297%2E3422442%2Elgn0PK)
Derek,
I’m reaching out to you today to ask if you’ll support Christina Bohannan’s recount effort for a House seat in Iowa. But first, let me share a bit about Christina and the current state of the race.
Christina is a friend and former colleague. I know that she cares deeply for the people of Iowa’s first district. She’s running to represent the same district I lived in when I taught at the University of Iowa!
Christina is challenging a Republican incumbent, and with nearly all the votes counted, she’s behind by only **a few hundred** votes -- or 0.2% of the vote total.
**[She needs our help to prepare for a recount. Will you join me in supporting Christina by splitting a donation to her recount effort today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241114-1?refcode=em20241114-39297&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39297_3422442_lgn0PK&akid=39297%2E3422442%2Elgn0PK)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241114-1?refcode=em20241114-39297&refcode2=39297_3422442_lgn0PK&akid=39297%2E3422442%2Elgn0PK)
When a race is as close as this one and the stakes are so high, it’s crucial that every single vote is counted and the totals are accurate.
We still have the opportunity to flip this seat from red to blue and send a hard-working mom to Congress, _but time is running out_.
**[Please, help Christina as she gears up for recount by splitting a donation with her right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241114-1?refcode=em20241114-39297&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39297_3422442_lgn0PK&akid=39297%2E3422442%2Elgn0PK)**
Thanks,
Katie

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241114-39297&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39297_3422442_lgn0PK&akid=39297%2E3422442%2Elgn0PK)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39297%2E3422442%2Elgn0PK).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

| Nov 14
---|---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=151649294&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjQ5Mjk0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMTU5NTYwOCwiZXhwIjoxNzM0MTg3NjA4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjgzNDQ5Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.jCloEyemAeQZ0ChbIcArSV0V0VDrLEIUzG1lNG0MjNQ&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=151649294&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjQ5Mjk0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE1OTU2MDgsImV4cCI6MTczNDE4NzYwOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.HgmdgKcyPU-3WJqsSz00ihmBWHkvZlnpci0106_oimg)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/rebekahjones/p/matt-gaetz-as-attorney-general?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---
Donald Trump named Matt Gaetz as his pick for Attorney General yesterday.
I ran against Matt Gaetz in Florida's 1st Congressional District in 2022.
I took a "know thy enemy" approach and successfully baited and triggered him throughout my campaign.
His whole "over-educated millennials who like cats" thing was about me. His insecurity about running against a woman better educated than him, [better at TV than him](https://substack.com/redirect/bbb375a7-6a09-476e-bf7e-a84abce0ec55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and willing/able to match his loudness pissed him off.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a1ad495e-72e2-400f-9697-7fd3273085c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My run against Gaetz wasn't _entirely_ about him.
More than anything, I wanted to hold the line in the forgotten coast against DeSantis -- which I did.
The only county DeSantis got fewer votes from in 2022 than he did in 2018 was in my district. The only county in the state which registered more new Democrats than Republicans was in my district.
Of all the Florida democrats running for Congress that cycle, including ones that won their elections, I was closest to Biden's 2020 numbers than anyone else.
And I did all of that while being the only major party nominee in American history to be banned from Twitter during the entirety of my campaign. The ban was lifted the month after the election. The ban was put in place because I "over-shared"[ this Miami Herald article](https://substack.com/redirect/406103bf-3e5f-4fc2-9b1e-bcc2d7d345dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Matt made it personal for me when[ he bullied my 12-year-old autistic son](https://substack.com/redirect/96bc40f1-a1bc-4c71-9f0b-7775fda310b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on Facebook during the campaign. He had Larry Hetu, a foreign national, follow my son, take pictures of him, and harass him.
Both Matt and Hetu posted the pictures online. He [got caught lying ](https://substack.com/redirect/d3a54ce9-e242-41d4-9644-0cc574a378cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)when he said we were at a campaign event while we were setting up for a healthcare expo, sharing a photo of my son with his head down, making fun of his lack of energy.
Despite calls for Matt to remove the posts on Twitter and Facebook, [he didn't](https://substack.com/redirect/7bd9a975-cd58-4eb1-b9a4-2527a8d71e32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Even the event organizer spoke out.
Replies to Matt Gaetz' 2022 Facebook post mocking my son.
Hetu even followed my son into the bathroom at a county fair once, forcing us to call the police and apply for a restraining order against the man.
Matt rewarded Hetu by giving him a job in his congressional office and fast-tracking his US citizenship. A man who had, just months prior, been in court for stalking a child. Working for a Congressman and granted citizenship.
[I got a little fired up about that one.](https://substack.com/redirect/38342484-fd18-41de-bae7-34b0fc9c605e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a859f34a-a83a-4eb8-bbd7-f7851708ee8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There are more stories like this about Matt than you might know.
I got to know Matt during my time campaigning against him.
I got to know other people who knew Matt, too.
I spoke to about a dozen people -- including family, lifelong friends, and congressional staffers -- [for my piece on Gaetz from 2022](https://substack.com/redirect/863af601-e2c7-4be8-b88f-464c3afd107a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Anyone in proximity to Gaetz will tell you that he's not a serious lawmaker. He likes the drug, alcohol and sex-filled parties. He likes having authority and getting on TV. He doesn't care about being in Congress. Hell, he doesn't even show up most of the time...

clean_body: Kakistocracy in action | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Kakistocracy in action | Nov 14 ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | Donald Trump named Matt Gaetz as his pick for Attorney General yesterday. I ran against Matt Gaetz in Florida's 1st Congressional District in 2022. I took a "know thy enemy" approach and successfully baited and triggered him throughout my campaign. His whole "over-educated millennials who like cats" thing was about me. His insecurity about running against a woman better educated than him, , and willing/able to match his loudness pissed him off. | | ---|---|--- My run against Gaetz wasn't entirely about him. More than anything, I wanted to hold the line in the forgotten coast against DeSantis -- which I did. The only county DeSantis got fewer votes from in 2022 than he did in 2018 was in my district. The only county in the state which registered more new Democrats than Republicans was in my district. Of all the Florida democrats running for Congress that cycle, including ones that won their elections, I was closest to Biden's 2020 numbers than anyone else. And I did all of that while being the only major party nominee in American history to be banned from Twitter during the entirety of my campaign. The ban was lifted the month after the election. The ban was put in place because I "over-shared". Matt made it personal for me when on Facebook during the campaign. He had Larry Hetu, a foreign national, follow my son, take pictures of him, and harass him. Both Matt and Hetu posted the pictures online. He he said we were at a campaign event while we were setting up for a healthcare expo, sharing a photo of my son with his head down, making fun of his lack of energy. Despite calls for Matt to remove the posts on Twitter and Facebook, . Even the event organizer spoke out. Replies to Matt Gaetz' 2022 Facebook post mocking my son. Hetu even followed my son into the bathroom at a county fair once, forcing us to call the police and apply for a restraining order against the man. Matt rewarded Hetu by giving him a job in his congressional office and fast-tracking his US citizenship. A man who had, just months prior, been in court for stalking a child. Working for a Congressman and granted citizenship. | | ---|---|--- There are more stories like this about Matt than you might know. I got to know Matt during my time campaigning against him. I got to know other people who knew Matt, too. I spoke to about a dozen people -- including family, lifelong friends, and congressional staffers -- . Anyone in proximity to Gaetz will tell you that he's not a serious lawmaker. He likes the drug, alcohol and sex-filled parties. He likes having authority and getting on TV. He doesn't care about being in Congress. Hell, he doesn't even show up most of the time... name: Stop Netanyahu via Our Revolution
subject: Trump and Netanyahu
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Donald Trump’s vow to “stop the wars” is already crumbling.

Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu and his far-right government were
THRILLED with Trump’s win, believing that he’ll allow them to keep their
immoral, deadly wars going until “total victory.”

And now Trump is quickly stacking his cabinet full of neocons like Mike
Waltz, the former counterterrorism adviser to VP Dick Cheney, for national
security advisor and Marco Rubio as Secretary of State.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20464?t=1011&akid=7223%2E5885482%2EdFYDbL ][IMG]

The MAGA base is already up in arms about these hawkish appointments...but
the reality is no one knows exactly what Trump will do. That’s why it’s so
important that Congress send a clear message to Netanyahu that the U.S.
will not sign a blank check to the Israeli government.

Now we FINALLY have a way to do it. Bernie has introduced a resolution to
halt $20 billion of U.S. weapons sales to Israel — and the vote is just
DAYS away. It will be the first ever vote in Congressional history to
directly block an arms sale to Israel.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20464?source=email-111424&t=1012&akid=7223%2E5885482%2EdFYDbL ]We need to show massive public support for Bernie’s resolution to make
it clear to Congress that it must force Netanyahu to stop the slaughter.
Will you stand with Bernie?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20464?source=email-111424&t=1013&akid=7223%2E5885482%2EdFYDbL ]ADD YOUR NAME

In his last term, Trump supported the expansion of settlements and turned
his back on a two state solution. So it’s no surprise that Netanyahu and
his cabinet were overjoyed with his victory. And now come the deadly
consequences.

This week, Israel ramped up its assault on Gaza and Lebanon, and Israel’s
Finance Minister began preparing for the annexation of the occupied West
Bank – expecting the incoming Trump administration will let them get away
with it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20464?t=1014&akid=7223%2E5885482%2EdFYDbL ][IMG]

Trump’s reported pick for Secretary of State, Marco Rubio, has expressed
unhindered support for Israel’s war in Gaza — rejecting a ceasefire and
saying “I think Hamas is 100 percent to blame” when asked about the
horrific number of civilian deaths.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20464?source=email-111424&t=1015&akid=7223%2E5885482%2EdFYDbL ]We can’t let Trump allow the Israeli government to continue its
ruthless war campaign. Bernie’s resolution will put an end to the endless
flow of weapons, but he needs ALL of us to stand with him. Will you add
your name?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

body:

If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=da67ab1a871e44978b44d6832f8b7954&_t=dNEJdlbv5bLrv3zAcHbXOCMT4pKbHMgBsWOojtTC7JcnhVJMWI4Dq4brD8CBZaVfNNf73GI5yLYy0jYMVBq3tvkiJBf4zgZS6bHyiF_PI4oiyoumO99ypVNBc0EH5TPf)_

| Hi Friend,

This is Dr. Ben Carson--I'm writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn. **And today I need your help.**

Right now, the Left is working around the clock to undermine the Supreme Court's decision while mobilizing millions of pro-choice democrats and major media outlets to codify on-demand abortion at taxpayers' expense. [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=da67ab1a871e44978b44d6832f8b7954&_e=J68_jqNlXlZs5HujEjhGcox3-E1HGldUzh97a8X0ZPnE-lBstKEqSiHMlHnoktdD7Onb450WPnvqb_FGeNc8puLUz6WFOhpUadLkMeH-0HcRDz8-xzmNXvuqo6mKKWkXX8zlSgmCKLE7wOZ71O6-S5AHysxtrs1innKENloTqwRxGYMkkhVf1DVZFjOadZa_3TlItvTDEtk0csaLMIq0GDWeX4lMRJ-pTicT2u3PgWYt6QUAuqnbTvza0kaHh0V8VqFs-PchntCNZrYs_VSmIN8uxVGDbRWmu7Rw51t4jbt1dFj0JH9VgTB5SK5V0SQxJsvsnoqlHZEZl1GwjD8z-1VUrsBOVfC4byizYhgHpIWj2nIGE_m9yyYUMDYtGeAYnajsQENAPO7HMEXq5oxLH5aSJJtloMAFSF7JMcOf__o%3D) **We cannot allow the anti-life movement to obscure the fact that a majority of Americans (regardless of how they vote) do NOT agree that abortion should be unrestricted.**

Today I'd like to ask you to join thousands of others who believe the sanctity of life is worth defending by adding your name to the pledge I have linked below:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=da67ab1a871e44978b44d6832f8b7954&_e=J68_jqNlXlZs5HujEjhGcox3-E1HGldUzh97a8X0ZPnE-lBstKEqSiHMlHnoktdD7Onb450WPnvqb_FGeNc8puLUz6WFOhpUadLkMeH-0HcRDz8-xzmNXvuqo6mKKWkXX8zlSgmCKLE7wOZ71O6-S5AHysxtrs1innKENloTqwRxGYMkkhVf1DVZFjOadZa_3TlItvTDEtk0csaLMIq0GDWeX4lMRJ-pTicT2u3PgWYt6QUAuqnbTvza0kaHh0V8VqFs-PchntCNZrYs_VSmIOiGrDj7RxCIHn0TaJDaEcJ1XNA_TVEyiLumISCAQ9TiNcJssKVUZaoJMY-ytHBwB55LOzBj4XE9OMPZVRcEYwIe1LH0jQodsOmMqCDWDPgxafkOC5oQnSkdeIuqk2Cc7m5-VspKU7mnJVSqzAnMiok%3D)

I will do everything in my power to defend every American life and stop the spread of the Left's anti-life ideology. [**Will you take one minute to stand with me by signing this pledge now?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=da67ab1a871e44978b44d6832f8b7954&_e=J68_jqNlXlZs5HujEjhGcox3-E1HGldUzh97a8X0ZPnE-lBstKEqSiHMlHnoktdD7Onb450WPnvqb_FGeNc8puLUz6WFOhpUadLkMeH-0HcRDz8-xzmNXvuqo6mKKWkXX8zlSgmCKLE7wOZ71O6-S5AHysxtrs1innKENloTqwRxGYMkkhVf1DVZFjOadZa_3TlItvTDEtk0csaLMIq0GDWeX4lMRJ-pTicT2u3PgWYt6QUAuqnbTvza0kaHh0V8VqFs-PchntCNZrYs_VSmIE4UeyKtD3P7-CcpVsqjOh5WAln0cCasBy9Jiu2sucWHL2QqNn54dshOWviz3DizKboLY_khsgiC3ilYggXerZz5Zq1YGPmt_tdV5siW_Pdz3Q1HkjNVm-5yII_u97v8bBlPedin6-uLEi63AYzSjC8%3D)

I'd like to thank you for joining this critical effort. Together, we can save thousands of lives from abortion over the next year.

Gratefully,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
