name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: NJ gov candidate wants to “queer the curriculum”
body:
Peter, We know (by “we,” I mean common sense New Jerseyans, not Hollywood, coastal elites or the mainstream media) that woke
|
---
| Peter, We know (by “we,” I mean common sense New Jerseyans, not Hollywood, coastal elites or the mainstream media) that woke extremism is one major reason the Left lost big last Tuesday night. Taxpayer funding of sex-change surgeries for prison inmates. Pushing a sexual agenda on kindergartners. Biological men beating up women in athletics. It’s this type of woke extremism that so many common sense New Jerseyans rejected on Tuesday when Trump got closer to winning New Jersey than any Republican since 1992. Why? Because common sense is that a criminal’s gender transition (or really anyone’s) shouldn’t be the financial responsibility of the taxpayer. Common sense is that children should be children and that indoctrinating them with sexually explicit materials is abusive behavior. And that women shouldn’t be losing medals and scholarships to biological men – who were usually mediocre athletes at best before deciding to compete against women. That’s the “patriarchy” the Left should be worried about. So as we look to 2025 and saving New Jersey from Left Wing Lunacy in offices from top to bottom, have candidates on the Left learned anything? Will they be moving from wokism towards common sense to, if nothing else, save their political rears? If you look at gubernatorial candidate Sean Spiller, it’s clear they won’t.

---
| Sean Spiller, the President of the New Jersey Education Association (NJEA) has been the center of some controversy for funneling NJEA resources (i.e., teacher dues) to his political campaign. But that’s just the beginning. A few days ago, “Drag Queen Entertainment” posted [this video](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/eafa0edd2bd0a89162d793c3fa0490b9/eJyNkF2rgkAQhv_LXEuLa3VAiCjrhJhBUXQZmw65pOuyjtkH_ve2zqGrgm5nnnle3rkBoRKKwhR8ONOVcw8cMJhILVFRUCoSyXPLe13Xcx3IpTrOTFlr8G9vj1_AY-y5bt8Bumi0yHo1CqJwMdvNw0VkSS2MzfjWw1-eaTwK59C2H8VYSJqerLsCn0yNj0aptK1oY3LLZ0S68hlrmqYjVUXiYETRScqCGcScTYLfPS3H559uzYbyUGUDsY55UmRNuqVrvM36NkNojSr9f1CEl7-k9g5BZ26J) of their presence and “Banned Book Story Time” at... the NJEA Convention. This is on top of convention calls for “[queering the curriculum](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/a3dd37978291e54b4ae55b7421db3a9d/eJyNkEFrwzAMhf-Lz3GzOB2M3EopJaTrYWznYRwtcZvInqw060r--5xu9LTBQAZhP316zxfBgBq5rEUhPvhTqVwkgsBYbwF57ZC1ub6q-2WWZ4noLB635AYvisuvwzfBfJ1n2UMi-OwhSp6fVuuq3G9fd-W-ikqvKe74L0fdOJvHVbkT0_QnGHrLm1NkB1EwDTAnqm1MxS_URX3L7EORpuM4LkLrogsYAwKPjo4L4_pU3allmmVz4QG0NA5nnHUoW9u0XTwcZACNMnjbdUBBGt17bRuUb45k405AGJuadCPfBwAMUmN9bcliI7kFaQYia4Zu6NPoWnsPWP98eQXnb-_TF_kejh0=).” The convention theme – “Learning. Equity. Justice.” should have told us all we needed to know.

| The message at this convention for New Jersey educators? Pushing a sexual agenda on children is not only welcomed, but encouraged. This is grooming, plain and simple. And NJ educators shouldn’t have this agenda forced on them either, especially at a time when our students are struggling and they need to be focused on core academic subjects. This is all going on under President Spiller’s lead and it has his fingerprints all over it. He has all but said he’s running to force his NJEA agenda on the entire state of New Jersey. And let’s just call this like it is – crazy, and dangerous. If the commentary from media elites and leftist insiders is any indicator, Spiller won’t be alone in continuing to push a woke agenda. But unfortunately for them, my hunch is that common sense New Jerseyans aren’t going to take it in 2025 either. So what do we do? It’s simple. 1) Identify more members of the Common Sense Majority. 2) Recruit common sense candidates for the ballot at every level. 3) Get the Common Sense Majority out to vote in the Primary and the General. It might be a simple strategy, but it’s not going to be easy. We need all of us working together to grab back that megaphone and save our state. Here at the Common Sense Club, we want you to feel like this is your home. The place where you aren’t alone in saying “that’s nuts!” and the place where you can do something about the lunacy you see around you. So as you celebrate, make plans to [get back in the fight with us](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/103474ae52a955cdc6dcc9d68034a115/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnCVzrYs3ERHRPESdw4-hltwP1jEy8b-3VngqCOY088wzvDMCoSwlpQ0EcKcHYz44YLDmmqOkSEkq69eUbTee7znQcnlNjOo1BOPX5QWY277H1g7QoNEih30YZWmRnPK0yCypS2Nv_Onx2OKJd2GawzT9FKPgFN-su4OATI9zoobbVHQ0reUvRLoLXLdWQijZoa267auVMmdXoKjQdBeuXWsqtUbZfN6Q4fD2TU-jLmZT) because 2025 is just around the corner... Let’s go, Common Sense friends! For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader

| Peter, The race for California's 41st Congressional District is still too early to call. We now need to fund an intensive ballot curing program to ensure that any voters with rejected ballots have an opportunity to correct their ballots and make their voice heard. It could be the difference between winning and losing this election. [We've set up a critical new account to cover expenses towards ballot curing and other voter protection activities. Peter, can you help us fill our war chest by splitting a donation of $10 or more between Blue Amp Action and our campaign?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc6326cbd-ec64-4036-9deb-bb7c7ee21b33/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Mary Peltola
subject: Peter, I’m telling you first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Boebert PAC
body:
| | | [](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=8cdb1fc49a414e25b7e5756a8e277a68&_e=77tL5h0Yhq548baC8qfyav-sidWxmDPLrhGF9Rk8oEWuq-p7qZVLPBqqnvoqVlPFVM7Ww0qlA1vXeJ9C73s7Zz4hotCdlSRfMWQD6inWsgn38wvPY5P3skKvoGDIvtWVPooUaYixPNchh9uNflFVajXjvV4aI1djtqjj_bMgI290ZsBczTJha5PtnhD_3eX3z-rfAs4spi2U1UfHddakmX1k7ndDCzGqAypMj9rUTbklsa53RcTby8B0fIesv2Z0PkBawJkWJrcvU089utOgdAFasmx34_DOxNoo7jf68bh2fD50usH6_J7JiQ0YxpgXMdiSOE5To0LGmAmMmf4PZteqm03iigF9oiNArYUmDoeRsQULQlio_QJZozFko7ccCn4wEQhFKtGWbLZBZQko-6y5CmUF7XU4o1qUDCJjnWw8K4-AwWtZyrNj_spc64fb) Peter, we’re getting new info about my race by the minute, and I urgently need your support before the next surge of details come through. **The most important thing to know right now is this: This race is far from over, Peter.** Across Alaska, thousands of in-person votes remain to be counted, and they’re coming from areas with large Alaska Native populations (where I often perform best). On top of those in-person ballots, we estimate that there are still at least 41,000 absentee and early votes that are yet to be counted. _**There is a LOT of counting left to do, Peter. But the reality is, we likely won’t know who won until the ranked choice voting process plays out in the coming days.**_ Team Mary is prepared for any and _all_ scenarios, and we’re ready to fight to ensure that every single vote is counted. **The catch is, while other campaigns are done fundraising, we still need to power this work – however long it takes.** **We can’t ensure every Alaskan’s voice is heard without support.** **[So please, will you split $25 between Defeat Boebert PAC and I to ensure that we have the resources to keep this seat in the people’s hands?>> clean_body: | | | Peter, we’re getting new info about my race by the minute, and I urgently need your support before the next surge of details come through. The most important thing to know right now is this: This race is far from over, Peter. Across Alaska, thousands of in-person votes remain to be counted, and they’re coming from areas with large Alaska Native populations (where I often perform best). On top of those in-person ballots, we estimate that there are still at least 41,000 absentee and early votes that are yet to be counted. There is a LOT of counting left to do, Peter. But the reality is, we likely won’t know who won until the ranked choice voting process plays out in the coming days. Team Mary is prepared for any and all scenarios, and we’re ready to fight to ensure that every single vote is counted. The catch is, while other campaigns are done fundraising, we still need to power this work – however long it takes. We can’t ensure every Alaskan’s voice is heard without support. you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you! —Mary Peltola ** Paid for by Defeat Boebert PAC

| | My fellow American, I need you to take **2 critical actions** for your country today. Donald Trump has been elected President again! And Republicans have kept the House, and retaken the Senate! This is a __MASSIVE__ and __SWEEPING__ victory! But my friend, I hate to have to say this but... **None of this will matter if we do not protect President Trump. Radical leftists have already tried to take his life twice!** He was less than a centimeter from taking a bullet to his brain. I don't want to even consider what a horrible, tragic, awful mess this country would be in if the sniper's bullet had hit its mark. _Chaos. National, and global chaos_. And now the DOJ has revealed that Iranian officials plotted to kill President Trump in the lead-up to the election. We are not just lucky that Donald Trump is alive today... _we are blessed._ My friend, I believe God spared President Trump's life that day in Butler Pennsylvania. And again on that golf course just a few weeks later. But we can't just hope that God will continue to keep him safe - you and I must pray that he will. And today, _I 'm asking you to PRAY FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP'S SAFETY._ **[**Please click here to sign your Protect Donald Trump prayer card!**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=e2b1b325a6e044e3bea8c78118031260&_e=-9HfGuYkUzQTiR3e9QWlI3THkIqn7AV_DwHdazD86dFOYq2bX9324iT53k7v6XVnjWYr19Jj3OSsxpd1afkX_7EtlLsmDLl1sTkWSyB0VVkydujC6Nm_7TZk5JU9XYEz7vdmZ1zOk8oU48ejKxGenMtoZU0YDkWf5V1r-g03h82hNkWHW24nxplSBU9nOAdXp1CI2lqsCIvxHXDfI8B7-fYbTShrNgCw1sYU0t5u0CZUDoL2YdhnGGj6ZbvociV1j1iXVhn1j-BeiVbJGqbcaEsqAPxrjC8kRRz-01VlskolGrDME6TdBDo_v_IBjbV3908Unk4YyrK78wjaDTUGjiRRTkQzZ2wMVDS9qxdW8sn-2auetiXv6hEj8uWe-HFiv14fiszpfxL77K_Cj6d4V0PWaAdS7SEVhLY-Enh-xvs%3D)**

President-Elect Trump needs to know that you and an army of prayer warriors are surrounding him with a Hedge of Protection. And there isn't one moment to lose - so please sign right away. And after you've signed your card, I hope you'll join with AMAC Action to help us pave the way for this administration to save our country. **Because this isn 't just the time for prayer, it is the time for hard work.** Peter, my name is Bob Carlstrom - President of AMAC Action. You may have heard of AMAC Action before - we're the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you've ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we've been fighting AGAINST "Obamacare", AGAINST "Medicare for All," and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to "transform" America and our elections. That's why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only razor thin margins, our advocacy is more critical than ever before. Don't forget, Donald Trump's first term was undermined not only by the radical left, but by weak and ineffectual Republicans. **[That's why your emergency membership contribution of $24, $50, $75, $100, $250 or more is so crucial right now.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=e2b1b325a6e044e3bea8c78118031260&_e=-9HfGuYkUzQTiR3e9QWlI3THkIqn7AV_DwHdazD86dFOYq2bX9324iT53k7v6XVnjWYr19Jj3OSsxpd1afkX_7EtlLsmDLl1sTkWSyB0VVkydujC6Nm_7TZk5JU9XYEz7vdmZ1zOk8oU48ejKxGenMtoZU0YDkWf5V1r-g03h82hNkWHW24nxplSBU9nOAdXp1CI2lqsCIvxHXDfI8B7-fYbTShrNgCw1sYU0t5u0CZUDoL2YdhnGGj6ZbvociV1j1iXVhn1j-BeiVbJGqbcaBOuNVM-y_S3Jfp2cEoI4CDvHl70U2Zu7s1n50c5xcJ7o2iai5-mLQmFw7xDBrg1QpfJAet343N77fb3B7uOyS5HXh4sttPTZFEHEhh8flepmzfb38j86nV8rQ3L08YWDoJ7FpkF4ZdrzSdT6-pfOYY%3D)** This resounding victory means nothing if you and I do not surround Donald Trump with our prayers for protection - and it means nothing if we do not whip Congress into shape to deliver for the American people. So please, Peter, **[**Click here to sign your Protect Donald Trump prayer card and make your emergency membership contribution right away.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=e2b1b325a6e044e3bea8c78118031260&_e=-9HfGuYkUzQTiR3e9QWlI3THkIqn7AV_DwHdazD86dFOYq2bX9324iT53k7v6XVnjWYr19Jj3OSsxpd1afkX_7EtlLsmDLl1sTkWSyB0VVkydujC6Nm_7TZk5JU9XYEz7vdmZ1zOk8oU48ejKxGenMtoZU0YDkWf5V1r-g03h82hNkWHW24nxplSBU9nOAdXp1CI2lqsCIvxHXDfI8B7-fYbTShrNgCw1sYU0t5u0CZUDoL2YdhnGGj6ZbvociV1j1iXVhn1j-BeiVbJGqbcaOn3TGsPqRlt5coolo5xnkRBRX8WeeblaCUba29n4_SEybS_ktiyre44UrFxhvE1p-xuVKYM9ZoEkrCuELwgbW_81O60rH2B2LORSC8_7MQFSGmJR7QUrK1P_fQgTsGbr-zDFQrdIAKBfyRe0LJ1Ong%3D)** Thank you, Peter. Together you and I can play a part in the restoration of our great country!

clean_body: | | | | I need you to take 2 critical actions for your country today. | | | | | | My fellow American, I need you to take 2 critical actions for your country today. Donald Trump has been elected President again! And Republicans have kept the House, and retaken the Senate! This is a MASSIVE and SWEEPING victory! But my friend, I hate to have to say this but... None of this will matter if we do not protect President Trump. Radical leftists have already tried to take his life twice! He was less than a centimeter from taking a bullet to his brain. I don't want to even consider what a horrible, tragic, awful mess this country would be in if the sniper's bullet had hit its mark. Chaos. National, and global chaos. And now the DOJ has revealed that Iranian officials plotted to kill President Trump in the lead-up to the election. We are not just lucky that Donald Trump is alive today... we are blessed. My friend, I believe God spared President Trump's life that day in Butler Pennsylvania. And again on that golf course just a few weeks later. But we can't just hope that God will continue to keep him safe - you and I must pray that he will. And today, I 'm asking you to PRAY FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP'S SAFETY. President-Elect Trump needs to know that you and an army of prayer warriors are surrounding him with a Hedge of Protection. And there isn't one moment to lose - so please sign right away. And after you've signed your card, I hope you'll join with AMAC Action to help us pave the way for this administration to save our country. Because this isn 't just the time for prayer, it is the time for hard work. Peter, my name is Bob Carlstrom - President of AMAC Action. You may have heard of AMAC Action before - we're the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you've ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we've been fighting AGAINST "Obamacare", AGAINST "Medicare for All," and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to "transform" America and our elections. That's why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only razor thin margins, our advocacy is more critical than ever before. Don't forget, Donald Trump's first term was undermined not only by the radical left, but by weak and ineffectual Republicans. This resounding victory means nothing if you and I do not surround Donald Trump with our prayers for protection - and it means nothing if we do not whip Congress into shape to deliver for the American people. So please, Peter, Thank you, Peter. Together you and I can play a part in the restoration of our great country! | | For Freedom, Bob Carlstrom, President AMAC Action | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | |

On top of those in-person ballots, we estimate that there are still at least 41,000 absentee and early votes that are yet to be counted. **_There is a LOT of counting left to do, friend. But the reality is, we likely won’t know who won until the ranked choice voting process plays out in the coming days._** Team Mary is prepared for _any_ and _all_ scenarios, and we’re ready to fight to ensure that every single vote is counted. **The catch is, while other campaigns are done fundraising, we still need to power this work – however long it takes.** **We can’t ensure every Alaskan’s voice is heard without support.** [**So please, will you split $3 between DASS PAC and I to ensure that we have the resources to keep this seat in the people’s hands? >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97080888/512214263/-1989993574?refcode=em-11.14.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjRlYzg0Yy05ZGEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t1vjHCdOUEwAMsZchpIkO_4Tg6nCsJf_xlIMsOA26-k=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97080891/512214272/-1989993574?refcode=em-11.14.24-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjRlYzg0Yy05ZGEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t1vjHCdOUEwAMsZchpIkO_4Tg6nCsJf_xlIMsOA26-k=)**

name: Inside Scoop Politics
subject: Trump's Wealth Saving Plan To Beat The Volatility Ahead
body:
Trump’s Plan To Avoid The Elites Raid On Your 401(k)

Blackrock warns "Prepare for a recession unlike any other." Central banks igniting a global recession with their fight to stop inflation.
| |
---
---
# Trump’s Plan To Avoid
# The Elites Raid On Your 401(k)
---
Donald Trump has reclaimed the White House, and America is on the path to victory once again.

But don’t think for a second that the Dems on the inside will go down without a fight.

Whether stirring up controversy through identity politics in the liberal media, or creating economic turbulence through market manipulation, there are many present threats to your financial future.

They use these tactics to enrich themselves while everyday Americans watch their retirement accounts slowly erode under market volatility.

The constant volatility benefits them, but it’s draining the hard-earned money in your retirement accounts.

Whether it’s a 401(k), IRA, TSP, or pension, your post retirement future could be in serious danger if you are not aware of the options you have to protect your wealth from their game.

** FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ** Dear friend, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

**They 've proven they'll fight tooth and nail to prevent Trump from leading America forward.**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97083687/512221790/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2UyOWU3ZC1hMWEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kvKlsnEwb4SJYrAm90za-23RfS-ny-ErT8_FtXyUtEk=&emci=5014c25e-d9a1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=37e29e7d-a1a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=7731215)

| | Last week's election outcome has been a blow for many Oregonians and Americans alike. Our shared goals of advancing reproductive freedom, strengthening voting rights, taking on climate chaos, and generating an opportunity economy have taken a direct hit. Many Americans are alarmed that our nation elected a person who talks about weaponizing the Justice Department against his enemies and who obstructed the peaceful transfer of power four years ago. These are actions of a man who does not respect our Constitution, the separation of powers, or our democracy. Trump's signature achievement in his first term was a tax bill that rewarded the richest Americans and corporations and further rigged the government against the people. These next few years will be challenging. It's tragic – and deeply unsettling – that the MAGA playbook of hate and division won. **But history offers hope.** There are many examples when motivated citizens have pulled their countries back from the brink, protecting and restoring government for the people. **In America, we have the opportunity to redirect our path every two years. Here's what we cannot do: yield to cynicism and give up.** The values we're fighting for are the right ones, and if we stay in the arena, victories will come. Let's be gentle with ourselves in the days ahead. Decompress, find solace with loved ones, and make room for moments of joy. This is how we'll heal from the blow of November 5, 2024. And it's how we'll find the strength to rebuild our democracy and reinvigorate our government of, by, and for the people. Onward! _Jeff_ [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97083688/512221791/-2122444374?refcode=2024-11-14-outcome&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=37e29e7d-a1a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2UyOWU3ZC1hMWEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kvKlsnEwb4SJYrAm90za-23RfS-ny-ErT8_FtXyUtEk=) |

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: These nominations will only help Project 2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Team -- the nonstop flood of news about unqualified nominees who are only being appointed because of their loyalty shows that, once directed to follow the playbook of Project 2025 -- these nominees will follow their orders and scramble over each other to show that they are the most loyal. Our democracy will be cast aside for approval from on high.
How do we know? Job seekers for the Trump administration are being told to submit their resumes on the Project 2025 website. Then they are being told they'll only be hired for a job if they've been loyal enough.
Stand with us and add your signature to tell Congress, the Judiciary, and state leaders that they must reject Trump and Heritage's frightening Project 2025 blueprint >> [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/stop-trumps-anti-democracy-project-2025-agenda?source=110624swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/stop-trumps-anti-democracy-project-2025-agenda?source=110624swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111424_1&amount=25]
Friends, There’s a lot of uncertainty ahead – for our country, our democracy, and our rights. We know that's bringing a lot of us down, and you're not wrong to feel down.
But here’s something we know for sure – we must immediately prepare to push back against Trump's anti-democracy Project 2025 agenda:
* Criminalizing voters: cracking down on simple voting mistakes using a so-called “Election Crimes Branch” – which has never been done by any president from any political party.

* Installing partisan loyalists: Immediately firing thousands of qualified civil servants at every level of the federal government and replacing them with ideologues willing to push an extreme political agenda.

* Stripping away our rights: Deploying the National Guard to crack down on protests, robbing us of fair representation by rigging the U.S. Census, and dramatically increasing the President’s power to act without Congressional oversight.
Send letters to Congress and your state legislators now: We must resist this anti-democracy agenda >> [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/stop-trumps-anti-democracy-project-2025-agenda?source=110624swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/stop-trumps-anti-democracy-project-2025-agenda?source=110624swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
Project 2025 is a 1,000-page agenda handcrafted by the Heritage Foundation for a Trump presidency – and we have every reason to believe Trump will try to follow through on it.
Just look at his first term as president – where he enacted nearly two-thirds of the extreme policies the Heritage Foundation laid out for him.
And now in his second term, our system of checks and balances is going to be more important than ever – to limit Trump’s authoritarian ambitions and defend the bedrock values of our democracy: the rule of law, the right to vote, and the freedom to protest.
We can’t stand by in silence as our democracy is dismantled. Add your name if you agree: Congress, the Judiciary, and state leaders must reject Trump and Heritage's dangerous Project 2025 agenda >> [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/stop-trumps-anti-democracy-project-2025-agenda?source=110624swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/stop-trumps-anti-democracy-project-2025-agenda?source=110624swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111424_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111424_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111424_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111424_1&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=Ap%2BoiG%2BCUQfWZpka3ntq1wWyHl3wI71K9b8ITOGT807DxgNgpO7k7huB69aGtFhAhP87Sm0EikzaTBUlTs%2F7vhrs5FTt40tbpfdi9txVPYa5dzzr8M67m0GhEunvU5rX%2FRYQPF35j4blNRVy9hO1%2FitYpFzfotjdbdDps4CShPIDXG4y1M%2F2cgiKpQnxfL7b965AycBM2IaUuARTCdKd2HF%2FCRj5Kdas7LvysNarOWmF%2FUSbV70W%2BYc8TIh7xCmoQ5J102ruSR1kVoH8%2FQE9WwpX8c2tiSDQ436T60OCDYSgECHjq1RzjWP%2BqEtjpQkjxJLgR8Yma%2B%2BLtTN%2ByAtU6k3Ga7AFGxoF%2FEBBkFMfYO1LYOrErQ7aDDntSvD%2Bellsdej37LKrM4FCBHKd0x1pkGqEM34THMAWe4GD8BA3ULo%3D .

name: Raven M. (via NextGen PAC)
subject: I’m still fighting for my future. Are you with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; [http://nextgenpac
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97085245/512227444/-1995327540?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGI1M2ZlMy1hMmEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kt94WO-0vit2j9BVq6TtA7zYQsmTaZuTFKZqYxXw57I=&emci=69fc75cd-16a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=8db53fe3-a2a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=6787172)

I won’t lie to you, team: This election was _rough_. **But we don’t have time to feel sorry for ourselves.**
Anyone who says progress is impossible is dead wrong. And anyone who thinks young voters are going to lick our wounds and feel sorry for ourselves has another thing coming.
In the next few weeks, NextGen will be galvanizing young Americans and urging them to __**resist**__ the MAGA agenda.

name: MassGOP
subject: Democratic Supermajority Avoids Debate on Critical Republican Proposals
body:
| | | | |
---
| [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ui06p_UBftItxTdP8PrM1Hym0CBvrqGpD6SiCsgFwFU94U6bRQjsU7mUbcSII2guZSEY99rsZffzbLNjRYmXttZJbtnP8Ugh8isF9KwP7F9Lro0Dnke06i6UnyOsR2Fhd-XvG5qeYx82KZmUjv5jZQ==&c=MiYyHQQWs4iGqgUr_o0tJWqtL3SkUlfYgYYTtB4mC9xnxfxFpcS53g==&ch=QANoFjQJ-OuoD9fBFeVWMeUv1kurE4_vtTisd-EBqRzMeNSVABexAQ==)
---
| Democratic Supermajority Avoids Debate on Critical Republican Proposals
---
---
| Today, the Democratic supermajority avoided debate on two critical matters brought forth by Republicans during a joint session. Nine items were slated for discussion, including two key Republican proposals:

* Legislation that would require a supermajority vote to access the rainy day fund, a resource intended for emergency situations.
* A constitutional amendment to cap the state income tax.

Instead of fulfilling their responsibility to debate these important issues, Democrats moved to adjourn the session, sidestepping the opportunity to address proposals that would protect residents' finances. Republicans introduced these measures in response to the Democrats' growing disregard for fiscal responsibility through their tax-and-spend policies.
When Democrats pushed to adjourn, effectively blocking debate on two proposals crucial to the people of Massachusetts, Senator Tarr objected and sought a roll call vote. Unfortunately, the Democratic majority pushed forward to not only end today's session but preclude any more sessions for the rest of the year.
Senate Minority Leader Bruce Tarr commented on the Democratic supermajority's move, stating, "It's unfortunate that our Democratic colleagues refuse to debate issues that directly impact Massachusetts residents and would likely earn their support. Residents want a balanced, two-party government and bipartisan legislation, not a system that avoids responsibility and stacks the deck to bypass meaningful policy debate in Massachusetts."
"The state's rainy day fund is intended for true emergencies, not as a means to overspend tax dollars we may not have readily available in the budget. We've seen the revenue implications of enacting the millionaire's tax, and this amendment would help counteract its effects, encouraging wealth to remain in Massachusetts," Tarr concluded
###

Unfortunately, the Democratic majority pushed forward to not only end today's session but preclude any more sessions for the rest of the year. Senate Minority Leader Bruce Tarr commented on the Democratic supermajority's move, stating, "It's unfortunate that our Democratic colleagues refuse to debate issues that directly impact Massachusetts residents and would likely earn their support. Residents want a balanced, two-party government and bipartisan legislation, not a system that avoids responsibility and stacks the deck to bypass meaningful policy debate in Massachusetts." "The state's rainy day fund is intended for true emergencies, not as a means to overspend tax dollars we may not have readily available in the budget. We've seen the revenue implications of enacting the millionaire's tax, and this amendment would help counteract its effects, encouraging wealth to remain in Massachusetts," Tarr concluded | | == | MassGOP | == | == == | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street, Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | |

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Know Your Rights
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW0P8m9WN1

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW0P8m9WN1

Dear Fellow Patriot,

Since President Biden came into office
in 2021, government overreach has soared to new heights.

This brazen abuse of power is
unsettling and nauseating.

With today's polarized political
discourse in the public square, we find our conservative values
continually attacked by the increasingly radical elements of the
Left. You and I must band together and fight back to uphold our
shared American principles.

Our beacon in these uncertain times
remains the Constitution.

I know you love our country. And today,
I am reaching out to offer you complimentary access to The
Heritage Foundation's Digital Guide to the Constitution, a
comprehensive tool to help you articulate and defend your
conservative values amidst the political turbulence.

In this digital interactive guide,
you'll discover:

Detailed analysis of every clause
and amendment in the Constitution

Insights from over 100
constitutional scholars and legal experts, including former
Attorney General Ed Meese from President Reagan's tenure

A thorough review of what the
Constitution actually says and discussion of how it applies today

Copies of the Constitution and the
foundational documents that shaped it

You can get instant access to your FREE
guide now using this secure link:
https://secured.heritage.org/constitution

We find ourselves at a crossroads. The
nation is split on pivotal issues. The radical Left is rapidly
expanding the reaches of government into aspects of our lives
that we value as private and independent.

To counteract this shift, we must
enlighten as many conservatives as possible about the liberties
protected by our Constitution.

Understanding this document fully
empowers us to defend it passionately.

To join us in expanding your knowledge
of the Constitution today, please activate your complimentary
access by clicking the following link:
https://secured.heritage.org/constitution

This resource has received national
acclaim as an "excellent guide," and I sincerely believe it ranks
among the most powerful educational materials produced by the
Heritage Foundation. I know you'll find it enlightening and a
daily asset in reinforcing your principles.

Armed with this guide, you'll be
well-prepared to assertively champion the vision of our Founding
Fathers against the radical Left.

I invite you to use this link to get
your FREE Guide to the Constitution today!

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.

President, The Heritage Foundation

The Heritage Foundation | 214 Massachusetts Avenue, NE |
Washington, D.C. 20002

body:
I’m counting on you.
Peter,
We’ve done such incredible work together. Today, I’m asking you to keep working with us.
I’ve always stood up for the people of our Commonwealth — and I believe every person’s voice should be heard.
That’s why we have to see this across the finish line.

Democracy means ensuring everyone's voices are heard and that they matter. Pennsylvania is the birthplace of democracy, and I’m not giving up that fight. I hope you’re not ready to give up either.
**Let’s finish this strong:[Split $10 or more between Lucas Kunce and me to ensure every PA voter's voice is heard.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84163?refcode=em20241114-8670&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=8670%2E614464%2E3XhvxH)**

I’m as cool as a cucumber.
You have to be when the Fake News is calling our MAGA Movement “evil” on national television.
This is Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds.
I got real tired of seeing them lying about us with no repercussions whatsoever.
So I thought to myself, why not just go on their shows, dismantle their lies, and set the record straight _**one-on-one**_?
That’s exactly what I did. This whole election, I’ve been one of the few MAGA Congressman to destroy their narratives LIVE - all thanks to folks like yourself.
But I just went on MSNBC & what I heard made me realize we still have _**[so much work to do.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=abc11d0df24b4b938cf07e6084602821&_e=O8vY9DYwzjJVbcBIbULAKZBpFQ9VYloPjumBYRXKTifkFvuak4o-hZDbMQTo7HP7M9At90JDqobbl0qrMYvgDPyKUcynKObxaq9wpO-pcwJC8_eA5iREHXfKXJPlczNbs12dilxa7bgTXid1BHuzC0H9_LUxVNScjMZUQuwsgWoRLHMWjN08AmxCDEsCDwWU4pRvbNaEk9WYGya9KdsjCpagb2uFTfSXyt7D_DRRiX9_QuAg6GjH3pY6OveR7qy6E_0CFcONB5jq4ujSl7p0Z68WowynCRBOXPDHKkPc4khrMlbLpP3F02PaAz2MF6OV3WpwzYBOb1lwDgh1R8sIRAn9EfaC98nZ8qo-OwUl6RUx2p9jfeiWoxA_17qOKwBP-xBNQTEuAGwRKr5K1YbhumA6g52mlr-a_brZC3WNIRc%3D)**_
They interrogated me, demanding to know if I thought that President-Elect Trump was too dangerous to be in the White House, then even hinted that he wasn’t qualified to be President.
**I kept my cool and picked their phony narratives apart piece by piece like clockwork.**
Problem is, they’ll keep trying to push this nonsense every single day until he’s inaugurated, and if no one challenges them, their lies could seriously get out of hand.
I know the election is over, but we have to remain on the offensive all the way through the inauguration, and it’s your generous support that keeps me in the fight.
_**[So please, can you chip into Fake News Offensive Fund today?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=abc11d0df24b4b938cf07e6084602821&_e=O8vY9DYwzjJVbcBIbULAKZBpFQ9VYloPjumBYRXKTifkFvuak4o-hZDbMQTo7HP7M9At90JDqobbl0qrMYvgDPyKUcynKObxaq9wpO-pcwJC8_eA5iREHXfKXJPlczNbs12dilxa7bgTXid1BHuzC0H9_LUxVNScjMZUQuwsgWoRLHMWjN08AmxCDEsCDwWU4pRvbNaEk9WYGya9KdsjCpagb2uFTfSXyt7D_DRRiX9_QuAg6GjH3pY6OveR7qy63WSu-MDUMpZul7a76j72enmhXUMPUygUPs7NYcNnA5WFuHt1HnQ-zUHX8lXqeKqCIjOhqwVXPdbP_1q0RGin4hFyCMmxpZeFMrht6nehKYgDmzC8NIW8M3H4mlvEqQE6IB2tDPgF54qUGgVpK_Y5Y-B8DlP6cADlPBm73Q--g5Q%3D)**_ _****__****_

The first $41,300/$15,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to the DNC. The next $3,300/$5,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to Harris for President’s Recount Account. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting **info@kamalaharris.com**.The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
clean_body: | | | ** There has never been a more important moment to donate to the Harris Fight Fund program than right now. Here's why: Right now, there are U.S. Senate and House races that are either too close to call, or within the margin of recounts or certain legal challenges. They all need our help to get across the finish line. So here’s what happens next: We'll have staff on the ground continuing to support the races that need our help. We'll have to defend the races that are within the margin of recounts or certain legal challenges and that is going to take some time. All of this takes resources, Peter, so we're relying on you today. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | We'll be in touch with more, Kamala HQ | | | |

name: Michelle Steel [iPhone]
subject: We’re not in the clear yet, Fellow Patriot.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Election Day may be in the books, but my race isn’t done yet.
Sorry to reach out like this...

| |
---
| | | Friend, Election Day may be in the books, _but my race isn 't done yet._

_**[I'm neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=e992db81686e4b039436204fff4af00a&_e=p9q2uKjk5SzFDBST5Y0-NKrduX585NyYEsyuXCSUQgLgfpTzIwOIrQ1TltUYIIQKBQ18Fn7nVz1OhMn4xweJJw5_NN3RzL6FEzAVRIDWpXmN4HSxqEaUxRwA5ZO-JpxqCteaRX2-pmvKfLLD8gITjM_M-fjDhXv9run8z_k9Jq6Nj5t-f60zTaSrcgwmmPwai_WbhcqlmHEOSHiyNXc5sqYGxuawUUncvMO04AXgECdXP2y48XkYIPTB0nHtiQb0pHpm3z8tNiWC5eu6B-4CsNs-dUpl-lBzXuP807DC3-P6A6u3KWbLE2vL7mwydigfq8T27WDKPbAwjkNHBbvbuIDVjZGqkz5aDQvcljHxJPXoGDuBTYLBP8YQmhp2Qd6Rji55WswIQZqKg0tfcMXMHDDS5SXYm05xGLVYXg-jPOQ%3D "I’m neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.")**_

If we're going to pull this out and keep my seat and our House Majority RED, then I'm going to need all hands on deck.

I spent every dime I had just to get through Election Day, and now I'm running on fumes. I NEED your urgent support to help me keep this fight going before the ballots are all counted.

_**[Please, can I count on you, Friend?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=e992db81686e4b039436204fff4af00a&_e=p9q2uKjk5SzFDBST5Y0-NKrduX585NyYEsyuXCSUQgLgfpTzIwOIrQ1TltUYIIQKBQ18Fn7nVz1OhMn4xweJJw5_NN3RzL6FEzAVRIDWpXmN4HSxqEaUxRwA5ZO-JpxqCteaRX2-pmvKfLLD8gITjM_M-fjDhXv9run8z_k9Jq6Nj5t-f60zTaSrcgwmmPwai_WbhcqlmHEOSHiyNXc5sqYGxuawUUncvMO04AXgECdXP2y48XkYIPTB0nHtiQb0pHpm3z8tNiWC5eu6B-4CsBw5N5aasiK7pJouPsTx1fCf4BeJEocflTZHFzqT08b5VJFzGo5T6BTO7gGXbdPH9Eq1tyotT80pYY5Xm39cbsfNvau80DlTzSrkeIvehZrTp-6i0tMwRuL2IgFj3hOU5XUcM-FmoB7YQF_4iNg1waA%3D "Please, can I count on you, Friend?")**_

Thank you,

Michelle Steel

name: Del. Sam Rasoul
subject: Sam Runs for Re-election, RCPS Winter Coat Drive, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Email%20Logo.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Sam%20Headshot.png]
ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/sam%20and%20trish.jpg]
Canvass for Sam and Trish!
*this is a place holder until the new facebook event is created*
Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm.
Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012.
IN THE COMMUNITY
https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424 [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke River Contamination Settlement Reached Roanoke Young Democrats Canvass Tailgate
Without current regulations, the water contamination caused by these companies could have been so much worse. Come out to support Roanoke Valley Democratic candidates!
Read More [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] The Roanoke Young Democrats will be enjoying pizza, coffee, donuts and more before canvassing to knock for Trish White-Boyd, Sam Rasoul, Lily Franklin, Samantha Newell, Jade Harris, & Nancy Horn. Door knocking will begin about 12:30 pm!
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke EnVision Center Kids Movie Night - Sept. 28 Fall Harvest Festival
The movie is free and there will be snacks and much more! Fall into wellness at the Harvest Festival!
Read More Celebrate the end of farm season with fun experiences for the whole family. Try new activities to support your well-being. Connect with others in a beautiful outdoor space. Free meals available with registration. This event is free and open to everyone!
Read More [https://web.cvent.com/event/19422342-be4f-417d-9fc3-6a6bf883e794/summary]
https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992 [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/ [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] Read More [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RCDC.jpeg] Join the Roanoke City Democrats!
Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month. This month we are meeting at 6 pm at the Main Library (706 S Jefferson St, Roanoke, VA 24016). Sign up for meeting reminders and other information here [https://www.roanokedemocrats.com/subscribe] .
Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm.
Join Roanoke Young Dems! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RYD.png]
Meetings occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies.
Contact: YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com [YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com] to get involved!
Donate Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samrasoul]
Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime.
My very best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-07-29%20at%203.44.06%20PM%20%281%29.png]
Del. Sam Rasoul
https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA [https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA] https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul [https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul] https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en]
Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
P.O. Box 13842
Roanoke, VA 24037
United States

name: Rhena Hicks
subject: The fight for an affordable Virginia continues!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97088365/512237644/685859712?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS84NTU2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTMzNzJkZi1hOWEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5FvuaP0dyyMxmOOzHPvn2nXCk87B56yVfLNuFKTd3YY=&emci=747e085f-a281-ef11-8474-6045bda8aae9&emdi=1e3372df-a9a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=6782597)
---
| | Friends- With the 2025 Virginia General Assembly session just around the corner, we are working hard to make this session a great one for affordability in Virginia. Looking to get involved? Here are a few ways you can join us in the fight for affordability. 1\. Share Your Experience: Do you have a story about how the cost of prescription drugs, lack of affordable childcare and paid leave, unaffordable housing, or hidden fees have affected you? Share it with us [here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97088368/512237649/1364106772?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS84NTU2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTMzNzJkZi1hOWEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5FvuaP0dyyMxmOOzHPvn2nXCk87B56yVfLNuFKTd3YY=&emci=747e085f-a281-ef11-8474-6045bda8aae9&emdi=1e3372df-a9a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=6782597) so we can share your story with legislators and the community.
2\. Contribute! _[Chipping in $5 today makes a huge difference](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97088370/512237656/-521046843?refcode=directory&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS84NTU2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTMzNzJkZi1hOWEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5FvuaP0dyyMxmOOzHPvn2nXCk87B56yVfLNuFKTd3YY=) _as we advocate for legislation, organize events, and connect with our communities.
---
| | [**Contribute Today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97088371/512237661/-521046843?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS84NTU2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTMzNzJkZi1hOWEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5FvuaP0dyyMxmOOzHPvn2nXCk87B56yVfLNuFKTd3YY=)
---

clean_body: | | | | | Friends- With the 2025 Virginia General Assembly session just around the corner, we are working hard to make this session a great one for affordability in Virginia. Looking to get involved? Here are a few ways you can join us in the fight for affordability. 1\. Share Your Experience: Do you have a story about how the cost of prescription drugs, lack of affordable childcare and paid leave, unaffordable housing, or hidden fees have affected you? Share it with us so we can share your story with legislators and the community. 2\. Contribute! = as we advocate for legislation, organize events, and connect with our communities. | | = | | 3\. Share and Stay Tuned on Socials: Every month we have events, legislative updates, and stories from Virginians to share with you! Share a post, follow, and join us for an event to stay involved. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | We are so grateful for your support as we head into this next General Assembly session. | | Fellow Patriot, _
It has been a huge week for us at America First Legal. _ **
I want to share news of _an enormous legal victory_ we won in court: **Our team at America First Legal, working with Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton and a coalition of other courageous state Attorneys General **won a lawsuit to stop the Biden-Harris Administration 's DHS from granting administrative amnesty and a fast track pathway to citizenship for hundreds of thousands of illegal aliens** in the United States.
---

As you know, the Biden-Harris Administration has dedicated itself to the decimation of our immigration system and the erasure of our borders.
America First Legal was built to fight the Deep State and win. That's why your support of America First Legal is so important- we do the heavy lifting in the courtroom that stops the far-left's malicious attempts to transform and destroy America cold. _**[
Please support our work so we can continue to Save America >>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=2aa41b007bf6459b953d3cb5d61aa4d1&_e=_BEK_jY2WvM2K6vxWiA0jCi-cKJYl5nmefTKuIo0wbCLhjH0h6Xq1fGOuBeBMqSfe-Pr5NmdVchggM141zlG8t2eq4Rel14ZCtGCnhlU9MVPgBAXm8NQtQ5SYnX5kcvgoNLFWuNfbxVNZ-PVd7mnrPwyiGiDZf_7pejNUYUr6kbdp6fvCGtCqXm34ipksv2uYzGOXQVHO2Axs5HggKf4w3BAKr5QN5HQ8nxapll8nlSlAXKYSzX7Y4q--gvtEJ_pbfU3i4qrpsYd4Fje_pUe4UXsu7_26TGlIeF9qZQJwQDe--W5EZaI1A_sIvL98Y_VxJW-KWSzk5cAfasXTparpBNfDp-DnUVhVxUroHFJ4bhsXhpCcCC3Oj9o_bebf9F0E85E9N7YxYPPLMswXvON6DlaMOkUJ1EEcDGlnA0YvTabgKSsdI0upcCzqk3TQeolfRk9AXUS8gK2jgYC6sSyFMaNJn2F83wTy8s3lQ7nbJ0DGyiqetkOENTOUU34vP5-) Thank you! **_ _

name: State Dems HQ (via DLCC.org)
subject: $7 today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Every special election marks a chance to protect or expand Democratic power in statehouses nationwide – $7 helps our party make the most of every opportunity to build power. | | |
---
| |
---|---
$7. That’s all we’re asking for to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** _Seven_ special elections are on the horizon in states like Delaware, Louisiana, and Virginia – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** Every special election marks a chance to protect or gain Democratic seats in statehouses nationwide – $7 helps our party make the most of every opportunity to build power. **Reason #3:** State legislatures have an important role to play in protecting access to the ballot box, abortion rights, and more – $7 helps elect leaders who will stand up to the ultra-extreme MAGA agenda in our statehouses. [So what do you say? name: Bob Casey
subject: Let’s finish strong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I'm counting on you.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4843%2E552475%2EeLUdpr)
Peter,
We’ve done such incredible work together. Today, I’m asking you to keep working with us.
I’ve always stood up for the people of our Commonwealth — and I believe every person’s voice should be heard.
That’s why we have to see this across the finish line.
[**I’ll never stop fighting for Pennsylvania, but I need you with me to help us keep going:****Will you help us fight to ensure that every Pennsylvanians' voice is heard by donating $****5****or more right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241114-2?refcode=em20241114-2&refcode2=4843_552475_eLUdpr&akid=4843%2E552475%2EeLUdpr)

name: Sarah McBride
subject: My conversation with the hosts of The View
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Watch my interview.
#
I wanted to share this with you.
Last Friday, I sat down with the hosts of The View to talk about my pride in Delaware and my policy priorities. We also had an important conversation about the need for us to see the very real pain across our country.
**[You can watch my full interview here.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-2024114?refcode=em20241114-1556&refcode2=1556_21716_OIiEO5&akid=1556%2E21716%2EOIiEO5)**
**[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-2024114?refcode=em20241114-1556&refcode2=1556_21716_OIiEO5&akid=1556%2E21716%2EOIiEO5)**
**[Watch Now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-2024114?refcode=em20241114-1556&refcode2=1556_21716_OIiEO5&akid=1556%2E21716%2EOIiEO5)**
There is a lot of pain to go around in this country. And I have to tell you — Democrat or Republican or Independent, progressive or conservative or moderate — the worst thing we can do when someone tells us they are in pain is to dismiss it.
But too often, we see a politics that pits our pain against each other. We see political leaders diminish the pain of those on the other side of the partisan divide.
Everyone’s pain matters, regardless of their background or how they vote. People don’t have to be “right” for what they’re facing to be “wrong.” Unfortunately, there is enough pain to go around. And any therapist will tell you that the first step to healing is to have your pain seen.
**What we need are elected leaders who see that pain across differences and disagreements. And, instead of turning it into hate and bigotry, we need them to actually do something about it.**
As Congresswoman-elect, I’m committed to fighting for everyone — including people who don’t understand me or might not fight for me. Because we _can_ heal our divides and deliver for all communities.
[**If that’s the kind of radical compassion you believe we need from our leaders right now, please pitch in $5 to keep our movement strong. Our work is just getting started.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-2024114?refcode=em20241114-1556&amount=5&refcode2=1556_21716_OIiEO5&akid=1556%2E21716%2EOIiEO5)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-2024114?amount=5&refcode=em20241114-1556&refcode2=1556_21716_OIiEO5&akid=1556%2E21716%2EOIiEO5)**
Thank you,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em2024114-1&t=1&refcode2=1556_21716_OIiEO5&akid=1556%2E21716%2EOIiEO5)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1556%2E21716%2EOIiEO5)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1556%2E21716%2EOIiEO5)

Paid for by McBride for Delaware
clean_body: Watch my interview. I wanted to share this with you. Last Friday, I sat down with the hosts of The View to talk about my pride in Delaware and my policy priorities. We also had an important conversation about the need for us to see the very real pain across our country. There is a lot of pain to go around in this country. And I have to tell you — Democrat or Republican or Independent, progressive or conservative or moderate — the worst thing we can do when someone tells us they are in pain is to dismiss it. But too often, we see a politics that pits our pain against each other. We see political leaders diminish the pain of those on the other side of the partisan divide. Everyone’s pain matters, regardless of their background or how they vote. People don’t have to be “right” for what they’re facing to be “wrong.” Unfortunately, there is enough pain to go around. And any therapist will tell you that the first step to healing is to have your pain seen. What we need are elected leaders who see that pain across differences and disagreements. And, instead of turning it into hate and bigotry, we need them to actually do something about it. As Congresswoman-elect, I’m committed to fighting for everyone — including people who don’t understand me or might not fight for me. Because we can heal our divides and deliver for all communities. Thank you, Sarah McBride

But there's the way that it should be, and the way that it is, and our job is to eliminate the gap between the two.

Supporting President Trump's push for 50-state concealed carry reciprocity is a great first step. It means standing up for the rights of law-abiding citizens across the country by ensuring that your rights don't disappear at state lines.

**[Add your name here to support President Trump's push for 50-state concealed carry reciprocity.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=dc2b3cf54c5c43129e41ebfd43e799b6&_e=mfT82gwVHEsp8ldYkhZXHXXe4Y7SOzQ8HZ0rRRwxzHoUz1JxHFUSubEJDgY94QwpBHdiesDjhwGy9C_tatVz6gYQqDCe3ov5S3ynLswn05lPrTfMSlH2XUJd6qa71YVIW-M2_fQ8CkbtEJqll0oAU07cQwMPBE6c5FcZv6WnIUt2XLXZz1-1aaXjrn1usrbjdsya_LlXFaOGHvk7e4bhALTxf5LULvvoYSwGByHAn_BfSwOofFY4M__hcBwkv81GhGsS72eGIjwA7SExxgcCq_ns33VfLmxIVWPVJImT2nBcmfZwxGPEm7RNB7S3sKur3-RFckic2kEW4bsX9b_PbcyPvC-GcrLxFZOkpDIEeOk%3D)**

Thank you, [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=dc2b3cf54c5c43129e41ebfd43e799b6&_e=mfT82gwVHEsp8ldYkhZXHXXe4Y7SOzQ8HZ0rRRwxzHoUz1JxHFUSubEJDgY94QwpBHdiesDjhwGy9C_tatVz6gYQqDCe3ov5S3ynLswn05lPrTfMSlH2XUJd6qa71YVIW-M2_fQ8CkbtEJqll0oAU07cQwMPBE6c5FcZv6WnIUt2XLXZz1-1aaXjrn1usrbjQcn7P1RW8lqoaOoCYQygL1l-YPR3Bl_R0bYA3ItKSyXUGGEtHp5TNqu9DjC_-N4byNPL8qwxe1WjlVzB5cWjdBVrlf8Ldk8NbvR8Qbh-kcYa9b5IRRxePf4dfqUzfUCISdYwZFfZiDVmQXkh29BnIHbQyUmnWWd4qTtH5jp-_zc%3D)

_Pat Harrigan_
