[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151614528&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjE0NTI4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE2MDQ4NDUsImV4cCI6MTczNDE5Njg0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.BySfr_aUcQ3jYD9EnkJk03c2EXpDzjb54V20q-fqYBg)
Some on the left have pushed the theory that [Elon Musk used Starlink to somehow changed voting machines to help Trump win](https://substack.com/redirect/4beb2d9c-36ea-48be-8e31-0a291f13e405?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). This theory is unfortunate, at best, for two reasons. One, because there's no tangible evidence for this claim and it is critical we not resort to MAGA-style conspiracies. Two, because the harsh truth is MAGA Republicans have worked in broad daylight to steal elections by passing voter suppression bills, and Democrats have simply not done enough to counter them. If we have any hope of saving our republic, we must reject conspiracy theories, and instead effectively repeal the GOP's real and destructive voter suppression tactics. But how? **Let 's Address This.**
I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I welcome your support. **Subscribe below and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..wMaaGI_bizKwA1fUszxZJC1kfA6wMI8rQKimcXFarcs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=151614528)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/84a4c3fd-278e-4904-823e-9a932fef6f39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Voters oppose voter suppression in Georgia 2021. [Credit: Lynn Anderson / AP]
A few weeks ago I [wrote about how the SAVE Act is the MAGA Republican attempt to revive Jim Crow](https://substack.com/redirect/2f3050b4-312b-4b60-9a4e-1f5ff7bc291b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) voter suppression in America. This Project 2025 priority is already being enacted now in 2024, and as I predicted before the election, ultimately helped Donald Trump win. Republicans have 'stolen' this and other elections through a series of sophisticated and calculated voter suppression bills and policies passed in broad daylight. And unless we repeal these tactics, MAGAs will continue to 'win' by denying people the right to vote. Let's break down four of their more sinister tactics.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..wMaaGI_bizKwA1fUszxZJC1kfA6wMI8rQKimcXFarcs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151614528)
### 1\. Gerrymandering
The Brennan Center for Justice [reports](https://substack.com/redirect/55a455b1-a3c4-4c1f-aa12-98abff6ad8b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that after successfully blocking the Freedom to Vote Act in 2022, which would have issued a massive blow to gerrymandering, Republicans 'won' the gerrymander olympics. Put in practical terms, they received a 16 House seat advantage over Democrats in gerrymandered districts. Meaning, all things being equal, Republicans built 16 more supermajority red districts than did Democrats, making it that much more difficult for Democrats to win back the House. This tactic worked in the 2024 election, as Republicans successfully retained the House by less than a 16 seat win. Given that [nearly 90% of Americans oppose gerrymandering](https://substack.com/redirect/724089e5-4aa5-49cf-87ab-6382d47b23ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), we must continue to raise awareness and active people across the political spectrum to pass the Freedom to Vote Act and ban partisan gerrymandering.
### 2\. Hundreds of Voter Suppression Bills
Republicans on the state level have proposed or passed [more than 100 voter suppression bills](https://substack.com/redirect/7a253abd-a72b-4838-a5f0-5263f9418bc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), specifically targeting Black and brown and low income voters. After Trump's loss in 2020, [at least 28 states](https://substack.com/redirect/7a253abd-a72b-4838-a5f0-5263f9418bc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) introduced or passed legislation to "_primarily seek to limit mail-in voting access, add voter ID requirements and make it harder to get on or stay on the voter rolls_." Republicans know that Black and brown voters disproportionately vote Democratic, so rather than change their own policies to attract voters of color, Republicans change laws to restrict voters of color from voting--even if that means shutting down access to the polls. And speaking of shutting down polling locations, Republicans have gone nuclear in doing so.
### 3\. Shut Down Polling Locations in BIPOC Areas
Since Republicans gutted the [Voting Rights Act in 2013 in Shelby v. Holder](https://substack.com/redirect/57cb22ce-3863-40ca-a4e8-4867a8cf58ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), red states [have shut down more than 100,000 polling location in predominantly Black and Latino neighborhoods](https://substack.com/redirect/6585845b-6c4a-4c74-9b1f-d39709f1684d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Yes, _100,000+ closed polling locations_.
> National data from the independent, nonpartisan U.S. Election Assistance Commission shows declining polling place availability nationwide. A [2018 survey](https://substack.com/redirect/182e54d4-39c4-479f-b39e-fb70dca4bd29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) found more than 200,000 polling places in use. That number dropped to just over 132,000 [in 2020's report](https://substack.com/redirect/cec4f48b-b43d-4aa5-92f5-dfdf4a31e982?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and fell again to [94,793](https://substack.com/redirect/19319373-b76c-41e5-b3bf-ab4f30bbb19a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) physical polling places in 2022. Fewer places to cast a ballot can be a barrier to voting for many people, especially low-income individuals who may lack transportation or time off to vote.
Shutting down more than half of all polling locations, while zero demonstrable election fraud exists, is what voters suppression looks like. Texas is one of the worst offenders, and overtly racist in how they closed locations. A Guardian analysis found [that](https://substack.com/redirect/813d6976-c5d8-45f6-b5ce-99c9a41afb00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> The 50 counties that gained the most Black and Latinx residents between 2012 and 2018 closed 542 polling sites, compared to just 34 closures in the 50 counties that have gained the fewest black and Latinx residents. This is despite the fact that the population in the former group of counties has risen by 2.5 million people, whereas in the latter category the total population has fallen by over 13,000.
Again -- none of this is conspiracy or theory. This is the end result of Republicans working hard to restrict voting access, particularly for Black and brown voters. And as you can see, it is working. In addition to shutting down polling locations, Republicans are [limiting voting hours, banning Sunday "souls to the polls" drives, and have banned giving water to people waiting in line](https://substack.com/redirect/cef53b63-a456-4dca-9111-69a97202e2a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--knowing full well that their racist policies [force Black people to wait twice as long as white people to vote](https://substack.com/redirect/4bb4108e-36e0-41cf-a648-1b36d0931dc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..wMaaGI_bizKwA1fUszxZJC1kfA6wMI8rQKimcXFarcs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151614528)
### 4\. Purging Millions of Legitimate Voters
Especially in the run up to the 2024 election, Republicans did everything possible to overtly purge voters from voter rolls, all with zero evidence of preventing fraud. My [viral tweet](https://substack.com/redirect/c941c7d7-d4cd-47e2-8bc4-cb38aa2213b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on this very topic exceeded 20,000 retweets, 60,000 likes, and 3 million views: (forgive the misspelling of _eligible_ but such is social media).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2c67b39a-3727-411b-bb27-843838d657b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Oklahoma MAGA GOP Governor [purged more than 435,000 voters from the voter rolls](https://substack.com/redirect/f8847dfc-17a0-4f75-9b1f-68253776a649?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Of them, at least 194,962 voters were valid voters but removed anyway due to made up excuses like 'address verification.' And while I stated that Texas purged 500K eligible voters, in fact, [the full number of purged names exceeds 1 million](https://substack.com/redirect/99761694-270a-4b62-aa63-c411dd24e775?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), with roughly half of them eligible voters:
> About half of the voters removed have died, requested to be be taken off or are living in another state, based on figures from the governor's office. Nearly 7,000 were noncitizens who had registered illegally, and about 6,000 were convicted felons unable to vote. **About 463,000 were on what Texas calls its["suspense list,"](https://substack.com/redirect/58976283-30b9-4aff-a7b3-68e114a419e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) where counties place voters who don't respond to requested certification forms.** The removal effort is part of a [sweeping package](https://substack.com/redirect/126003a3-fe57-40e1-993f-4a906182619a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of [voting restrictions](https://substack.com/redirect/161c00ed-80da-4121-b9ff-076d826b8a9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the Texas Legislature passed after the 2020 presidential election.
Note--the "_suspense list_ " has nothing to do with suspicion of illegal or unregistered voting. These are US citizens, already confirmed and registered to vote by showing their ID, and still being purged from the list. As is [well documented](https://substack.com/redirect/52c862dd-073e-45e3-84ce-e6b9d46c9807?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), this targets low income and people of color more than white people--hence the continued racist voter suppression. Litigation is one path to rebuke this oppression, however it is not always successful. In Virginia a DOJ lawsuit filed against MAGA Governor Youngkin--for his attempts to purge legitimate voters--[ultimately failed before the right wing MAGA Supreme Court](https://substack.com/redirect/ebbae8c9-f766-4533-92e0-d7af91a0aa01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..wMaaGI_bizKwA1fUszxZJC1kfA6wMI8rQKimcXFarcs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151614528)
### Conclusion
As a reminder, a Washington Post and AP study [over the last 50 years found no examples of systemic voter fraud, and no examples of voter fraud that could have even remotely overturned any State or Federal election](https://substack.com/redirect/cfd53f82-e3f0-4830-8d03-4a53e10b351a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It is no wonder that [Donald Trump shut down his own "voter fraud commission" after finding no such evidence](https://substack.com/redirect/d224b92d-2876-4f1e-8170-d05a7542ff49?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Moreover, Trump then set up a second commission to "find" voter fraud, [but then also shut it down after it found no such fraud](https://substack.com/redirect/af217bf4-1a4c-4d94-8d20-25647043ed37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Therefore, I urge my fellow Americans to reject the conspiracy theories, and instead channel your energy to countering the stated public policy of Republicans, which is to win by suppressing votes and denying voting access. We counter Republicans by urging our members of Congress to expand voting access, registering our friends and neighbors to vote, demanding litigation against voter suppression tactics, and investing resources in the public voices calling out this oppression. Indeed, we cannot effectively counter disinformation without meaningful awareness of the disinformation.
MAGA Republicans know they cannot win on ideas and policy, so they commit voter suppression in broad daylight. That is the story of actual stolen elections--not a Starlink conspiracy theory. MAGAs are screaming loudly that they have no regard for democracy or a government represented by We the People. We should believe them, and vote to ensure they never have that kind of power again.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..wMaaGI_bizKwA1fUszxZJC1kfA6wMI8rQKimcXFarcs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151614528)
_**Why Your Support Matters:** Every dollar we spend is a vote for the kind of future we want. Subscribe and help me create a future more committed to justice and universal human rights. Thank you._

subject: Gabbard + Gaetz + Hegseth

body:
If we can find a way to stop them, we will. If we can’t, we’re going to make their lives a living hell for the next four years.
#
Peter —
Yesterday we wrote to you about the “Purity Boards” that Donald Trump aims to establish as he works to purge the Military of senior flag officers who he views as a threat to his dictatorial aims.
Today, we’re writing to you about the people he is going to look to carry out his agenda.
First, **Trump announced that Pete Hegseth, a devout Trump loyalist, is his pick for Secretary of Defense.** Fox News Host. Put aside the partisanship, the ideology, your own personal feelings. Hegseth served, it’s true. And it is also true that he is completely unqualified to lead 2.8 million Active Duty, Guardsmen, Reservists, and civilian contractors. But that’s not the point.
When Trump asks, he will say yes.
Yesterday, **Trump announced Tulsi Gabbard as his pick for Director of National Intelligence.** The DNI sits on top of the entire American intelligence apparatus — the CIA, the NSA, the intel arms of each Military branch, and other executive intel agencies. This person is the nexus for ALL intelligence analysis and operationalization, and Trump is handing the job to a Putin apologist and a buddy to Syrian dictator Bashar al Assad. In other words, exactly what Trump’s looking for.
When Trump asks, she will say yes.
Last, but certainly not least,**Trump announced that Matt Gaetz is his pick for Attorney General.** America’s top cop job will go to a man who just last year was under FBI investigation for sex trafficking a minor, and who just barely dodged a damning House Ethics Committee report by resigning from office. Reporting indicates that Gaetz stood out from the crowd to Trump because he said, **“Yeah, I’ll go over there and start cuttin’ f***in’ heads.”**
When Trump asks, he will enthusiastically say yes.
Don’t make the mistake of thinking that these are “sacrificial lambs” as some have said. These are Trump’s picks. By formal Senate approval or recess appointment, he will work to get them in his cabinet.
VoteVets is going to work every angle we can to ensure the public knows who these appointees are and what they would do if they serve in the highest levels of government. The best thing we can do right now is shine a flashlight on these people, **but if we can find a way to stop them, we will. If we can’t, we’re going to make their lives a living hell for the next four years.**
[**But as the fight takes shape, we need you with us. Please, make a donation to VoteVets as we gear up to defend our democracy from Trump and his cabinet. It’s going to take each of us doing our part.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov24.0GjwC1&refcode=em241114-1-30&t=1&akid=33976%2E3013755%2Eze0IxM)**

Peter — Yesterday we wrote to you about the “Purity Boards” that Donald Trump aims to establish as he works to purge the Military of senior flag officers who he views as a threat to his dictatorial aims. Today, we’re writing to you about the people he is going to look to carry out his agenda. First, Trump announced that Pete Hegseth, a devout Trump loyalist, is his pick for Secretary of Defense. Fox News Host. Put aside the partisanship, the ideology, your own personal feelings. Hegseth served, it’s true. And it is also true that he is completely unqualified to lead 2.8 million Active Duty, Guardsmen, Reservists, and civilian contractors. But that’s not the point. When Trump asks, he will say yes. Yesterday, Trump announced Tulsi Gabbard as his pick for Director of National Intelligence. The DNI sits on top of the entire American intelligence apparatus — the CIA, the NSA, the intel arms of each Military branch, and other executive intel agencies. This person is the nexus for ALL intelligence analysis and operationalization, and Trump is handing the job to a Putin apologist and a buddy to Syrian dictator Bashar al Assad. In other words, exactly what Trump’s looking for. When Trump asks, she will say yes. Last, but certainly not least,Trump announced that Matt Gaetz is his pick for Attorney General. America’s top cop job will go to a man who just last year was under FBI investigation for sex trafficking a minor, and who just barely dodged a damning House Ethics Committee report by resigning from office. Reporting indicates that Gaetz stood out from the crowd to Trump because he said, “Yeah, I’ll go over there and start cuttin’ fin’ heads.” When Trump asks, he will enthusiastically say yes. Don’t make the mistake of thinking that these are “sacrificial lambs” as some have said. These are Trump’s picks. By formal Senate approval or recess appointment, he will work to get them in his cabinet. VoteVets is going to work every angle we can to ensure the public knows who these appointees are and what they would do if they serve in the highest levels of government. The best thing we can do right now is shine a flashlight on these people, but if we can find a way to stop them, we will. If we can’t, we’re going to make their lives a living hell for the next four years. Thanks to supporters like you, we secured a **HUGE** victory and showed the radical Left that Florida isn’t backing down.

But while we may have won the battle, the fight to protect our state and our values is far from over.
The radical Left is still working overtime to turn Florida BLUE, determined to push their woke agenda into every corner of our country.

Here at Team Haridopolos, we’re standing strong against these attacks—but we can’t do it alone.
**Right now, we’re only $5,150 short of our critical mid-month fundraising goal**.

Missing this goal would weaken our momentum and risk giving the Left an opening in our backyard. We need to stay on track to hold Florida steady.

Thank you for any contribution you can make as we push forward.

Mike Haridopolos

subject: We’re not in the clear yet, Fellow Patriot.

body:
Election Day may be in the books, but my race isn’t done yet.
Sorry to reach out like this...

| |
---
| | | Friend, Election Day may be in the books, _but my race isn 't done yet._

_**[I'm neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=062d07527f7f4043923cc2ec252b15db&_e=TcoXht5ACAD5zh-aGzHTWgepUJMeQ9yYhZCWwnlbJfdq7vLr-CPfuRFMWr4eeDIxLQyq9uqBdPCj8R00uo4HpQ_mc9KK4OI5xLsGCDQjiWyQ60YIdjUcJffyRIEvb5VcdXoVbWDTp4T51h8DHb0dIyTVwFedNpvkIxqf2NljfZ-P1XW83VyzT4hWY047B8Je93qRb1LzQxFsU-cOLpM2ga_jbR1a_tQm8tZpDFxqI4ezi_rFBGPUyABWIx5z5-1QfOdjWImyWaU8jQgt2pcZctGM3iDSbF3GBYx08y8x_8vaIwCeh8ZSU-iTMmEBz3yD-YMBDUEi9iWIkfv-FjQm-KPHXdZ7plre2uE9OPy-vcwRbFNPkWuG6HcHmDY_esjwdI8eCCNsnkODdwPd9CNq5yoZdUTOmVXYZSiHz4z_z1g%3D "I’m neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.")**_

If we're going to pull this out and keep my seat and our House Majority RED, then I'm going to need all hands on deck.

I spent every dime I had just to get through Election Day, and now I'm running on fumes. I NEED your urgent support to help me keep this fight going before the ballots are all counted.

_**[Please, can I count on you, Friend?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=062d07527f7f4043923cc2ec252b15db&_e=TcoXht5ACAD5zh-aGzHTWgepUJMeQ9yYhZCWwnlbJfdq7vLr-CPfuRFMWr4eeDIxLQyq9uqBdPCj8R00uo4HpQ_mc9KK4OI5xLsGCDQjiWyQ60YIdjUcJffyRIEvb5VcdXoVbWDTp4T51h8DHb0dIyTVwFedNpvkIxqf2NljfZ-P1XW83VyzT4hWY047B8Je93qRb1LzQxFsU-cOLpM2ga_jbR1a_tQm8tZpDFxqI4ezi_rFBGPUyABWIx5z5-1QfOdjWImyWaU8jQgt2pcZcsuw6qKTlriBBGKsa5Adyy2vaOHeV05DJxe44S3LNj5Lm8BzcSSRB2QR82KRJItx-tg9k7OkV9LQtCsHZ43ay8wRcWv5VwiNhBvuax_g-gUsGnGPQGb8bD3NJSzDEzs7tMTsZO_tdcvWNzUcLjze1Tk%3D "Please, can I count on you, Friend?")**_

Thank you,

Michelle Steel

Team Jones, did you see the announcement that Jay is running to be Virginia’s next Attorney General ?

subject: BREAKING: Republicans hold the House!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

BREAKING: REPUBLICANS WILL HOLD THEIR HOUSE MAJORITY

Fellow American,

We've done it.

Republicans will deliver President Trump a GOVERNING TRIFECTA
in Washington.

We took the White House.

We took the Senate.

And now, we've officially held our Republican House majority.

None of this would be possible without the generous support of
patriots like you.

Your votes, your donations, your survey responses, and your
prayers are the ONLY reason that we've emerged victorious.

This historic victory doesn't belong to me, it belongs to YOU,
the American people who put your faith in us.

From the bottom of my heart, I want to say thank you.

I want you to know that every time I pick up the gavel, I will
do it with you in mind.

I will never, ever forget the patriots who made our victory

I want you to know that every time I pick up the gavel, I will do it with you in mind. I will never, ever forget the patriots who made our victory possible. name: Sharice Davids
subject: My deepest gratitude
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Serving our community in Congress is an honor I will never take for granted

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97094591/512257376/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTBlZTVlNy1iMmEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UNSxCgCM2--cWo7hZLJoHiwUJ5v6v5r3U2Agp6wsh5c=) Friend, I wanted to reach out and share a few thoughts. First and foremost, I want to express my deepest gratitude for your support throughout this election. It was a difficult election, but thanks to the efforts of supporters like you, we won this battleground race here in KS-03. Serving our community in Congress is an honor I will never take for granted. That’s why I’ve always been willing to work with anyone to deliver real solutions to families all across Kansas — and that will never change, no matter what party is in charge in Washington. While I am disappointed by the results of the presidential election, I respect the choice of the American people — and I commend Vice President Kamala Harris for running a positive, future-focused campaign. As our country transitions to a new administration, I promise to continue to serve the people of KS-03 with integrity, honesty, and an unwavering commitment to results. I’ve never believed that politics should be all about stopping your opponents and nothing more. Ultimately, it’s about bringing people together, getting things done, and building a better, more prosperous future where everyone has the freedom and opportunity to get ahead. **Those are the values I’m proud to fight for every day in the halls of Congress.** Serving the people of KS-03 is the honor of a lifetime, friend. And although it may feel like our country is facing an uncertain future, please know that I’m going to do everything within my power to defend our fundamental rights, stand up for our values, and continue to fight for the freedoms we hold dear. For the next two years, I’m going to work as hard as I possibly can to offer common-sense solutions to the most pressing issues facing our communities, bring more resources and good-paying jobs to KS-03, and fight for our shared values — like protecting our health care, defending the right to choose, and so much more. **No matter what lies ahead, I am committed to putting in the work for the people of KS-03.** Finally, I wanted to say thank you one last time for all you’ve done to support this campaign. I am immensely grateful to have you by my side — because there’s a lot of hard work in front of us. I wouldn’t be here without your support, friend. And I know that, together, we’ll be ready for whatever’s next. Let’s keep up the fight. With gratitude, Sharice Davids | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97094594/512257381/1909760850?refcode=email_111224_post-election&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTBlZTVlNy1iMmEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UNSxCgCM2--cWo7hZLJoHiwUJ5v6v5r3U2Agp6wsh5c=)

clean_body: Serving our community in Congress is an honor I will never take for granted = Friend, I wanted to reach out and share a few thoughts. First and foremost, I want to express my deepest gratitude for your support throughout this election. It was a difficult election, but thanks to the efforts of supporters like you, we won this battleground race here in KS-03. Serving our community in Congress is an honor I will never take for granted. That’s why I’ve always been willing to work with anyone to deliver real solutions to families all across Kansas — and that will never change, no matter what party is in charge in Washington. While I am disappointed by the results of the presidential election, I respect the choice of the American people — and I commend Vice President Kamala Harris for running a positive, future-focused campaign. As our country transitions to a new administration, I promise to continue to serve the people of KS-03 with integrity, honesty, and an unwavering commitment to results. I’ve never believed that politics should be all about stopping your opponents and nothing more. Ultimately, it’s about bringing people together, getting things done, and building a better, more prosperous future where everyone has the freedom and opportunity to get ahead. Those are the values I’m proud to fight for every day in the halls of Congress. Serving the people of KS-03 is the honor of a lifetime, friend. And although it may feel like our country is facing an uncertain future, please know that I’m going to do everything within my power to defend our fundamental rights, stand up for our values, and continue to fight for the freedoms we hold dear. For the next two years, I’m going to work as hard as I possibly can to offer common-sense solutions to the most pressing issues facing our communities, bring more resources and good-paying jobs to KS-03, and fight for our shared values — like protecting our health care, defending the right to choose, and so much more. No matter what lies ahead, I am committed to putting in the work for the people of KS-03. Finally, I wanted to say thank you one last time for all you’ve done to support this campaign. I am immensely grateful to have you by my side — because there’s a lot of hard work in front of us. I wouldn’t be here without your support, friend. And I know that, together, we’ll be ready for whatever’s next. Let’s keep up the fight. With gratitude, Sharice Davids | | = | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to . | | = | PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS Sharice for Congress 13851 W. 63rd St. #303 Shawnee, KS 66216 United States

clean_body: | | Let me pull back the curtain on where things stand. → As of this morning, there are still several House races in swing districts that are too close to call. → There are still thousands of votes left to be counted. → But Republicans are betting that Democrats will give up in despair. = I know many of us may be feeling helpless right now. But I am urging you to stay focused on the task at hand. = It all depends on what we do at this moment. Winning battleground House races could be the difference between an emboldened MAGA Majority... Or a historically TINY majority that hampers Trump’s dangerous Project 2025 agenda. It is paramount that Democrats pull together to ensure every last vote is counted FAIRLY – but for this, we need resources. = = | | = = = = = Thank you, NANCY | Volunteer with Team Pelosi to ensure every last vote is counted! | Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. **This is an OUTRAGE.**
Trump hasn’t even taken office yet, and the Democrats are ALREADY in a full-blown panic.
Gavin Newsom has just convened a special session of the California legislature to draft legislation to directly SABOTAGE Trump’s agenda.
In his own words, they want to “Trump-proof” the entire state.
This is NOTHING LESS than a blatant attack on the WILL OF THE PEOPLE.
_**Let’s make this crystal clear: OVER 40% OF CALIFORNIANS VOTED FOR TRUMP.**_
That’s right - 40% of Californians want his policies, not Newsom’s disastrous failures.
_**But it gets WORSE:**_
Newsom has made it clear that this is only the FIRST of MANY “actions” his administration will take to BLOCK Trump’s agenda.
The Democrats have been working for YEARS to strip away our rights.
And now, here’s Newsom undermining the President who was duly elected by a MAJORITY of the people nationwide
We MUST take action NOW.
This is a DIRECT threat to every Republican, every conservative, and every patriot who believes in free and fair governance.
Join the California GOP in DEMANDING that Newsom HALT his radical efforts to block Trump’s agenda.
**We need 10,000 signatures IMMEDIATELY.**
__[_**FNAME, we need YOUR name on that list. Time is running out.**_](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d4672d1b09924cc09a3115b7fc1c2df7&_e=OZkA-4UXGh12m3UBXk4KSqxZ86VlV5apj90-drlrNj0EHr2xM_Bb-ewPy3ABaK5rksHUw0TSmOg16Gw1ItZFN33GgF8slcXhPy-Qu16v4CNtFyq9fIaNhsORaa4jl2TBdRiI0IFMytz39Z6ek9Eo3vhxjBumL9ExYlf3i0bO2Kg0e7K19a9q8FcQY1mGG6zj9KapnsVULbgexaXz2l-hEP4VoWlLI-MkBIzf7yk5YdoBItM4hHhD7V4yhB1nNMsTGnsjQoz4qeeQKomiji79srrxBg-hCDzJ3FE27JHtU4ZZV-2cErnexLYX8aMtU9Idc5_iAbA82SYZju4hy5GFTijUEgdSGVfx5ERUtjxE5BdIvDCBCrSRrkVP5MUZWC8ZzbZcWvl3d1kyGOmgoL9Rtg%3D%3D)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. body:
Your part in this election mattered.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97095236/512259705/1328794144?refcode=ea.8dc99377-b2a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.8dc99377-b2a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkYzk5Mzc3LWIyYTItZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=etJw2ETmSId9DQKjzJ61sFE0_E0sWJsjFMxu8G7qX2Y=&emci=419fb3a5-09a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=8dc99377-b2a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4823105)
---
Like many of you, I’ve been taking these last few days to pause and process. This election has brought up so many emotions — frustration, worry, maybe even grief over what lies ahead. I know we’re all feeling the weight of what’s at stake. But even in moments like this, there’s hope and strength to be found. The work we did together over the past months was powerful. Traveling across the country, I saw firsthand the commitment of volunteers, the passion in conversations at rallies, and the dedication of people like you who believed in a future where our climate takes priority over profit. **This movement was never just about one election — it was about building a foundation that we can rely on for the battles ahead.** But as we prepare for what’s next, I’d love to hear from you. How are you feeling? What questions do you have? What would you like to hear more about from us in the coming months? **[There is no right or wrong answer. Click here to share your thoughts with me. Let’s take stock of where we are and where we’re headed together.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97095237/512259706/-101688105?refcode=ea.8dc99377-b2a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.8dc99377-b2a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkYzk5Mzc3LWIyYTItZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=etJw2ETmSId9DQKjzJ61sFE0_E0sWJsjFMxu8G7qX2Y=&emci=419fb3a5-09a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=8dc99377-b2a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4823105)** | [**MESSAGE JANE →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97095238/512259707/-101688105?refcode=ea.8dc99377-b2a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.8dc99377-b2a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkYzk5Mzc3LWIyYTItZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=etJw2ETmSId9DQKjzJ61sFE0_E0sWJsjFMxu8G7qX2Y=&emci=419fb3a5-09a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=8dc99377-b2a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4823105)
---
Thank you for being part of this movement. We will regroup, we will keep pushing forward, and we will not give up.
With gratitude,
Jane Fonda
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97095239/512259708/-101688105?refcode=ea.8dc99377-b2a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.8dc99377-b2a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkYzk5Mzc3LWIyYTItZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=etJw2ETmSId9DQKjzJ61sFE0_E0sWJsjFMxu8G7qX2Y=&emci=419fb3a5-09a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=8dc99377-b2a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4823105)

body:
I emailed you specifically because I was hoping I had earned your support.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=838d2638ada846398d9a56d81d998b57&_e=8Sp4G7xpAA5JeGZajBsPr8z7YQR56NrKXUTtB38PlOfcHDctjk1Kjxd4yRZMeo02ndOEoIwBneuJXaol3H5uQfu8iJzqn2vsM8ykroDMCyrsHVvzxbGofYtMyUPhEJ_P1U9foyCXpODrvJi8mmxFvam5j3hi_M7JLpVGX7qn1tcOXyG1TrCEqPl975RFKm1a0_n-DepHC051xeAVB77-BzXtMHl9TGWlZTUGPrwQKmD1CE9ILIj7kjrFWIy57o-eONbhBcUw5leoYvzf-L9vZjSt83W1NV6oyvW_SwmGh54uqZO6Jn4pdzTqdmK1EebBYTx9BH7x7Yh5Y3AJfy8xuhcE89A1Y5ZqXzyFQOnfHJPm4sbj5wmAUzmql0xtKaEKZf3PYPjZDb0ZDA_oRzx7jNGP-sOCWF-EA1XOfYOGRwyw1E5fMdtMsxhR-QbgCEVi6eVOD9sXt4bFdsHFlxR8Yg%3D%3D "DVO")
---
Friend,

I emailed you __**specifically**__ because I was hoping I had earned your support. I don't take this lightly, so let me tell you why I believe I've earned your respect & support.
● I served as a Navy SEAL for over 2 decades
● My favorite title I've ever held is "Grandpa"
● I fight tirelessly for farmers and dairy farmers
● I want to make sure every veteran has access to quality care when they get home
● I always speak my mind, and my opinion and my vote are not for sale
---
| | | [SUPPORT DERRICK ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=838d2638ada846398d9a56d81d998b57&_e=8Sp4G7xpAA5JeGZajBsPr8z7YQR56NrKXUTtB38PlOfcHDctjk1Kjxd4yRZMeo02ndOEoIwBneuJXaol3H5uQfu8iJzqn2vsM8ykroDMCyrsHVvzxbGofYtMyUPhEJ_P1U9foyCXpODrvJi8mmxFvam5j3hi_M7JLpVGX7qn1tcOXyG1TrCEqPl975RFKm1a0_n-DepHC051xeAVB77-BzXtMHl9TGWlZTUGPrwQKmD1CE9ILIj7kjrFWIy57o-eONbhBcUw5leoYvzf-L9vZjSt83W1NV6oyvW_SwmGh54uqZO6Jn4pdzTqdmK1EebBk5v0D3IdfCNn_JCCl53uBPrzkFguM_J8Lm7l_k8QJpm1dnYQYOOPmgOP4Dw1qCMIqodQQzjpyNMT1V-IrczOVF60TKUPY2XcFxZ7-0NWy9A2q18rKWpIOV3M8anFAOKipWfhnO9DX4q-VSbVZWV-QQ%3D%3D "SUPPORT DERRICK ")
---
**If I 'm not your cup of tea, then I won't bug you again for your help.** **[But, if I sound like the kind of man you'd want speaking for you in Congress, I'd be honored to earn your support, Friend.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=838d2638ada846398d9a56d81d998b57&_e=8Sp4G7xpAA5JeGZajBsPr8z7YQR56NrKXUTtB38PlOfcHDctjk1Kjxd4yRZMeo02ndOEoIwBneuJXaol3H5uQfu8iJzqn2vsM8ykroDMCyrsHVvzxbGofYtMyUPhEJ_P1U9foyCXpODrvJi8mmxFvam5j3hi_M7JLpVGX7qn1tcOXyG1TrCEqPl975RFKm1a0_n-DepHC051xeAVB77-BzXtMHl9TGWlZTUGPrwQKmD1CE9ILIj7kjrFWIy57o-eONbhBcUw5leoYvzf-L9vZjSt83W1NV6oyvW_SwmGh54uqZO6Jn4pdzTqdmK1EebBEl3ccOZ3SRIx_ymwLrVN4vDwRXDS17Ig-YW75TR7Cl1DSZG4-0p_pyCBjSZnvoIZBOSjzS3RGdVLot_srpSMV4k2REVdEhSAdQB8tNF-DMSyWlhW_jQaZBHKI6AuUaRiU_RlWgSpi5p3kZFXbBaeyQ%3D%3D "But, if I sound like the kind of man you’d want speaking for you in Congress, I’d be honored to earn your support, Friend.")**

Have a good rest of your day!

Derrick Van Orden

name: Riley Gaines
subject: It's getting hard to hold back this evil
body:
| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---

I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. #2. They're fighting radical doctors. #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | |

Friend,

I emailed you __**specifically**__ because I was hoping I had earned your support. I don't take this lightly, so let me tell you why I believe I've earned your respect & support.
● I served as a Navy SEAL for over 2 decades
● My favorite title I've ever held is "Grandpa"
● I fight tirelessly for farmers and dairy farmers
● I want to make sure every veteran has access to quality care when they get home
● I always speak my mind, and my opinion and my vote are not for sale
---

Have a good rest of your day!

Derrick Van Orden

name: John Kasich
subject: Are we listening?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
Today in America, we all need to pause and take a breath and learn how to listen to each other again.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=9c655a7cb8e5433e84ff918c0ea05455&_e=dqYqDGpDuWNOzsRr9B6xWd834a-Wd_7HqPyq3l-i8JM60zPBO29fUy8r4T8dNjW97M-aHltPucnjee6FRG5GcDXVGMDlw0W2XgFUNuFzjfME2nud6kBYwyRomoyuJPyUcODxDMMkYRVoQV3aM-K6sLlzGIvfiY3G0df7CzKOHOaeoceTVCVzPJhdlnd-2sG1RCxspj0NbW9w7A5nTNZLdA%3D%3D)
---
Peter, Like many of you, I was surprised by last week’s election result and wanted to take some time to gather my thoughts and reflect on the lessons we may have learned. It wasn’t so much that President-elect Trump won, but more about the mandate he received from the majority of voters.

When I took part in panel discussions on MSNBC last week, one point that I made was that sometimes in life it’s not about winning or losing. The important part is that regardless of the outcome, we have to listen to each other and try to understand the other person’s point of view or life experience. When we are quick to judge or assume the worst about other people because of their beliefs and opinions, we’re engaged in the same destructive mindset that’s contributed so greatly to the divisions in our country.

When I was a newly elected governor in 2011, there was a statewide ballot issue that myself and fellow Republicans just got crushed on. When the election was over, members of the media were shocked when they asked me for a reaction, expecting me to be upset. I instead told them that sometimes as elected officials, the public sends us a message and we would be wise to listen to them. Simply put, the voters of Ohio were not ready for the policy changes I was supporting. Today in America, we all need to pause and take a breath and learn how to listen to each other again.

I’m not going to dive deeply into the reasons that President-Elect Trump won or why Vice President Harris lost – that is for pollsters, researchers and historians to debate. But what I will say is this: the country has spoken and the results need to be respected, even when we don’t agree with them.

One of the questions I’m asked most often is how we might turn things around in this country. It doesn't start with someone else. It starts with you and me.

So here’s my challenge to you. It’s the same challenge I’ve given myself: Start focusing more on what each of us can do to build a stronger neighborhood or community. What can we do to make our family stronger? What can we do to find more joy or happiness in the time we spend with others? What can we do to listen to each other better and learn rather than being quick to dismiss if we disagree?

That is where the real change will start. If we keep looking to Washington, D.C. for all the answers, we’re going to continue to grow more divided and lose faith in each other.

You may not have heard, but next spring, I’ll be releasing a new book to highlight the role of faith institutions in supporting ordinary people and helping them to do extraordinary things to improve their communities. My book will not only offer hope and inspiration based on the ways people have made big changes to benefit their communities, but also provide a roadmap to get us thinking of all the ways we can work to see our impossible dreams made possible.

I’ll be sure to let you know as soon as we have more details about the release of the book.

I intend to listen and learn from my fellow Americans. But you also know that I will continue to speak out when I hear disturbing rhetoric or see policies or programs that I don't believe are in the best interest of the American people. We truly are all in this together. I’m so appreciative to have you on this team and I always value hearing from you. Feel free to reply to this email to let me know what you think.

Thank you!
---
-John
---
| | |
---

clean_body: Today in America, we all need to pause and take a breath and learn how to listen to each other again.| | | Peter, Like many of you, I was surprised by last week’s election result and wanted to take some time to gather my thoughts and reflect on the lessons we may have learned. It wasn’t so much that President-elect Trump won, but more about the mandate he received from the majority of voters. When I took part in panel discussions on MSNBC last week, one point that I made was that sometimes in life it’s not about winning or losing. The important part is that regardless of the outcome, we have to listen to each other and try to understand the other person’s point of view or life experience. When we are quick to judge or assume the worst about other people because of their beliefs and opinions, we’re engaged in the same destructive mindset that’s contributed so greatly to the divisions in our country. When I was a newly elected governor in 2011, there was a statewide ballot issue that myself and fellow Republicans just got crushed on. When the election was over, members of the media were shocked when they asked me for a reaction, expecting me to be upset. I instead told them that sometimes as elected officials, the public sends us a message and we would be wise to listen to them. Simply put, the voters of Ohio were not ready for the policy changes I was supporting. Today in America, we all need to pause and take a breath and learn how to listen to each other again. I’m not going to dive deeply into the reasons that President-Elect Trump won or why Vice President Harris lost – that is for pollsters, researchers and historians to debate. But what I will say is this: the country has spoken and the results need to be respected, even when we don’t agree with them. One of the questions I’m asked most often is how we might turn things around in this country. It doesn't start with someone else. It starts with you and me. So here’s my challenge to you. It’s the same challenge I’ve given myself: Start focusing more on what each of us can do to build a stronger neighborhood or community. What can we do to make our family stronger? What can we do to find more joy or happiness in the time we spend with others? What can we do to listen to each other better and learn rather than being quick to dismiss if we disagree? That is where the real change will start. If we keep looking to Washington, D.C. for all the answers, we’re going to continue to grow more divided and lose faith in each other. You may not have heard, but next spring, I’ll be releasing a new book to highlight the role of faith institutions in supporting ordinary people and helping them to do extraordinary things to improve their communities. My book will not only offer hope and inspiration based on the ways people have made big changes to benefit their communities, but also provide a roadmap to get us thinking of all the ways we can work to see our impossible dreams made possible. I’ll be sure to let you know as soon as we have more details about the release of the book. I intend to listen and learn from my fellow Americans. But you also know that I will continue to speak out when I hear disturbing rhetoric or see policies or programs that I don't believe are in the best interest of the American people. We truly are all in this together. I’m so appreciative to have you on this team and I always value hearing from you. Feel free to reply to this email to let me know what you think. Thank you! -John | | | Get the Latest Updates: | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com

If you came to watch me coach basketball when we're up 25 points, you'll see me STILL yelling to keep fighting. We're RELENTLESS like a pack of wolves that's never satisfied, a pack of wolves whose bellies are never full.

We almost gave our country away to Kamala Harris and Cardi B.

The Marxists benefit from being down. The George Soros of the world will not back down; they can't go away from their communist narrative.

They'll need to get BEATEN DOWN cycle after cycle.

We think that Marxism is about culture or economics. No. It's about SPIRIT.

The Radical Left and Neocons will not stop fighting us, no matter how much we're winning. That's why I need your help today.

**We need to protect Donald Trump at all costs.[Can you chip in ANY AMOUNT to help me protect him?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=bbc0420bff8641c5823aa993ad71666a&_e=40NEuMdPWsIBM15uVwX-OU2rf6M9PRUKAEBTiLk1ATi0XLGoqBApZfA0Dry81CMqW4wDE2fbTwy8rpm2A1eII0Snypzmu8TBt86f_Msd97sJi6emwuOFqRJmhDx7iTvXTeMeaNf9awli2M2pfEeQeK83dK9mJ_zdSTF0dlwQLAbvZdvkQFuq3ZGPuIcIY08B3zAimzOjgzAkzqLiKYncnwgl7H5NNM0DknSxhTeyR4K1CX3McKiwy1nc4SnIemL13fKZYHhh95vwaHfKtQXmycVDufliGqmAJAsqxnU84z9D1pk-JRqlTSwmOIQoDvfABOSvIans9Aqrn8FFR_x_aA%3D%3D)**

When Trump starts chopping off parts of the bureaucratic federal government, that's when it's going to get dirty. That's when he's going to need our help the most.

Right now, we have a country full of rogue institutions. We have to protect Trump at all costs as he cuts them off.

When will there ever be another politician like Trump? One who God literally puts his hand on his head to turn it as three bullets fly by his face? One who will be TRANSFORTMATIVE in Saving America?

We have to act while we can.

**[Please, donate ANYTHING before midnight to protect Donald Trump and defeat the Radical Left, Neocons, and rogue institutions of our federal government.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=bbc0420bff8641c5823aa993ad71666a&_e=40NEuMdPWsIBM15uVwX-OU2rf6M9PRUKAEBTiLk1ATi0XLGoqBApZfA0Dry81CMqW4wDE2fbTwy8rpm2A1eII0Snypzmu8TBt86f_Msd97sJi6emwuOFqRJmhDx7iTvXTeMeaNf9awli2M2pfEeQeK83dK9mJ_zdSTF0dlwQLAbvZdvkQFuq3ZGPuIcIY08BPlmQ2fIXdxV0nHwNSoP2hkZBZFnq5C8lossWBJhPcdhApz2simmQq6kiUQBieyjUEV2ZCPj0g9C2k46tw3n2HhiVmD1NMXjsxRSCGUSwiIbbH5A54bmoorolTrvAIJfvDDUSXuen-Zz183tT5xj6gQ%3D%3D)**

Thank you,
Royce White

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: You powered this campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Thank you to the donors
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2202%2E135344%2Er04qCW)

Dear friends,
Thank you.
Thank you for your support. Thank you for putting up with endless (!) emails and texts. And thank you for contributing money to this campaign. It means the world to have had your support in this campaign, and I cannot thank you enough for getting involved.
When I first decided to run for political office in 2017, I immediately made the decision not to accept corporate PAC contributions. I never wanted my constituents to even wonder if I was taking the votes I did because I felt beholden to corporations who had helped get me elected. I have never regretted that decision.
My campaigns have always relied on regular people chipping in $5, $10, $25 dollars at a time – giving what they can, when they can because they believe in my work. And my race in 2022 was the most expensive congressional race in the entire country.
But running for Senate is a wildly different task than running for the House – and to be honest, I was daunted when I was told how much we would have to raise to be competitive statewide in a place like Michigan.
So we put out the call for help, and I was stunned by the response. More than 300,000 people made donations to our campaign over the course of this cycle – everyday people showing up and doing what they can to impact change.
Those donations helped us make critical, early investment decisions that shaped our campaign – and they are what powered us over the finish line.
Friend, we truly could not have run this campaign without you. I am truly humbled by the number of people who have literally invested in me and in this campaign, and I hope you know that you share a part in what we have accomplished.
With gratitude,
Elissa
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov24.k4yPYt&refcode=em241114-1-15&t=2&akid=2202%2E135344%2Er04qCW)**

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2202%2E135344%2Er04qCW).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=2202%2E135344%2Er04qCW)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Of course the establishment is blaming the left
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, since the
2024 election ended and Democratic Party leadership failed to stop Donald
Trump from winning a second presidency, there have been a lot of bad takes
out there, including that the Harris campaign ran too left of center.

With the Democratic nominee refusing to break from President Biden on
arming Israel’s genocide against Palestinians, walking back her past
positions in support of popular progressive policies like Medicare for All
and taking on corporations, throwing immigrant communities under the bus,
and cozying up to pro-war Republicans like Dick and Liz Cheney, we know
that couldn’t be further from the truth.

The reality is the Harris campaign ran to the right in an attempt to court
Republican voters rather than appealing to the Democratic base by pushing
for the bold changes the working class needs and deserves to thrive.

It’s one reason why we saw progressive incumbents like Rep. Rashida Tlaib
and ballot measures like Maine’s effort to get big money out of politics
perform better than Harris/Walz despite being on the same ticket!

Commentators and political establishment folks claiming the Democratic
Party was too “woke” and talked too much about issues like “defund the
police” this cycle are desperately missing the point and avoiding taking
accountability for their own failures. As Jon Stewart explained in last
night’s Daily Show monologue, “They acted like Republicans for the last
four months.”

We will not let them gaslight us after we witnessed the Party take a hard
turn right, throwing vulnerable communities like undocumented immigrants
and transgender people under the bus. Moderate cowards like Rep. Seth
Moulton who are insisting that our Party should abandon trans kids do not
deserve to represent us in office. We fully agree with Rep. Summer Lee:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241114?refcode=em20241114-36150&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36150_1203867_WfSJ1F&akid=36150%2E1203867%2EWfSJ1F ]Tweet from Summer Lee: No amount of polling, posturing, or
pontification should make you throw trans kids/community or any other
marginalized community away for political points. The only way to appease
bigots is to be one. Government doesn’t need more cowards.

If this Party is serious about rebuilding trust with the people and taking
power back in Washington, it needs to start putting the interests of those
people before corporations, super PACs, and billionaires.

We need a new generation of leaders unbeholden to corporations and the
wealthy elite, with the courage to actually listen and do something about
the problems everyday people face. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241114?refcode=em20241114-36150&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36150_1203867_WfSJ1F&akid=36150%2E1203867%2EWfSJ1F ]Justice Democrats is working to find
and recruit those very leaders: will you fuel our Candidate Recruitment
Fund with a donation of $5 or more today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241114?refcode=em20241114-36150&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36150_1203867_WfSJ1F&akid=36150%2E1203867%2EWfSJ1F ]Contribute $5

We are recruiting everyday working Americans — nurses, principals, union
workers, and community organizers — in districts where the incumbent
(Democrat or Republican) is out-of-touch with voters, in order to
transform our economy and democracy. Thanks for anything you can
contribute to support us.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

PS — While the establishment looks for those who can afford to run for
office, we look for local leaders nominated to run by their own community.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/38356?t=1002&akid=36150%2E1203867%2EWfSJ1F ]If you know a progressive leader who should run for Congress, nominate
them here →

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241114-36150-footer&t=1003&refcode2=36150_1203867_WfSJ1F&akid=36150%2E1203867%2EWfSJ1F

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=36150%2E1203867%2EWfSJ1F

I'm calling for a recount, and I need your help. |

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97097654/512267688/637934301?refcode=WTEFHW44_20241114_BoRecount_PL&sourceid=1055437&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDI5YjBmNC1iOWEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mU_6BV-iOJ6fOieWJJQJKW_z97moE5Hdf5MyBlbpKl4=) Hi Peter, Christina Bohannan here.

My race for Iowa's 1st Congressional District is still too close to call, and our work is far from over!

Right now, I'm down by 0.2% — just 700-some votes — and this seat is crucial to stand up against a Congress under full Republican control.

**With so much on the line, we owe it to Iowa voters to ensure _every_ vote is counted and _every_ voice is heard – which is why my campaign is calling for a recount.**

But Peter, we can't do it without your support. [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=67581e068b864b68878acce871db4faa&_e=BO_YbnbYMNtMaXJ4MeAa_eNtNuOfE9EmujPv-v6ft_h5TvBEykNcGFGxp1EYntAJG-EYupDuy2pM0P-XCg7y7EkVT4zjP6Wy9LxKUzclM6QUPwPiUwQKf4EpEttZT64xXsBFT9640BnSih8bAEI1Hg_g13WQWiViH9xlFKUFnud2tF1bfAlHufBlyK_rLCpS90hMzpUfXu9OvKXF6JDcviP_PhsBsu0nEWKynU6xO4nESW5vzrlt1y9sTxKBM0HPmFGVLCTB-_NR3Ae7VaqPgGtlU3XTSrVU-l6_lajDwGZjhric9TUDiXOGeH2QSMREQ3UpNRWgI9mBZxIayOkKtlTLLFojxLCFID-WfxhfcfeBun46cLuK0AUsUzu7NFqy8OM57Odl6MpplF0wb4O7sg%3D%3D)

Peter,

It's Dave McCormick.

The AP called our race and we won!

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.

name: Team Moore
subject: Maryland wins
body:
Friend,

We are excited to celebrate some wins for Maryland’s future. Angela Alsobrooks was officially elected to represent Maryland in the Senate. April McClain Delaney is the next representative for Maryland's 6th House District, Sarah Elfreth is the next representative for Maryland’s 3rd District, and Johnny Olszewski, Jr. was elected to Maryland’s 2nd District.

With these strong leaders in Congress, we are looking forward to partnering with them. Together, we’ll make this Maryland’s decade.

Access to abortion was also on the ballot. Marylanders were loud and clear: Abortions should, and will now be, constitutionally protected as a right.

We need leaders who will bring results for the people they are representing — and that includes protecting our rights and our freedoms. We need to work toward making our state a better place to live and work — and cement Maryland as a leader for the rest of the country to follow.

As we look to what’s to come in the months and years ahead, there is so much more work we need to do — and we need to hit the ground running. Help us build on these wins and make this Maryland’s decade by rushing a contribution right now to fuel our work. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241114-1?refcode=em20241114-1]

Contribute » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241114-1?refcode=em20241114-1]

Thank you,

Team Moore

clean_body: Friend, We are excited to celebrate some wins for Maryland’s future. Angela Alsobrooks was officially elected to represent Maryland in the Senate. April McClain Delaney is the next representative for Maryland's 6th House District, Sarah Elfreth is the next representative for Maryland’s 3rd District, and Johnny Olszewski, Jr. was elected to Maryland’s 2nd District. With these strong leaders in Congress, we are looking forward to partnering with them. Together, we’ll make this Maryland’s decade. Access to abortion was also on the ballot. Marylanders were loud and clear: Abortions should, and will now be, constitutionally protected as a right. We need leaders who will bring results for the people they are representing — and that includes protecting our rights and our freedoms. We need to work toward making our state a better place to live and work — and cement Maryland as a leader for the rest of the country to follow. As we look to what’s to come in the months and years ahead, there is so much more work we need to do — and we need to hit the ground running. Help us build on these wins and make this Maryland’s decade by rushing a contribution right now to fuel our work. [] Contribute » [] Thank you, Team Moore

name: Darin Harbick
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harbick for Oregon ID 23118
body:
Thanks to you, we won! | | | | |
---
| Peter,
---
| | | | | Thanks to YOU, WE won!

In Oregon, it takes weeks to count all the ballots, unfortunately, there are more out there. Every time they update we gain a few more votes on our side. Currently, we are 6124 votes ahead and, we will win with nearly 58% of the vote!

I couldn't have done it without your support, and I want to give my most sincere thank you to all of you who have volunteered your time, treasure, and talents to get us here.
The truth is, the work has only just begun. While it seems we will avoid slipping into a superminority in the House, the Senate wasn't so fortunate. The Democrats are already floating billions in new taxes to pay for their mismanagement. We need to stand strong to stop them.
I promise I will, and I hope you will join me in the fight ahead.
Talk soon,Darin Harbick
---
|
---
| | | | | | |
---

* **TOP NEWS**

"**John Cornyn loses longtime bid to be next Senate majority leader to John Thune,** " Texas Tribune's **Matthew Choi** -- "Sen. **John Cornyn** lost his election Wednesday to become the next Senate majority leader to Sen. **John Thune** of South Dakota, ending a years-long effort to lead his party conference.

Sen. **Mitch McConnell** of Kentucky announced earlier this year that he would not seek another term leading the party, ending his 17-year tenure. He is the longest serving party leader in the history of the U.S. Senate. The opening led to the first competitive campaign for GOP leader in decades, the stakes of which were raised after Republicans won control of the upper chamber last week.

Cornyn had spent decades climbing the ranks of the Senate GOP, building relationships and raising money so he could one day succeed McConnell.

In making his pitch, Cornyn cited his decades fundraising for his fellow Republicans, including raising nearly $33 million for Republican candidates and incumbents this election cycle. He has raised over $414 million over his tenure in the Senate.

Cornyn served as McConnell's whip from 2013 to 2019, a job that required him to build personal relationships with each senator to get them on board the party's agenda while giving him a seat in McConnell's inner circle. Cornyn remained close to McConnell after he was term-limited out of his whip post.

Ultimately, Thune, another McConnell acolyte who succeeded Cornyn as the whip, bested Cornyn and Sen. **Rick Scott** of Florida who previously served as chair of the National Republican Senatorial Committee. Scott had built momentum among the hard right wing of the party, including vocal online support from the MAGA wing of the party.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/a5e70adc-55b0-4762-a5a0-64458ef0d69d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I am extremely honored to have earned the support of my colleagues to lead the Senate in the 119th Congress, and I am beyond proud of the work we have done to secure our majority and the White House," Thune said in a statement. "This Republican team is united behind President Trump's agenda, and our work starts today."

Cornyn congratulated the new slate of Senate Republican leaders in a statement, saying he was eager to work with the next leadership team.

"We are united and prepared to enact President Trump's agenda on day one, and I look forward to working alongside my colleagues to take advantage of the opportunities we will have next year to confirm nominees, address our national debt, extend the Trump tax cuts, and reverse the Biden-Harris administration's disastrous border policies," Cornyn said.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/a5e70adc-55b0-4762-a5a0-64458ef0d69d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The party vote was conducted by secret ballot among senators-elect and senators who would be serving in the next Congress. Vice President-elect **JD Vance** also attended as the future president of the Senate but didn't speak during the conference meeting, Sen. **Shelley Moore Capito** of West Virginia said.

Most senators did not say how they would be voting ahead of the meeting. U.S. Sen. **Ted Cruz** broke his silence on the matter less than an hour before the meeting to say that he was supporting Scott in the leadership race.

"This morning, I'll be voting for Rick Scott for GOP Leader, as I did two years ago. In 2022, I helped lead the charge for Rick against McConnell & I'm proud to stand with him again," Cruz [posted on social media](https://substack.com/redirect/6b6ea51d-13e7-45fd-aab8-e44c82bb6a16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). "For 12 yrs, I've been unequivocal that we need to change GOP Leadership--and now we finally will."

Scott came in last during the first round of voting, launching a second round between Cornyn and Thune. Cruz declined to answer if he voted for Cornyn in the second round. When asked before the vote if he would vote for Cornyn in a runoff between him and Thune, Cruz said he'd make the decision in the room.

Cornyn campaigned with Cruz and gave him more than $500,000 in what was ultimately one of the most expensive Senate races in Texas history. He also stumped for Cruz during his competitive 2018 reelection against U.S. Rep. **Beto O'Rourke** , which Cruz won by only 3 percentage points. Cruz also helped Cornyn electorally, rallying the right wing for Cornyn during his 2020 election against Democrat **MJ Hegar**." Thank you for reading as a FREE subscriber. » Become a PAID subscriber for $7/mo or $70/yr and SAVE TIME and be BETTER INFORMED. " If something of importance is known in Texas, Matt knows it. With a decline in the number of credible news organizations, the Must Read Texas morning email is indispensable for anyone that wants to continue to be informed." - Former U.S. Senator Phil Gramm (R-TX) AUSTIN NEWSLETTER LAUNCHED Are you one of the 100,000+ subscribers to , a newsletter that delivers EVERYTHING you NEED TO KNOW about Austin? | | ---|---|--- Subscriptions are $5/mo, $50/yr or $199/lifetime here: . » Read this morning's (free) edition . > SUBSCRIBE HERE: . ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "John Cornyn loses longtime bid to be next Senate majority leader to John Thune, " Texas Tribune's Matthew Choi -- "Sen. John Cornyn lost his election Wednesday to become the next Senate majority leader to Sen. John Thune of South Dakota, ending a years-long effort to lead his party conference. Sen. Mitch McConnell of Kentucky announced earlier this year that he would not seek another term leading the party, ending his 17-year tenure. He is the longest serving party leader in the history of the U.S. Senate. The opening led to the first competitive campaign for GOP leader in decades, the stakes of which were raised after Republicans won control of the upper chamber last week. Cornyn had spent decades climbing the ranks of the Senate GOP, building relationships and raising money so he could one day succeed McConnell. In making his pitch, Cornyn cited his decades fundraising for his fellow Republicans, including raising nearly $33 million for Republican candidates and incumbents this election cycle. He has raised over $414 million over his tenure in the Senate. Cornyn served as McConnell's whip from 2013 to 2019, a job that required him to build personal relationships with each senator to get them on board the party's agenda while giving him a seat in McConnell's inner circle. Cornyn remained close to McConnell after he was term-limited out of his whip post. Ultimately, Thune, another McConnell acolyte who succeeded Cornyn as the whip, bested Cornyn and Sen. Rick Scott of Florida who previously served as chair of the National Republican Senatorial Committee. Scott had built momentum among the hard right wing of the party, including vocal online support from the MAGA wing of the party. "I am extremely honored to have earned the support of my colleagues to lead the Senate in the 119th Congress, and I am beyond proud of the work we have done to secure our majority and the White House," Thune said in a statement. "This Republican team is united behind President Trump's agenda, and our work starts today." Cornyn congratulated the new slate of Senate Republican leaders in a statement, saying he was eager to work with the next leadership team. "We are united and prepared to enact President Trump's agenda on day one, and I look forward to working alongside my colleagues to take advantage of the opportunities we will have next year to confirm nominees, address our national debt, extend the Trump tax cuts, and reverse the Biden-Harris administration's disastrous border policies," Cornyn said. The party vote was conducted by secret ballot among senators-elect and senators who would be serving in the next Congress. Vice President-elect JD Vance also attended as the future president of the Senate but didn't speak during the conference meeting, Sen. Shelley Moore Capito of West Virginia said. Most senators did not say how they would be voting ahead of the meeting. U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz broke his silence on the matter less than an hour before the meeting to say that he was supporting Scott in the leadership race. "This morning, I'll be voting for Rick Scott for GOP Leader, as I did two years ago. In 2022, I helped lead the charge for Rick against McConnell & I'm proud to stand with him again," Cruz . "For 12 yrs, I've been unequivocal that we need to change GOP Leadership--and now we finally will." Scott came in last during the first round of voting, launching a second round between Cornyn and Thune. Cruz declined to answer if he voted for Cornyn in the second round. When asked before the vote if he would vote for Cornyn in a runoff between him and Thune, Cruz said he'd make the decision in the room. Cornyn campaigned with Cruz and gave him more than $500,000 in what was ultimately one of the most expensive Senate races in Texas history. He also stumped for Cruz during his competitive 2018 reelection against U.S. Rep. Beto O'Rourke , which Cruz won by only 3 percentage points. Cruz also helped Cornyn electorally, rallying the right wing for Cornyn during his 2020 election against Democrat MJ Hegar."
