name: Patti Reilly
subject: Help me save my son
body:
My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.
Dear Peter,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b85dc45129ec4c519e819aee1e69e5ca&_e=qoBlWvGsfinykIGYq_8VskeG4f9CC-VUnv0HwrRc1Lt1qlNLwg9xkGnVK5il3smuVoWcq2VYO3o7i3j45nGlUTIMLjvFoXcJz-KE6m36XhPKTnVbM54UeFmdw6dO-tIz5f-RW18wd5JMu4K8tNDZKvcXX3Bv9YgeeO1GY7PNb3uRPGNaxz2RKpNKV6d9ReaCktaDHjS2_UqhMKDNk-upiGjWkuUrFVfSH34O4SadsqTHrADAspWBE-4H4TGFplkR1iNsrvXWfKvBKBPL1uRDKL2U4bT8I3LOAqb5P5xHkuu1tWSkMNajiudHK7TbtXLWjAZN-N74o7yNVUTSyWhlSrRKrB8HLHV_PpA4S35Jr4m4Wrc5SMleqtk-_c1Njva8PEIjRrZ58GM-E0h4F8MptQ%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b85dc45129ec4c519e819aee1e69e5ca&_e=qoBlWvGsfinykIGYq_8VskeG4f9CC-VUnv0HwrRc1Lt1qlNLwg9xkGnVK5il3smuVoWcq2VYO3o7i3j45nGlUTIMLjvFoXcJz-KE6m36XhPKTnVbM54UeFmdw6dO-tIz5f-RW18wd5JMu4K8tNDZKvcXX3Bv9YgeeO1GY7PNb3uRPGNaxz2RKpNKV6d9ReaCktaDHjS2_UqhMKDNk-upiGjWkuUrFVfSH34O4SadsqTHrADAspWBE-4H4TGFplkR8J90nEasWozpfu6AMMBXIc2_WX9e1-lm4iL1QVycvDwGVY2cEX8KYIE5vi-musEWDBhcvLNplujR7zagy18IX2Y81uLSCledsZ76a3y4nUrHXpl4lXcGqav5LWr-iq1LE0hFGoY5XrpedPfh7sZtHA%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b85dc45129ec4c519e819aee1e69e5ca&_e=qoBlWvGsfinykIGYq_8VskeG4f9CC-VUnv0HwrRc1Lt1qlNLwg9xkGnVK5il3smuVoWcq2VYO3o7i3j45nGlUTIMLjvFoXcJz-KE6m36XhPKTnVbM54UeFmdw6dO-tIz5f-RW18wd5JMu4K8tNDZKvcXX3Bv9YgeeO1GY7PNb3uRPGNaxz2RKpNKV6d9ReaCktaDHjS2_UqhMKDNk-upiGjWkuUrFVfSH34O4SadsqTHrADAspWBE-4H4TGFplkRDxb8c06aWWpbBbfox8ZbxiPWVZ1GX0lJyOmoXokdoiLn-j0Wc8mRX_889vw1d8WzrzwYOBfs2k7Z-4a6LAZBuzZKbIaY1GBo2M8foHv8Fs2zEDzITuGi6QXyx5lKdBHhgutRJNxQyJKqEE0_AHZ2SA%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b85dc45129ec4c519e819aee1e69e5ca&_e=qoBlWvGsfinykIGYq_8VskeG4f9CC-VUnv0HwrRc1Lt1qlNLwg9xkGnVK5il3smuVoWcq2VYO3o7i3j45nGlUTIMLjvFoXcJz-KE6m36XhPKTnVbM54UeFmdw6dO-tIz5f-RW18wd5JMu4K8tNDZKvcXX3Bv9YgeeO1GY7PNb3uRPGNaxz2RKpNKV6d9ReaCktaDHjS2_UqhMKDNk-upiGjWkuUrFVfSH34O4SadsqTHrADAspWBE-4H4TGFplkRyLbOga3LBjTa7S7F-OinMdGIvDNhasOvJqHF4vjh2qkkspONBrzkX3NYJRqeKwV-l0soH9LuV0I9ojlaOMSm4_3GGJgXD0wfq6-FHQIbiNk-J6kao7NgkmiTkP6eEdGh6nsUvyc0OIun0zF9QgDNDg%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b85dc45129ec4c519e819aee1e69e5ca&_e=qoBlWvGsfinykIGYq_8VskeG4f9CC-VUnv0HwrRc1Lt1qlNLwg9xkGnVK5il3smuVoWcq2VYO3o7i3j45nGlUTIMLjvFoXcJz-KE6m36XhPKTnVbM54UeFmdw6dO-tIz5f-RW18wd5JMu4K8tNDZKvcXX3Bv9YgeeO1GY7PNb3uRPGNaxz2RKpNKV6d9ReaCktaDHjS2_UqhMKDNk-upiGjWkuUrFVfSH34O4SadsqTHrADAspWBE-4H4TGFplkRp7l60S7vmqOWNZz8EULzmFexqb4e_ozdMQeKoPHtpfaziouwjBijHG5_214Mxz-HnKBcsoEEJOhS2aT37M5wOVkNE-KqQeNqyCyCui-OXUs14OheqNBNks3q3JmBzIjA1haj4ymR-lqe1LYlDzu-nQ%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b85dc45129ec4c519e819aee1e69e5ca&_e=qoBlWvGsfinykIGYq_8VskeG4f9CC-VUnv0HwrRc1Lt1qlNLwg9xkGnVK5il3smuVoWcq2VYO3o7i3j45nGlUTIMLjvFoXcJz-KE6m36XhPKTnVbM54UeFmdw6dO-tIz5f-RW18wd5JMu4K8tNDZKvcXX3Bv9YgeeO1GY7PNb3uRPGNaxz2RKpNKV6d9ReaCktaDHjS2_UqhMKDNk-upiGjWkuUrFVfSH34O4SadsqTHrADAspWBE-4H4TGFplkReImtYbK7a7jCET8aPuPPJySuD-pbn3ZbSpu5uSbmJqlahHCb4baX5EoZmfJ_1hPqxPSi4GmOgkbKcu16Quyy_5OIv8UP-KNcizB_x6DcOtauN_cEBfLVyRO2-PeTAJwFFe1e_Ix0BqgiVSjMNGyrmA%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b85dc45129ec4c519e819aee1e69e5ca&_e=qoBlWvGsfinykIGYq_8Vsk8-JgU-snc07cNrZxxJ7NpTP8VpQqfJmmWG3xOZjOu-IqlOKgpYKBnP3lHj5qmKWsxDy63Yv8Xs2fjnkpPks5k-GPsXgkd1m2oyl10B_2CLmszZDsncXJ4-IfEJ7Vs2JrCyWSJwSZU4IOS3zoxsrtiFZOxCpHXThShP9pDuE0ZNlR7VVv6O2v0tTl5Ge1FDeQ%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click here to [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=b85dc45129ec4c519e819aee1e69e5ca&_t=GcnTn4ggYqGv2BZJMSgBZ5f9EcRYCqoD3y15ey2J4VvB0hbGy7haVbxJqwqLgSnBK08u6sZ-8c0BeehquIt7clylJGn74RSfnqL1jsa-M71v7_KPTA-HQDyY9Ek6JTk4)

name: Autism Health
subject: Meet your health heroes in person!
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Dear Autism Community & Supporters!
Autism Health Inc. is thrilled to be part of the [2024 Documenting Hope Conference](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=ec62ce9c60&e=3a42edfdc4), held in person over three days, November 15-17, 2024, at the luxurious Omni Resort Champions Gate in Orlando, Florida. Stop by to see Tracy Slepcevic and Patricia Morrone at the Autism Health booth. Pick up a signed copy of [Warrior Mom: A Mother's Journey in Healing Her Son with Autism](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=e4f7cc046e&e=3a42edfdc4) and grab some program information. Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit and the host of an annual conference dedicated to supporting individuals and families impacted by autism.

Connect with your favorite health and wellness professionals and discover powerful insights into overcoming children’s chronic health conditions. Join us in sunny Orlando for a family-friendly, action-packed adventure and a transformative learning journey.

This conference will bring together some of the most respected professionals in pediatrics to share their expertise on the latest research, trends, and innovations in integrative medicine. You’ll hear from speakers like Dayan Goodenowe; Elisa Song; Joe Pizzorno; Theoharis Theoharides, MD; Nancy O’Hara, MD; Richard Boles; Richard Frye, MD; Roseann Capana-Hodge; Terri Herning; William Padula; Laura Graye; Pejman Katerai; Mary Coyle; Dana Johnson...and many more!

Topics they will cover include homotoxicology, Lyme, ophthalmology, the microbiome, autism, nutrition, mast cells, neuroinflammation, and more. Whether you are a healthcare professional or a concerned parent, this is an opportunity you won’t want to miss!

---
| [Click Here for More Information](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=b46d9800d2&e=3a42edfdc4 "Click Here for More Information")
---
| Use the code DH200 for $200 off the Professional and Flex Pass ticket.

Become part of an inspiring community of wellness experts, professionals, and parents where you’ll truly feel seen, heard, and understood.

We look forward to welcoming you and sharing this empowering experience together!

Sincerely,
The Autism Health Team
---
|
---
| YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE!

Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance!
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=041d16244d&e=3a42edfdc4 "DONATE NOW")

| Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.

Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit and the host of an annual conference dedicated to supporting individuals and families impacted by autism. Folks — the GOP majority in the Senate have chosen their next leader, Senator John Thune from South Dakota. | | **US Senate Republicans pick insider John Thune as their next leader**
_— Reuters, November 13, 2024_
* * *
_Thune, 63, is seen as an even-tempered institutionalist and seasoned legislator who has close relationships with many of his fellow Republicans. He currently serves as the chamber's No. 2 Republican and will succeed 82-year-old Mitch McConnell, the longest serving party leader in Senate history. He was first elected to the Senate in 2004._
---
Let us be clear, Thune is an anti-abortion extremist with a 100% anti-abortion voting scorecard who, in his own words, “has consistently supported a ban on abortion.” He celebrated the _Dobbs_ decision that overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and proudly boasts an A+ rating from anti-abortion organizations.
Thanks to Arizonans showing up earlier this month, abortion care is protected in Arizona — but we have to fight for the state leaders working to make sure abortion care _stays_ protected in Arizona.

### A major civil society organization shames Democrats and exposes one reason Trump won; Trump's appointees reveal his mendacity; and a podcast with David Cobb offers pathways for grassroots organizing
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Nov 14
---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=151667507&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjY3NTA3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMTYxNzA4MCwiZXhwIjoxNzM0MjA5MDgwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9U-Rx2fpU8xVyIT_CxFWB5Gcl8M38rIhjIC7HtFJb3U&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=151667507&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjY3NTA3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE2MTcwODAsImV4cCI6MTczNDIwOTA4MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.AlH3bRFBdsep6SiebKw2A8XOu-WsBLpYjjfciJLU38s&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

---
While most of my writing offers a deep dive into various issues related to bipartisan corruption and fascism in America, I'm experimenting with alternative formats for posts and welcome any feedback. This post will collect a few short reflections on news cycles from this week, starting with a report released just this morning.
### **Liars exposed by advocates**
Earlier this year, Secretary of State Anthony Blinken testified before Congress, [falsely claiming](https://substack.com/redirect/9d2722a6-d02b-4279-b2ff-386f4b507183?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that Israel has not violated international human rights in order to secure congressional approval of illegal weapons transfers.
Meanwhile, Biden and Harris' inability to distance themselves from Netanyahu [squandered](https://substack.com/redirect/49c85550-d370-4656-9ce1-a5b4c3c471ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the election two weeks ago that they were poised to win with progressive support. Instead, after corporate Democrats refused to allow a primary process and lined up to support a continuing genocide, Republicans swept the so-called swing states and secured control over all three branches of the federal government.
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform and educate your friends by sharing this post._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=151667507&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjY3NTA3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE2MTcwODAsImV4cCI6MTczNDIwOTA4MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.AlH3bRFBdsep6SiebKw2A8XOu-WsBLpYjjfciJLU38s)
Today, Human Rights Watch issued a report that flatly contradicted Blinken's shameless lies before Congress on Biden's behalf. Titled "_[Hopeless, Starving, and Besieged: Israel's Forced Displacement of Palestinians in Gaza](https://substack.com/redirect/31b35c44-9034-4fa9-aba4-a8b0dbc73098?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_," it offers a poignant and disturbing rebuke of Biden's legacy. The report notes that:
> According to the United Nations, 1.9 million people were displaced in Gaza as of October 2024 out of a population of 2.2 million people. This report examines the Israeli authorities' conduct which has led to this extraordinarily high level of displacement and finds these actions amount to forced displacement.
Unlike appointed or elected Democrats, Human Rights Watch was willing to observe where the evidence unfortunately led. The report continues:
> Given the evidence strongly indicates that multiple acts of forced displacement were carried out with intent, it amounts to war crimes. The report further finds that the Israeli government's acts of forced displacement are widespread and systematic. Statements by senior officials with command responsibility show that forced displacement is intentional and forms part of Israeli state policy and therefore amount to a crime against humanity. Israel's actions appear to also meet the definition of ethnic cleansing.
An awareness of this reality could have won Democrats the election, had they demonstrated the courage to reject human rights abuses and embrace accountability, rather than bury their heads in the sand and try to gaslight voters. [Pretending](https://substack.com/redirect/b402d214-949d-4b50-ba5e-37f4d3bdd71e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the escalating Israeli genocide in Gaza is legal, sane, or in [any way defensible](https://substack.com/redirect/087eeed6-644f-42cf-b148-5101f3fb5e73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) was the single most crucial way that Democrats [lost](https://substack.com/redirect/9258ad90-f5d5-4fea-a113-150afcb52736?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the 2024 election (although, to be fair, there were also [others](https://substack.com/redirect/49c85550-d370-4656-9ce1-a5b4c3c471ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)).
### **Here we go again**
Trump's appointees reflect a predictable strategy of reinforcing his cult of personality, rather than choosing figures based on their experience, acumen, or insight.
Leading the pack of clownish appointments, Matt Gaetz would be a comically corrupt Attorney General poised only to reinforce all the problems that he says he hopes to solve--especially the alleged politicization of the Justice Department. The multiple investigations exploring his misconduct suggest that, if anything, allowing Gaetz to lead DOJ would only exacerbate its politicization and undermine the department's independence.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/991fd9b6-6e7b-4f2e-aaf0-62912afffb7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
While Gaetz exemplifies the absurdity of the incoming administration and its disregard for any norms of decency, he is far from alone.
For instance, Trump's Secretary of Defense is a former television anchor with no expertise at all in anything relating to the military or foreign policy. It is (even more so than the choice of Gaetz at Justice) a reflection that Trump plans to govern theatrically, without meaningful independence or expertise in his cabinet.
I appreciate the handful of Senators--including Republicans Lisa Murkowski (R-AK) and Susan Collins (R-ME)--who have [spoken out](https://substack.com/redirect/f706f3d1-526b-4ecb-9105-535731ac4c73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to criticize Trump's choice in Gaetz. Of course, many of Gaetz's colleagues in the House have [also voiced opposition](https://substack.com/redirect/5560b9c5-7e4a-4ab7-ad37-61364320af07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and incredulity, especially in light of the congressional [ethics investigation](https://substack.com/redirect/941506ed-1c2e-4697-8044-dddea0ae4758?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that was poised to reach a conclusion tomorrow, or the [sex trafficking investigation](https://substack.com/redirect/c19d27a9-d3d0-48be-a45d-4a2e7e4c7418?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) launched by the Department of Justice which Trump outrageously appointed Gaetz to lead.
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication supported by readers, rather than advertisers.**Subscriptions are free**. To support my work and enable it to expand, please consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..BgSpdO-_TJcTw3EYwD5ObiwQOiIz1lrr1qCNsayKE1U?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=151667507)
Anyone who imagines that Trump will "drain the swamp," as he has long [pledged](https://substack.com/redirect/ef158eff-f014-47bc-9fd6-973c9fe9c891?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to do, might observe his early appointments. They (and the entirety of [his first term](https://substack.com/redirect/ef158eff-f014-47bc-9fd6-973c9fe9c891?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) suggest that, rather than return to Washington with a vision of any kind, he instead appears to be surrounding himself with sycophants dedicated to reinforcing his cult of personality.
### **What we can each do, wherever we live**
Earlier this week, I [rejoined the "Redneck Gone Green" podcast](https://substack.com/redirect/0efc61c8-f3eb-4692-940d-606198fb9eca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with my friend David Cobb. Our conversation touched on the various ways that Democrats lost the election, but also importantly explored things that we can each do in our communities responding to this month's events.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0efc61c8-f3eb-4692-940d-606198fb9eca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
When I ran for office, I was occasionally challenged by the need to project hope to supporters. I often needed to consciously cultivate that hope, if not conjure it in the face of a dystopian reality to which others are only now [awakening](https://substack.com/redirect/ff4685f4-57c8-48cf-8d6a-f0bbc1e4df36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
I appreciate the exchange with David because--while acknowledging the collapse of whatever vestiges of democracy remained in America--it emphasized opportunities for all of us to more closely engage our communities. We also explored various models that anyone might consider to serve their neighbors and build crucial grassroots networks.
Whether in the context of local climate resilience efforts preparing for or responding to natural disasters, or projects pooling resources to offer greater financial and economic resilience to working families challenged by our predatory corporate economy, or even community self-defense efforts to build the capacity to resist potential right wing vigilante violence, we will all need our neighbors more than ever in the coming weeks and months.
I hope our discussion offers something that inspires you to take action in your community, and encourage any comments (especially ones reflecting on grassroots organizing in which readers might be involved)!

Today, Human Rights Watch issued a report that flatly contradicted Blinken's shameless lies before Congress on Biden's behalf. Titled "," it offers a poignant and disturbing rebuke of Biden's legacy. The report notes that: According to the United Nations, 1.9 million people were displaced in Gaza as of October 2024 out of a population of 2.2 million people. This report examines the Israeli authorities' conduct which has led to this extraordinarily high level of displacement and finds these actions amount to forced displacement. Unlike appointed or elected Democrats, Human Rights Watch was willing to observe where the evidence unfortunately led. The report continues: Given the evidence strongly indicates that multiple acts of forced displacement were carried out with intent, it amounts to war crimes. body:
Election Day may be in the books, but my race isn’t done yet.
Sorry to reach out like this...

| |
---
| | | Friend, Election Day may be in the books, _but my race isn 't done yet._

_**[I'm neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6ffcad0480724eb180da0428601e92d7&_e=5Zbch64eqT44Ga43lFySzWWFtB9kF5mZrADDHQgyQ7RV-qr-Wokogn1DmOPlF09ZYoBRjkwm4B6TeVenjcvDdcYdec5RFe0rAod2jyXE8drvDQTxGsik360sFo6dE3DGpMb40w9lFFjC0AM1ckRoYc0MjN-SCfAyZ-Dw5fwgPSCPJpYBu9OuM46yKkQKCzrDZHIKE9EluPZqqBbnA5ekL6nSEp6cFtJPvLBB6VjXBM5ED86xh3J5n3XXS9mvaT4ic7pMTHk3fL79EtorQcSt_z48WI7J_LYdc13qdqShOlG9Rkc-D2ER662sl21lNH5IdIwqBdQ6HPhlfbuE9SJZcuyrO5D2KPWke6NYRyHo3e64osVJlpVkhPKflgWkyAJF-stk6g-mYKVxvEjCKp7163PtrlyZU_yDzlhhKwWL4nPTsFOLfJxsSwfPMo6GBVFt "I’m neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.")**_

If we're going to pull this out and keep my seat and our House Majority RED, then I'm going to need all hands on deck.

I spent every dime I had just to get through Election Day, and now I'm running on fumes. I NEED your urgent support to help me keep this fight going before the ballots are all counted.

_**[Please, can I count on you, Friend?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6ffcad0480724eb180da0428601e92d7&_e=5Zbch64eqT44Ga43lFySzWWFtB9kF5mZrADDHQgyQ7RV-qr-Wokogn1DmOPlF09ZYoBRjkwm4B6TeVenjcvDdcYdec5RFe0rAod2jyXE8drvDQTxGsik360sFo6dE3DGpMb40w9lFFjC0AM1ckRoYc0MjN-SCfAyZ-Dw5fwgPSCPJpYBu9OuM46yKkQKCzrDZHIKE9EluPZqqBbnA5ekL6nSEp6cFtJPvLBB6VjXBM5ED86xh3J5n3XXS9mvaT4ic7pMTHk3fL79EtorQcSt_8Y6ZJZ9eDL-N-t8SEY1F_VdRiH_p-D5sgPAX5QBPmppIdRLdQnlxNtt9gL0hwW_6f8JJJ0cGFkw2gdUP-2UrfpvulZdZ5rmUI-FaMH6uZaJa10gdD9AwK8HDA0ZIzfnDBGcweMfcusAMNyfH38_ozaBiH_51LnwQtgoSMRHZ3z2 "Please, can I count on you, Friend?")**_

Thank you,

Michelle Steel

name: Adam Gray
subject: We’re counting every vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District.

When I ran for this seat in 2022, our race came down to just 564 votes. It was the second-closest race in the entire country.

This year, I know that we can finish the job.

Right now, our race is **_still too close to call_** and we know it’s going to come down to every last vote.

[**Will you split a donation between our recount fund and Voter Protection Project today to ensure we can count every vote in CA-13 and flip this seat? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85106?t=6&akid=18036%2E878179%2ELJRDQa) | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85106?t=7&akid=18036%2E878179%2ELJRDQa)
---
I decided to run for Congress again because the San Joaquin Valley deserves leaders who work just as hard as we do. I got into this race to finally get results for this community, just like I did for 10 years in the California State Assembly.

**I’ve been part of close races before, and we knew this year’s race would be another one.** As votes continue to be counted, I just want to say how thankful I am to have your support.

**Let’s finish the job. That means counting every single vote.**

[**This isn’t over. Please split a donation of $10 or more between our recount fund and Voter Protection Project. In a race this close, everything counts.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85106?t=8&akid=18036%2E878179%2ELJRDQa)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Gray Recount Account and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85107?t=9&akid=18036%2E878179%2ELJRDQa)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85108?t=10&akid=18036%2E878179%2ELJRDQa)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85109?t=11&akid=18036%2E878179%2ELJRDQa)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85110?t=12&akid=18036%2E878179%2ELJRDQa)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85111?t=13&akid=18036%2E878179%2ELJRDQa)
Thanks for your support and patience,

Adam Gray
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18036%2E878179%2ELJRDQa). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18036%2E878179%2ELJRDQa).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18036%2E878179%2ELJRDQa) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=18036%2E878179%2ELJRDQa). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18036%2E878179%2ELJRDQa)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=18036%2E878179%2ELJRDQa)

body:

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mw_dmp_4_casey_recount?refcode=jtk2534-bu-text&amounts=5,25,50,100,250

name: Janelle Stelson
subject: I wanted to reach out to you
body:
Janelle Stelson has spent her career advocating for truth and integrity, and now she's running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/57CdP-wFgkuQm58EpOgxvQ2?unsubscribedata=PflGQUkd18mwSe7T76%2FX0oE8rn18g%2BMaKO4Ua8eqr98BxIQoVo3H155oxYRG%2Bs9581FLuHbDclBaOcjEyxybq%2BKspN0aSewmCWtsDh2vxgsUvP66XJGu9caUj3mll0NtgmtxaZ0znfMqTV5URRG6VwfW0fgsHlOxT1irjko5lEj%2Bx26Ept1l6gqhlPpV6JE6n4LhDeBC8GlYQMdg41Ck6fegSHC6zSoeMz9Jx%2BNOSm%2BW0c5DZxLb%2Fz0s%2B%2Bjfg4PMw4wZp%2Bf4KQhJPxkxNd1Y8EL0u4g50LX3HVPYSDvd17WGxA%2FBQt2hVXi6pZzsln6WN%2Fenj4F1LnHC1g0V%2FOUiXoIZsYNnVZJmAq22P7ojUzZkDbThgXZy4KYGNiIQ5r%2BnSbNqOb378lFZUYiMGYCA%2FKyx80XV0Qcq4ej5EzXx04KH2yhDGKdLYz8VB1I2DgNc)
---
| |
---
Team, When this race was called, I called Congressman Perry to congratulate him on his victory. It is my hope that he will be a representative for every Central Pennsylvanian regardless of who they voted for, and put partisanship aside to solve the challenges that face our community. **I am also reaching out to thank you for your generous support of my campaign.** Since day one, this has been about bringing people together from across the political spectrum to uplift a message focused on reforming a broken Washington, keeping communities safe and prosperous and protecting our fundamental freedoms. I am so grateful to every voter, volunteer and supporter who believed in this campaign, for standing with me and your dedication to democracy. The results are not what we wanted but I respect our democratic process. I am so appreciative to have been by your side as we fought for something greater than ourselves and I pledge to continue working for our community as I have for more than 30 years. Thank you again for your many kindnesses! Janelle
* * *

clean_body: Janelle Stelson has spent her career advocating for truth and integrity, and now she's running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Team, When this race was called, I called Congressman Perry to congratulate him on his victory. It is my hope that he will be a representative for every Central Pennsylvanian regardless of who they voted for, and put partisanship aside to solve the challenges that face our community. I am also reaching out to thank you for your generous support of my campaign. Since day one, this has been about bringing people together from across the political spectrum to uplift a message focused on reforming a broken Washington, keeping communities safe and prosperous and protecting our fundamental freedoms. I am so grateful to every voter, volunteer and supporter who believed in this campaign, for standing with me and your dedication to democracy. The results are not what we wanted but I respect our democratic process. I am so appreciative to have been by your side as we fought for something greater than ourselves and I pledge to continue working for our community as I have for more than 30 years. Thank you again for your many kindnesses! Janelle * | | | ---|---|--- Friends of Janelle Stelson P.O. Box 41 Lemoyne, PA 17043 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here:

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

Friend,
We’re excited to announce the panel topics for this year’s Annual Advance in December. These discussions will focus on the critical issues shaping our party and our future:

* **Open Conversation with Virginia Members of the RNC:** A candid discussion with key Virginia leaders from the Republican National Committee on the state of our party, our strategy, and how we’re moving forward to win in 2024 and beyond.

* **AI and Its Role in Politics:** A deep dive into how artificial intelligence is transforming political campaigns, voter engagement, and the way we communicate with Virginians.

* **Republican Women Leading the Way:** A celebration of the powerful role Republican women are playing in Virginia’s political landscape, and how they’re driving change and leadership within our party.

* **Winning the House of Delegates in 2025:** A focused conversation on our strategy and action plan for reclaiming the Virginia House of Delegates in 2025, and the importance of unified Republican leadership in the Commonwealth.

* **Election Integrity** : A vital discussion on safeguarding our elections, ensuring transparency, and protecting the fundamental right to vote. We’ll examine the steps we’re taking to ensure fair and secure elections in Virginia.

These topics are critical to our success, and we’re looking forward to engaging with you on these important issues!
---

clean_body: | | | | Secure your tickets today Friend, We’re excited to announce the panel topics for this year’s Annual Advance in December. These discussions will focus on the critical issues shaping our party and our future: Open Conversation with Virginia Members of the RNC: A candid discussion with key Virginia leaders from the Republican National Committee on the state of our party, our strategy, and how we’re moving forward to win in 2024 and beyond. AI and Its Role in Politics: A deep dive into how artificial intelligence is transforming political campaigns, voter engagement, and the way we communicate with Virginians. Republican Women Leading the Way: A celebration of the powerful role Republican women are playing in Virginia’s political landscape, and how they’re driving change and leadership within our party. Winning the House of Delegates in 2025: A focused conversation on our strategy and action plan for reclaiming the Virginia House of Delegates in 2025, and the importance of unified Republican leadership in the Commonwealth. Election Integrity : A vital discussion on safeguarding our elections, ensuring transparency, and protecting the fundamental right to vote. We’ll examine the steps we’re taking to ensure fair and secure elections in Virginia. These topics are critical to our success, and we’re looking forward to engaging with you on these important issues! | Our room block at the Forum Hotel & Omni are officially full, but we still have a limited number of rooms available at our alternative locations. Click below to book your room now —and make sure to purchase your ticket at the same time to secure both your accommodation and event access! Reminder:** A ticket purchase is required to confirm your hotel reservation. Don't wait—book today to guarantee your spot! | Thank you for your continued support, and we hope to see you in December! The Republican Party of Virginia PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA

name: Dan Carr
subject: A Call for Christians to Rise Up
body:
The Misunderstood Separation of Church and State:

| |
---|---|---
|
# A Call for Christians to Rise Up
### The Misunderstood Separation of Church and State:
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
| Nov 14
---
| [](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
We need a revival of faith in the public square, a renewal of the Christian spirit that once shaped America's identity. Christians must realize that they are not only allowed to engage in public life but that they are needed there. Now is the time to stand up, speak out, and remember that our voices matter, our faith matters, and our involvement in the direction of this nation is not only constitutional but essential. Let us be reminded that faith and freedom are not opposing forces--they are bound together in the spirit of America.
_**[Click here to finish reading"A Call for Christians to Rise Up"](https://substack.com/redirect/2bf6b11d-5640-4110-8a27-d9c03d798a69?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_

name: Katie Porter
subject: CA-47 stays blue!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39300%2E3422442%2ENdp1ud)
Derek, I’m excited to share some good news with you:
Dave Min has officially won in CA-47—the district I currently represent. I am proud to have supported his campaign early and consistently, hosting events, raising money, and giving advice.
It was critical that Democrats hold this seat, and we got it done with Dave! He was one of the very first candidates I endorsed this cycle because I know he will do right by Orange County and be a fierce champion for our interests in Congress.
To help Dave celebrate, I’m hoping to send him a card with thousands of signatures and messages from folks who will share in the joy of this hard-fought victory.
**[Will you take a moment to join me in signing Dave’s victory card?](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-em-20241114-2/?source=em20241114-39300&akid=39300%2E3422442%2ENdp1ud)**
[](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-em-20241114-2/?source=em20241114-39300&akid=39300%2E3422442%2ENdp1ud)
Thank you so much!
Katie

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241114-39300&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39300_3422442_Ndp1ud&akid=39300%2E3422442%2ENdp1ud)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39300%2E3422442%2ENdp1ud).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

body:
Pennsylvania’s Senate race isn’t over.

I wanted to send you a quick update on what’s happening here on the ground in Pennsylvania’s Senate race:
David McCormick and national Republicans are working to throw out votes in an attempt to disenfranchise Pennsylvania voters and ultimately impact the outcome of this election.

clean_body: Pennsylvania’s Senate race isn’t over. Hi Peter, I wanted to send you a quick update on what’s happening here on the ground in Pennsylvania’s Senate race: David McCormick and national Republicans are working to throw out votes in an attempt to disenfranchise Pennsylvania voters and ultimately impact the outcome of this election. With tens of thousands of votes left to count, we are still fighting to ensure that Pennsylvanians' voices are heard in this Senate race — but we need your help. Bob Casey has always fought for our democracy, and that fight does not end now. Thank you, Tiernan Donohue Campaign Manager Bob Casey for Senate

| **_Congratulations to our Boards of Education candidates on their victories!_** 🎉 As a graduate of public schools and an educator myself, these victories are personal because I understand the transformative difference that a good education can make.

Despite the discouraging news nationally, our Boards of Education candidates offer another bright spot here in Maryland! I’m so grateful to the brave souls who put their names on the ballot and ran strong campaigns prioritizing expanding opportunities for children and supporting talented educators. As new Boards of Education members, they will lead the way for change in our schools. We collectively ran a campaign that prioritized the value of a rising tide that could lift all ships.

_Big Congratulations to:_ ✅ Gloria D. Dent (Anne Arundel County District 1)

✅ Erica McFarland (Anne Arundel County District 3)

✅ Sarah J. McDermott (Anne Arundel District 4)

✅ Dana Schalheim (Anne Arundel District 5)

✅ Joanna Bache Tobin (Anne Arundel County District 6)

✅ Meg Ricks (Howard County District 1)

✅ Jen Mallo (Howard County District 4)

✅ Andrea Chamblee (Howard County District 5) My work in Congress will continue to deliver on our shared priorities: investing in our kids, uplifting educators, and building schools we can be proud of.

We will fight against book bans, invest in our public schools, and ensure students receive a world-class education. name: Team Pramila
subject: [SURVEY] What went wrong?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’ve put together a short open-ended survey to get your thoughts on what Democrats need to do differently going forward.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241114-4515-footer&t=1&akid=4515%2E420207%2EnA7XYf)
Peter, it’s obvious we have a lot of work to do to rebuild after this election.
But rather than aiming to eke out slim majorities in Congress and the electoral college, Democrats should strive to build a broad working-class coalition that can win lasting power and make real change.
That work begins now — and step one is listening to working people to learn what went wrong and how we can fix it.
**We’ve put together a short open-ended survey to get your thoughts on what Democrats need to do differently going forward.[Will you take a moment to let us know what you think?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2024-post-election-survey?source=em20241114-4515&akid=4515%2E420207%2EnA7XYf)**
**[Take the survey](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2024-post-election-survey?source=em20241114-4515&akid=4515%2E420207%2EnA7XYf)**
Whether there’s a policy issue that you think wasn’t prioritized enough or a campaign strategy you think Democrats should adopt, we want to hear from you.
Donald Trump has a small army of billionaires on his side, including the richest man in the world, Elon Musk. **The only way we’re going to overcome their money is with a mass popular movement of everyday people across the country.**
So your input here is crucial, Peter. Don’t let this election give you an excuse to give up, however terrifying and demoralizing the results may be.
[**Take a minute to fill out our post-election survey now and help us jump-start the effort to turn things around. You’ll be surprised how fast things can change.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2024-post-election-survey?source=em20241114-4515&akid=4515%2E420207%2EnA7XYf)
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241114-4515-footer&t=2&refcode2=4515_420207_nA7XYf&akid=4515%2E420207%2EnA7XYf)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4515%2E420207%2EnA7XYf)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4515%2E420207%2EnA7XYf)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Help me save my son
body:
My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=55c0d92da9a24147813b52bbb5d50755&_e=1kt3MXc4ROEpbQ4U0NZ4xNcLrTevcNPH7O_apAm80-fRfwtqgt3EKxqPN-ZOkGPbJcoQnAVjZNQYnJTbA1H8YyLR0Gawt9cLHzbTBPKw0F_ptPO64vYut6onv-flpcbla4KI7GO7HzAjO_LUq68NLPvkSmp_PIdNwvqCCyCb_XLwzt7fbZzys2jNw41DfX3Ak2_H3Nm6biEl_1MjFnOG7jHKkJR3raIx0sCpC6Y6os2lK5fr4PxBT9JJC4-5p1GsiWuGV2zRLTwQxefMCE2842vOBnBsl_PCTJNLMmfs-RtzwVVcIxJKcufiPaoNzc_CLr5LPxKfs0B57qm3IrKpR5ghpQsDQqTplIN60IuWmJEE2e2TDq7Nl3CKzSGVwsUqPF2AWX1aw1OUYI95GJ0h2g%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=55c0d92da9a24147813b52bbb5d50755&_e=1kt3MXc4ROEpbQ4U0NZ4xNcLrTevcNPH7O_apAm80-fRfwtqgt3EKxqPN-ZOkGPbJcoQnAVjZNQYnJTbA1H8YyLR0Gawt9cLHzbTBPKw0F_ptPO64vYut6onv-flpcbla4KI7GO7HzAjO_LUq68NLPvkSmp_PIdNwvqCCyCb_XLwzt7fbZzys2jNw41DfX3Ak2_H3Nm6biEl_1MjFnOG7jHKkJR3raIx0sCpC6Y6os0Gx9vsdv3W1n1zMp5QmwJiifAk3qrawMFfEzjkuzpW9XMOZNhnTQqmin0xmLYMmhwZ72_Xqa3VHvzebwQB1FfqOemF9oBNZXJ1YbXsxIQxJj2SWjH5ERb4t3TzBIY3c9GAmbpizdKoPESZbpJ26rreFMLfefA9vuMfj2CzvJEcbA%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=55c0d92da9a24147813b52bbb5d50755&_e=1kt3MXc4ROEpbQ4U0NZ4xNcLrTevcNPH7O_apAm80-fRfwtqgt3EKxqPN-ZOkGPbJcoQnAVjZNQYnJTbA1H8YyLR0Gawt9cLHzbTBPKw0F_ptPO64vYut6onv-flpcbla4KI7GO7HzAjO_LUq68NLPvkSmp_PIdNwvqCCyCb_XLwzt7fbZzys2jNw41DfX3Ak2_H3Nm6biEl_1MjFnOG7jHKkJR3raIx0sCpC6Y6os2PZ5-4gMM4gkqp-eD_S9YX60Sm-NeWIRbIbs5A_s9uTDwOklYBlj0VJ81LXkE8xSuXiVxLHM19IedV3SUTkzVxp9vR6TvR4YMcACxINZSVEA2nZumxCxmyx8qLIcEGabDturzpyK8iCmhOwSn9Qg8hi51SQSX_nX2w8WBkLtbmxQ%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=55c0d92da9a24147813b52bbb5d50755&_e=1kt3MXc4ROEpbQ4U0NZ4xNcLrTevcNPH7O_apAm80-fRfwtqgt3EKxqPN-ZOkGPbJcoQnAVjZNQYnJTbA1H8YyLR0Gawt9cLHzbTBPKw0F_ptPO64vYut6onv-flpcbla4KI7GO7HzAjO_LUq68NLPvkSmp_PIdNwvqCCyCb_XLwzt7fbZzys2jNw41DfX3Ak2_H3Nm6biEl_1MjFnOG7jHKkJR3raIx0sCpC6Y6os37HtqP_Ipq2norF97jbP8HhkhUEg4UOwJsxYR8Od_hiJqsauihffLsSn70hN_MY-ri-me1uQgTE4hy_k2JjKXA1iDLgOttrC-hVKY7HgndA6eIWZl-uO5kZiFFvYHnFtjXa5wxIV68GcoClxszXBAfDX21CTUis9O-xW9U6dHZXQ%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=55c0d92da9a24147813b52bbb5d50755&_e=1kt3MXc4ROEpbQ4U0NZ4xNcLrTevcNPH7O_apAm80-fRfwtqgt3EKxqPN-ZOkGPbJcoQnAVjZNQYnJTbA1H8YyLR0Gawt9cLHzbTBPKw0F_ptPO64vYut6onv-flpcbla4KI7GO7HzAjO_LUq68NLPvkSmp_PIdNwvqCCyCb_XLwzt7fbZzys2jNw41DfX3Ak2_H3Nm6biEl_1MjFnOG7jHKkJR3raIx0sCpC6Y6os22WTAD-1ZKEHodOFM5_zxaHYyv8QTujU9JSFyc-yXAJCLoviz3tDBn-vnFZlB-dl7fz5uatpFHWn_zJJ6cD3B3o7tjpjV7P47JMOFuTsVcTueB4JQ1nawyYwo-KJC9x3SIx4z320B00ohpNyeATS5Tvf8nLDnrasE7geniQDUpbw%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=55c0d92da9a24147813b52bbb5d50755&_e=1kt3MXc4ROEpbQ4U0NZ4xNcLrTevcNPH7O_apAm80-fRfwtqgt3EKxqPN-ZOkGPbJcoQnAVjZNQYnJTbA1H8YyLR0Gawt9cLHzbTBPKw0F_ptPO64vYut6onv-flpcbla4KI7GO7HzAjO_LUq68NLPvkSmp_PIdNwvqCCyCb_XLwzt7fbZzys2jNw41DfX3Ak2_H3Nm6biEl_1MjFnOG7jHKkJR3raIx0sCpC6Y6os1OUENYzvHax-AZf78onBOeeq29jA_V0IN-EdOUCCM4tfHDakUqx0UE5uPbg9DEP_QIg3zLEtWIF0wJv7r4qWQZqRKUkRosmgb7c5lu7f-I14BAUX5PZIvW5Dp7o08HY50Lm65k35IbDjtPMa06jSMjrtlJNNi9QuQNgYwHO7lQDw%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=55c0d92da9a24147813b52bbb5d50755&_e=1kt3MXc4ROEpbQ4U0NZ4xPKdOBgtB8ySIaPXmqZwcWL4n08Jr3e09mGgSlYHBRSFNGcYOJ5Ylze7HWg_5KkXpLbZu1xcg6Q8bGMz1t-0DtPKWqNoMFSx5iUOtYKuS2BBmJM59JwsSCrzOXC-_93UVktS1g2-N_Fxx4ZdB0MSwtfIxo--XIb8joeso9J7A0O2LPVCwqRCc-AZV_HSqBsecw%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click here to [Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=55c0d92da9a24147813b52bbb5d50755&_t=MFipX0oiUfnphtPtseA3UkZ3XZjhizxMjXQWRLwqPWCQdilzKhp-dRsAUg-ywRu-V3bMAe8daay1x9d0MvAAkaw1Zz2GqudpSLfmDWpesKezsDQrqxJkiktGjyLAjbsZ)

name: Elect Women HQ
subject: 🗺️ Looking ahead to 2026:
body:

name: Adam Gray
subject: We’re counting every vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District.

When I ran for this seat in 2022, our race came down to just 564 votes. It was the second-closest race in the entire country.

This year, I know that we can finish the job.

Right now, our race is **_still too close to call_** and we know it’s going to come down to every last vote.

[Will you split a donation between our recount fund and Ritchie Torres today to ensure we can count every vote in CA-13 and flip this seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97103832/512289276/-1769714749?amount=10&refcode=RTFC_20241114_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWZhZWYyZS1kNWEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLhzE6MUAwMElMj7lE-sPiPu5hd6reymG74RxGO-E1s=) | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97103833/512289277/-1769714749?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=RTFC_20241114_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWZhZWYyZS1kNWEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLhzE6MUAwMElMj7lE-sPiPu5hd6reymG74RxGO-E1s=)
---
I decided to run for Congress again because the San Joaquin Valley deserves leaders who work just as hard as we do. I got into this race to finally get results for this community, just like I did for 10 years in the California State Assembly.

**I’ve been part of close races before, and we knew this year’s race would be another one.** As votes continue to be counted, I just want to say how thankful I am to have your support.

Let’s finish the job. That means counting every single vote.

[This isn’t over. Please split a donation of $10 or more between our recount fund and Ritchie Torres. In a race this close, everything counts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97103834/512289278/-1769714749?amount=10&refcode=RTFC_20241114_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWZhZWYyZS1kNWEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLhzE6MUAwMElMj7lE-sPiPu5hd6reymG74RxGO-E1s=)

Adam Gray
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: | My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District. When I ran for this seat in 2022, our race came down to just 564 votes. It was the second-closest race in the entire country. This year, I know that we can finish the job. Right now, our race is still too close to call and we know it’s going to come down to every last vote. = | = I decided to run for Congress again because the San Joaquin Valley deserves leaders who work just as hard as we do. I got into this race to finally get results for this community, just like I did for 10 years in the California State Assembly. I’ve been part of close races before, and we knew this year’s race would be another one. As votes continue to be counted, I just want to say how thankful I am to have your support. Let’s finish the job. That means counting every single vote. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Gray - Recount Account and Ritchie Torres will go through immediately: = = = Thanks for your support and patience, Adam Gray | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. To make the most powerful lasting impact and to join Ritchie in the fight for progressive values in Congress, make a=. Click here to . Click here to . | | = =

We’d love it if you would read this whole email -- but if you’re short on time, will you chip in $14 to help us reach 597 grassroots donations for Raja before midnight? It would mean the world to him to have your support. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97104077/512290049/-1810142050?amount=14&refcode=20241114_em_fr_b1_raja_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmE2MGE3Mi1kNmEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gX89ct5AUNa33eEr9er68NjJfN8Nftr7R0TI99a7LRo=) Peter, our family comes from humble beginnings. And as parents, we couldn’t be more proud of Raja for helping others do the same. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97104078/512290050/-1810142050?amount=14&refcode=20241114_em_fr_b1_raja_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmE2MGE3Mi1kNmEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gX89ct5AUNa33eEr9er68NjJfN8Nftr7R0TI99a7LRo=) _Us with Raja in Washington!_

We know this in our hearts: Raja is exactly who we need in Congress. That’s why we’re stepping in for him today. Peter \-- we’ll be frank with you.
Never in our wildest dreams did we think Raja would become a Congressman.
But we know that this extraordinary job comes with many challenges.
Between fighting against those who threaten our democracy to ensuring that people aren’t left behind by unfair systems, our son is doing so much for each and every one of us.
[_**So now, we’re doing what parents do: We’re stepping in and helping our son. We know it would mean the world to Raja to see 597 grassroots supporters step up in this moment. clean_body: = Peter, our family comes from humble beginnings. We faced economic hardship when we first immigrated to the United States. But we worked hard to achieve the American Dream. And as parents, we couldn’t be more proud of Raja for helping others do the same. | = Us with Raja in Washington! = Peter \-- we’ll be frank with you. Never in our wildest dreams did we think Raja would become a Congressman. But we know that this extraordinary job comes with many challenges. Between fighting against those who threaten our democracy to ensuring that people aren’t left behind by unfair systems, our son is doing so much for each and every one of us. = **= = = = = =** From the bottom of our hearts, thank you. Dr. K.S. and Vijaya Krishnamoorthi | Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? | = | | Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress Friends of Raja for Congress PO Box 681202 Schaumburg, IL 60168 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=07810e9817ad4487846ced312d03544d&_e=6Jf0Ebe-AcKC-CBPD3hzgksrr8yLrBV2Li3MZkVY_UJLL2RBWiAI-suHqaerFhJnXGBo65Hm6XlbQcH7dtT4-RZDoFHLaOCjOg_qsG6bJo6bbYYVGr8mWGY4e-vYGMWmg3YMapm8nOFXhwuuqO8rD1LeOGDThW5G15ALw8JkH13FSe3Hh3LVofUuXpEH73tyY7aRvyJnf75minPKIiQw1zk0D9meAwmq59X36A8P8lWxE7tgQcSONsrvpB4CUKpeAQm4XRVhDx6SY0oFVe-aKdO4ByER7pjuY-VpNTchvi4YshDj9CxYA0aFTn3WTatpZlJSDxovSymutm3Q4baIq_ikICREStmP9p6HBkx-c4ftS89XOUUOyvMHxN7rYqkc)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=07810e9817ad4487846ced312d03544d&_e=6Jf0Ebe-AcKC-CBPD3hzgksrr8yLrBV2Li3MZkVY_UJLL2RBWiAI-suHqaerFhJnXGBo65Hm6XlbQcH7dtT4-RZDoFHLaOCjOg_qsG6bJo6bbYYVGr8mWGY4e-vYGMWmg3YMapm8nOFXhwuuqO8rD1LeOGDThW5G15ALw8JkH13FSe3Hh3LVofUuXpEH73tyY7aRvyJnf75minPKIiQw1xV2d5XKIkuQGkUMVrhLNnpHwjdP8SGMSyKIB7SKg-l-16pVpifMVCXef7fnEMFWbVRBV7lBz0HIvby-cNGLznoO00XrLo-mLP9aZB4dFKpn-YHpp6r3YHcwHS1ElYZXf9OEhsbSCon4rQ6ciTjQNrTGciKVVsoxQxjCW3MrnZtd)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: This Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Help us bring joy into homes around NYC.
#
Last year, we gave out over 300 turkeys to families at Thanksgiving who didn’t have one. **This year, we hope to double that number.**
[Thanksgiving is two weeks away. Will you chip in $5 or anything you can today to help us bring the joy of the holiday season into homes around NYC this year?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241114-turkeys.egLMAP&refcode=em20241114-7582-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7582%2E2526796%2EhsYFay)
**[Contribute🥧 🍂](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241114-turkeys.egLMAP&refcode=em20241114-7582-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=7582%2E2526796%2EhsYFay)**
We’re teaming up with NYC public housing developments, community organizations, houses of worship, food pantries and local elected officials to **give hundreds of families an opportunity to celebrate community, mutual aid, and gratitude.**
Many of the organizations we partner with to distribute turkeys — such as the Youth Ministries for Peace & Justice and Glebe Senior Houses — focus on uplifting our most vulnerable communities, including asylum seekers new to the U.S. and senior citizens.
We’ve run the numbers, and $15-$20 means a family without a turkey gets to share in the Thanksgiving season.
[Can you chip in $5 or anything you can today to help us make that happen?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241114-turkeys.egLMAP&refcode=em20241114-7582-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=7582%2E2526796%2EhsYFay)
**[Help us celebrate the giving season →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241114-turkeys.egLMAP&refcode=em20241114-7582-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=7582%2E2526796%2EhsYFay)**
From all of us here, thank you for your support.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241114-turkeys?refcode=em20241114-7582-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=5&refcode2=7582_2526796_hsYFay&akid=7582%2E2526796%2EhsYFay)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241114-7582-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=6&akid=7582%2E2526796%2EhsYFay)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=7582%2E2526796%2EhsYFay) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=7582%2E2526796%2EhsYFay) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=7582%2E2526796%2EhsYFay)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=10&akid=7582%2E2526796%2EhsYFay)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=7582%2E2526796%2EhsYFay)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

Many of the organizations we partner with to distribute turkeys — such as the Youth Ministries for Peace & Justice and Glebe Senior Houses — focus on uplifting our most vulnerable communities, including asylum seekers new to the U.S. and senior citizens. name: Speaker Mike Johnson

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bd4ccdf614c040d39ee9026004efd073&_e=83XhLqntbUKE2P76zzNqhWc4gEd_BRPC4ws96gVR11lNYRj-MJEEsjxwjRdQWkxYbd1eQr7J7Vhq5JFSQ9HSNNBfpHc8msv2mK_tvlTebYpQ932_2c-QVtdQa9LYCxwRhMZ_kyULmeHvB0v2qxeUX7ZILdyu96I1_oNBzKW5ZJhH1wJa4NReOJmMgiYVMa6g9XlGgPGdZ2LhyMW0phWODe6PAyDha-QlVbNe03y52nFXS5eC8swT42tmNCyqsrPf0u4YZy5hzwUgiXX4jDZoFGjLP1K3X6izlojyq6Ndt3QM5Z4TksuhwMzQwwJK3Yk4ykfmo8ip2F8BvK7HBAZOXSZhs_ttANaBc2IG6AMWMgEaLGNiYvjrgTq2VDOboi3o5cO4DiR5UiUhcJZVTBw7XbjxsUHJAzXj26qHJRDrI5H0ByHZ5UZGbhlobLeHTKTNUUfi8hthsd7EMv-yP_NUmciZgUXmZnXvW0uyhI7kcP0%3D)

Fellow Republican, We’ve done it. We’ve put one of the greatest Presidents in American history back in charge. We re-took the Senate, and NOW we have OFFICIALLY retained the House majority! **_[But this isn’t the end of the fight, it’s just the beginning. Our House majority will be RAZOR THIN once again.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bd4ccdf614c040d39ee9026004efd073&_e=83XhLqntbUKE2P76zzNqhWc4gEd_BRPC4ws96gVR11lNYRj-MJEEsjxwjRdQWkxYbd1eQr7J7Vhq5JFSQ9HSNNBfpHc8msv2mK_tvlTebYpQ932_2c-QVtdQa9LYCxwRhMZ_kyULmeHvB0v2qxeUX7ZILdyu96I1_oNBzKW5ZJhH1wJa4NReOJmMgiYVMa6g9XlGgPGdZ2LhyMW0phWODe6PAyDha-QlVbNe03y52nFXS5eC8swT42tmNCyqsrPf0u4YZy5hzwUgiXX4jDZoFGjLP1K3X6izlojyq6Ndt3QM5Z4TksuhwMzQwwJK3Yk4zE_GhunSHbJnwMK8J69IeEYd8YtiMIgpS2h_ltRp5Zx2qw18fB0bu2KdY-O4U6beyVxO7hGCzdohyXrcWesFCiTsgoZSrinagPtoLoiEEal333axGWfz7U9oDffHt_wAGiHMKs8BVSQI3ALq-BtF6nAL4Pt-nk9oo5DltADLe6M%3D) _** That means if anything unexpected happens and a Special Election is called – we MUST be prepared! Needless to say, we cannot take any risks with our Republican House majority. So I am announcing TODAY that we are gathering the resources to DOMINATE the Democrats in any Special Elections that may come up and to start building our war chest to take down the Democrats once again in 2026. **_[**_Will you send in a donation of ANY amount today to ensure that we have the resources on hand to defeat the Democrats in any unexpected Special Elections that come up over the next year?_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bd4ccdf614c040d39ee9026004efd073&_e=83XhLqntbUKE2P76zzNqhWc4gEd_BRPC4ws96gVR11lNYRj-MJEEsjxwjRdQWkxYbd1eQr7J7Vhq5JFSQ9HSNNBfpHc8msv2mK_tvlTebYpQ932_2c-QVtdQa9LYCxwRhMZ_kyULmeHvB0v2qxeUX7ZILdyu96I1_oNBzKW5ZJhH1wJa4NReOJmMgiYVMa6g9XlGgPGdZ2LhyMW0phWODe6PAyDha-QlVbNe03y52nFXS5eC8swT42tmNCyqsrPf0u4YZy5hzwUgiXX4jDZoFGjLP1K3X6izlojyq6Ndt3QM5Z4TksuhwMzQwwJK3Yk4lD0NuRROKehItVNjHe4ERvHjA5Y42KcgVkucvZRO4U2a4twpn5zGrLf0JrQXPYgIseLvhEcX34FGHNEujrjIPzDAYqSv-hGD4M2DF0pj3ca2c8aUcijB1w6r2msC1-xJC59JCYcKfoNMYZG1aoEF3iyyF2Q24gIJyXSN66vq7fA%3D)_**
---
[**CHIP IN NOW!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bd4ccdf614c040d39ee9026004efd073&_e=83XhLqntbUKE2P76zzNqhWc4gEd_BRPC4ws96gVR11lNYRj-MJEEsjxwjRdQWkxYbd1eQr7J7Vhq5JFSQ9HSNNBfpHc8msv2mK_tvlTebYpQ932_2c-QVtdQa9LYCxwRhMZ_kyULmeHvB0v2qxeUX7ZILdyu96I1_oNBzKW5ZJhH1wJa4NReOJmMgiYVMa6g9XlGgPGdZ2LhyMW0phWODe6PAyDha-QlVbNe03y52nFXS5eC8swT42tmNCyqsrPf0u4YZy5hzwUgiXX4jDZoFGjLP1K3X6izlojyq6Ndt3QM5Z4TksuhwMzQwwJK3Yk4_VgsLBQ62zn0IA-KR3-6TBG0kTcWh3DnSEWsoJAFPemoG72CrFeQgGXAyuQ9tJjGsWuCUrghjZXCBsBayVLDPGwsb5JE__y4xRWrqHsBF5EHgLTUe6ov2RitEqY0Mbk_BQW5x3Mf5nofK7YgDp3Ecj1ezJWEalQgL-ynpxOQYoo%3D)
---
**_[Truthfully, Fellow Republican, you can say GOODBYE to all the things we have set out to do together if we’re not prepared to battle the Democrat’s fundraising machine. We know that the radical left will dig in their heels and pull every stunt in the book to stop us from making the changes we need.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bd4ccdf614c040d39ee9026004efd073&_e=83XhLqntbUKE2P76zzNqhWc4gEd_BRPC4ws96gVR11lNYRj-MJEEsjxwjRdQWkxYbd1eQr7J7Vhq5JFSQ9HSNNBfpHc8msv2mK_tvlTebYpQ932_2c-QVtdQa9LYCxwRhMZ_kyULmeHvB0v2qxeUX7ZILdyu96I1_oNBzKW5ZJhH1wJa4NReOJmMgiYVMa6g9XlGgPGdZ2LhyMW0phWODe6PAyDha-QlVbNe03y52nFXS5eC8swT42tmNCyqsrPf0u4YZy5hzwUgiXX4jDZoFGjLP1K3X6izlojyq6Ndt3QM5Z4TksuhwMzQwwJK3Yk4S7fh5H2RLjX2VyC26x0tY0q0FxAyMzMxOsxhCJQMSrdnnok4KIk5QXKRLzZBbBwh6uEPfJUkamisTIBetInSQ7JmDCCDAFohIhP3KBLZxIvM7zpS5SHV0Re2sn5R-5X3EUbAg8au_3uB-M1HUd7Q9xelWx9SEe2SfUx_KJrboug%3D)_** **_Do you want to secure the border and KEEP IT SECURE? We need the House majority._** **_Do you want to DRAIN THE SWAMP and demolish the deep state? We need the House majority._** **_Do you want to pass tax cuts, cut waste from the budget, make America energy DOMINANT, and restore peace through strength? We need the House majority to do that. _** It goes without saying... I am extremely grateful for you and everything that you’ve done for my team and our wonderful country. And if you can’t afford to give today, I understand. We are still mounting our great economic comeback. Together, WE WON! **_[**_But together, we must continue to fight._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bd4ccdf614c040d39ee9026004efd073&_e=83XhLqntbUKE2P76zzNqhWc4gEd_BRPC4ws96gVR11lNYRj-MJEEsjxwjRdQWkxYbd1eQr7J7Vhq5JFSQ9HSNNBfpHc8msv2mK_tvlTebYpQ932_2c-QVtdQa9LYCxwRhMZ_kyULmeHvB0v2qxeUX7ZILdyu96I1_oNBzKW5ZJhH1wJa4NReOJmMgiYVMa6g9XlGgPGdZ2LhyMW0phWODe6PAyDha-QlVbNe03y52nFXS5eC8swT42tmNCyqsrPf0u4YZy5hzwUgiXX4jDZoFGjLP1K3X6izlojyq6Ndt3QM5Z4TksuhwMzQwwJK3Yk4_DHGAcCBRxfnLTp3Sm9MMY9zEN4GYJTBYfO7Nyz6AGy1GfvnyLxgZTXOKk-Pa54qNFmHpUSbE3cIz8EDAdX6j392M3bL4KFrlIgURpUuTgrb-ONm5x4W177K_mKWtHdmZdes73_GTJgZdMJCrErGcxvJIpKlJhGux-Hl7tDFIxo%3D)_** Sincerely,
Speaker Mike Johnson
