body:
My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District.

| My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District.

When I ran for this seat in 2022, our race came down to just 564 votes. It was the second-closest race in the entire country.

This year, I know that we can finish the job.

Right now, our race is **_still too close to call_** and we know it’s going to come down to every last vote. [Will you split a donation between our recount fund and UNITEDemocrats today to ensure we can count every vote in CA-13 and flip this seat?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97104763/512292185/281639194?amount=3&refcode=UD_20241114_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlNTgzNjc3LWRiYTItZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lQHCLt8o1d9XX5w3G2dwC_wIcdH3IashZWN19nksSIY=) | **[DONATE $3](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97104764/512292186/281639194?amount=3&refcode=UD_20241114_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlNTgzNjc3LWRiYTItZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lQHCLt8o1d9XX5w3G2dwC_wIcdH3IashZWN19nksSIY=)**
---
I decided to run for Congress again because the San Joaquin Valley deserves leaders who work just as hard as we do. I got into this race to finally get results for this community, just like I did for 10 years in the California State Assembly.

**I’ve been part of close races before, and we knew this year’s race would be another one.** As votes continue to be counted, I just want to say how thankful I am to have your support.

**Let’s finish the job. That means counting every single vote.**

[This isn’t over. Please split a donation of $3 or more between our recount fund and UNITEDemocrats. In a race this close, everything counts.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97104765/512292187/281639194?amount=3&refcode=UD_20241114_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlNTgzNjc3LWRiYTItZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lQHCLt8o1d9XX5w3G2dwC_wIcdH3IashZWN19nksSIY=)

name: Dr. Asif Mahmood
subject: Our Fight Isn’t Over!
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/de8457344cc6/jv3wzhjdlb?e=7b1b739a89)
---
| | | | [](https://drasifmahmood.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=e2dc9999b9&e=7b1b739a89)
---
|
# Our Fight Isn’t Over!

Dear Friends,
It’s been a challenging week as we navigate the consequences of the recent elections. While every president has the right to nominate their cabinet, I must express my strong opposition to all of Trump's picks thus far. One nomination, in particular, stands out as unfit, unqualified, and dangerous for a vital position in our government: Matt Gaetz for Attorney General.
We know how Trump has previously attempted to use Attorneys General as personal allies to settle scores. With Gaetz in this role, all safeguards and accountability would be dismantled. His troubling history, which includes allegations of sexual misconduct and ties to sex trafficking, raises serious concerns. Just yesterday, he resigned from Congress to evade a damning bipartisan report from the House Ethics Committee regarding his conduct.
Prominent Republicans, including Senator Lisa Murkowski, former Ambassador John Bolton, and former Speaker Kevin McCarthy, have already condemned this nomination. We must not allow this precarious choice to proceed.
I urge you to reach out to Republican incoming Majority Leader John Thune and any Republican senators. Call their offices and demand they oppose Gaetz's nomination. It's essential to remind them not to relinquish their responsibility by allowing recess appointments to sidestep the Senate’s confirmation process.
You can look up Senate members and their contact numbers using the buttons below.As we grapple with these election outcomes, it may feel daunting to uphold the values we cherish. Now, more than ever, we must double down and fight for our principles. It's easy to champion what’s right when our side controls the White House and Congress; this is our true test of commitment and character.
Let’s make our voices heard and stand up for the integrity of our government. As Bob Marley wisely said, “You never know how strong you are until being strong is your only choice.” Let’s choose strength and action as we advocate for our values and our country.
Best,
Dr. Asif MahmoodPS. Follow me on X, (link below) for more updates.

---
[Contact Majority Leader Thune](https://drasifmahmood.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=6b0308ed95&e=7b1b739a89)
[Contact Senators ](https://drasifmahmood.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=bfe20706d2&e=7b1b739a89)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | Our Fight Isn’t Over! Dear Friends, It’s been a challenging week as we navigate the consequences of the recent elections. While every president has the right to nominate their cabinet, I must express my strong opposition to all of Trump's picks thus far. One nomination, in particular, stands out as unfit, unqualified, and dangerous for a vital position in our government: Matt Gaetz for Attorney General. We know how Trump has previously attempted to use Attorneys General as personal allies to settle scores. With Gaetz in this role, all safeguards and accountability would be dismantled. His troubling history, which includes allegations of sexual misconduct and ties to sex trafficking, raises serious concerns. Just yesterday, he resigned from Congress to evade a damning bipartisan report from the House Ethics Committee regarding his conduct. Prominent Republicans, including Senator Lisa Murkowski, former Ambassador John Bolton, and former Speaker Kevin McCarthy, have already condemned this nomination. We must not allow this precarious choice to proceed. I urge you to reach out to Republican incoming Majority Leader John Thune and any Republican senators. Call their offices and demand they oppose Gaetz's nomination. It's essential to remind them not to relinquish their responsibility by allowing recess appointments to sidestep the Senate’s confirmation process. You can look up Senate members and their contact numbers using the buttons below.As we grapple with these election outcomes, it may feel daunting to uphold the values we cherish. Now, more than ever, we must double down and fight for our principles. It's easy to champion what’s right when our side controls the White House and Congress; this is our true test of commitment and character. Let’s make our voices heard and stand up for the integrity of our government. As Bob Marley wisely said, “You never know how strong you are until being strong is your only choice.” Let’s choose strength and action as we advocate for our values and our country. Best, Dr. Asif MahmoodPS. Follow me on X, (link below) for more updates. | | | | | | https:// | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2024 Dr. Asif Mahmood. All rights reserved.

Hi Friend,
Did you hear?
Justice Samuel Alito this week announced his radical right ring reign on the Supreme Court will continue.... Indefinitely.
After writing the opinion robbing women of the right to make their own healthcare decisions. After creating immunity from prosecution for Donald Trump. After voting to strip the EPA of its ability to regulate polluters. Alito says his work is not done.
That's where we come in!
This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court, the national campaign working with 75 members of the House and Senate, from Hakeem Jeffries to Senator-Elect Adam Schiff, to end lifetime appointments to SCOTUS and enact 18-year term limits.
We're all devasted by Trump's return to the White House. But the answer isn't to hide our heads in the sand. The answer is to get up, dust off our disappointment, and get back to work because our nation's future is at stake.
We're backing candidates for the mid-terms, pledging to support the TERM Act. We're mounting a public pressure campaign to force Congress to act.
And we're asking you to join us by contributing whatever you can to the cause.
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97104827/512292751/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWRkYTA1MmItZGNhMi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vuq3W_xHBBqkzvT4vX4yChSmrWL4_I8Quf4QIZAVGvI=)
[**> >>The public supports what we're doing. Recent polls show over 70% of Americans believe SCOTUS shouldn't be a job for life.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97104828/512292753/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWRkYTA1MmItZGNhMi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vuq3W_xHBBqkzvT4vX4yChSmrWL4_I8Quf4QIZAVGvI=)
We've built a movement! But we need your help to make it happen.
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

| | Friends, Our team is in the midst of a deep dive to understand the election results, to see what we can learn and how it informs our future work, and plan our next steps in the fight against voter suppression. But there’s also some great news — we went in big to support local Democracy Champions here in Georgia who were up against big monied MAGA forces and who won! We endorsed and supported 61 local Georgia candidates in the November General Election — and saw 50 win their elections outright. Three of these candidates, Floyd Griffin, HD 149, Tangie Herring, HD 145, and Bryce Berry, HD 56, flipped Republican-held state legislative seats and defeated extreme anti-democratic Republicans. In a race that is too close to call, Farooq Mughal, HD 105, might be facing a recount. We know these Democracy Champions will work to ensure Georgians can safely and freely cast their ballots and fight for working people, so that our future elections reflect the will of the people. Threats like mass voter challenges and attempts to legislate voter disenfranchisement won’t disappear, and we must keep fighting to protect the right to vote. [**We need leaders who are willing to stand up to election deniers and voter suppressors. Can you chip in today to help Fair Fight support candidates who will work to keep our elections free and fair?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97105046/512293160/-1598577384?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241114_f_GeorgiaWins_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmRhMDUyYi1kY2EyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e7dTcGkCAzdP1Qa0JAZg1h_DA467j-DX_Pbt7D0eThE=) While MAGA lawmakers and State Election Board members work to take away our rights and hold onto power, we look to our Democracy Champions to ensure our ability to use our voices to shape our own futures. We’re not backing down anytime soon. Thank you for fighting with us. name: Adam Gray [via DOTL]
subject: Help us count every vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
|
---
My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District.

When I ran for this seat in 2022, our race came down to just 564 votes. It was the second-closest race in the entire country.

This year, I know that we can finish the job.

Right now, our race is _**still too close to call**_ and we know it’s going to come down to every last vote.

[**Will you split a donation between our recount fund and Democracy On The Line today to ensure we can count every vote in CA-13 and flip this seat?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97105112/512293290/-363098283?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20241114_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3ZGEwNTJiLWRjYTItZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MNqIZEPin-jkBnN4KeWUmXfPcCB3x7RYDRc6diOmvmc=) | **[CHIP IN $7 NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97105118/512293298/-363098283?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20241114_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3ZGEwNTJiLWRjYTItZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MNqIZEPin-jkBnN4KeWUmXfPcCB3x7RYDRc6diOmvmc=)**
---
I decided to run for Congress again because the San Joaquin Valley deserves leaders who work just as hard as we do. I got into this race to finally get results for this community, just like I did for 10 years in the California State Assembly.

**I’ve been part of close races before, and we knew this year’s race would be another one.** As votes continue to be counted, I just want to say how thankful I am to have your support.

**Let’s finish the job. That means counting every single vote.**

[**This isn’t over. Please split a donation of $7 or more between our recount fund and Democracy On The Line. clean_body: | My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District. When I ran for this seat in 2022, our race came down to just 564 votes. It was the second-closest race in the entire country. This year, I know that we can finish the job. Right now, our race is still too close to call and we know it’s going to come down to every last vote. = | = I decided to run for Congress again because the San Joaquin Valley deserves leaders who work just as hard as we do. I got into this race to finally get results for this community, just like I did for 10 years in the California State Assembly. I’ve been part of close races before, and we knew this year’s race would be another one. As votes continue to be counted, I just want to say how thankful I am to have your support. Let’s finish the job. That means counting every single vote. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Gray and Democracy on the Line will go through immediately: **= = = = Thanks for your support and patience, Adam Gray | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and protect our fragile Democracy, make a=.**

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: Starting from zero
body:
| | Peter – Thanks to the incredible support of folks like you, we secured a decisive victory in one of the most competitive races in the country this cycle. I truly couldn’t have accomplished it without you.

**But, our work is not done yet, Peter: Despite our race being called by every major national and local news outlet, and vote counting nearly complete, Joe Kent still has not conceded.

We know that Kent and his shady backers are going to fight this as long as they can, so we need to be prepared for anything they may throw our way. Peter, I know we’ve asked a lot of you recently, and I can’t express enough how much of an impact your support has made. But if there’s anything we’ve learned this year, it’s that we can’t take anything for granted.

And if there’s anything we know about Joe Kent, it’s that he doesn’t know when to quit.

**I’m already getting back to work delivering solutions for Southwest Washington in Congress, but with Kent still on the attack, we need to make sure we can continue defending our work, and this seat.[Will you pitch in $10 or any amount you can to our Campaign Defense Fund today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97105343/512294002/-821625913?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_241114_1_1&refcode2=71e34bb3-dda2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWUzNGJiMy1kZGEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VPD6zhRqR7bE6Ew7Fiy1s9XuTPyMHtBu7-9AOh5Rz9M=)**

Marie

clean_body: | | Peter – Thanks to the incredible support of folks like you, we secured a decisive victory in one of the most competitive races in the country this cycle. I truly couldn’t have accomplished it without you. But, our work is not done yet, Peter: Despite our race being called by every major national and local news outlet, and vote counting nearly complete, Joe Kent still has not conceded. We know that Kent and his shady backers are going to fight this as long as they can, so we need to be prepared for anything they may throw our way. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Peter, I know we’ve asked a lot of you recently, and I can’t express enough how much of an impact your support has made. But if there’s anything we’ve learned this year, it’s that we can’t take anything for granted. And if there’s anything we know about Joe Kent, it’s that he doesn’t know when to quit. I’m already getting back to work delivering solutions for Southwest Washington in Congress, but with Kent still on the attack, we need to make sure we can continue defending our work, and this seat.= = Thanks again – for everything. Marie | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. As the representative for Washington’s third Congressional District, she's working to bring the voices of working people back to DC. Marie works for Washington! = Email is an important way to stay in contact but if you feel like you’re receiving too much, to only receive the most important messages. ** Paid for by Marie Gluesenkamp Perez Campaign Defense Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Marie for Congress; Washington State Democratic Central Committee; and DCCC Marie for Congress PO Box 1164 Washougal, WA 98671 United States

name: Powered By People
subject: Will you support the ACLU today?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

We wanted to be sure that you saw Beto's email from last week. Please read
his message below and then chip in to the ACLU if you can!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

In the coming years we are going to have to fight to protect our basic
rights, from reproductive freedom to the freedom to protest and openly
dissent.

We cannot give in to despair, as much as these election results may hurt
or depress us. When I think about the future, I think about my three
children and the country they are inheriting.

Giving up on our work for a brighter future would cede our country to
Trump and his cruelty, which is why I am reaching out to today. Our future
is worth fighting for.

The ACLU needs our support as they gear up for legal challenges in the
days, months, and years ahead. They filed 434 legal challenges against the
2016-2020 Trump administration and obstructed some of his worst policies
like the Muslim ban.^1

So today, I am asking: [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20241114-aclu.3gJdfa&refcode=ema20241114-239898&t=1001&akid=239898%2E444211%2E_GYiov ]Will you turn your anger into action and make a
contribution to the ACLU to ensure they have the resources to fight back
against Trump on day #1?

I’m grateful to be in this fight with you,

Beto

^1
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/63846?t=1002&akid=239898%2E444211%2E_GYiov ]aclu.org/news/civil-liberties/the-aclu-is-fighting-back-against-trump

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=239898%2E444211%2E_GYiov

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

body:
After the heartfelt speech by Vice President Harris last week, we are all being called on to keep fighting for our country and our freedoms.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97105809/512295430/-247203143?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-11-14_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhNDQwZmE2LWUwYTItZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xjVjtYlHXhKla-sUFadfguv_n_B-rcQDXcDBHhpKUv8=)

| Peter,

After the heartfelt speech by Vice President Harris last week, we are all being called on to keep fighting for our country and our freedoms. Emerge has always been at the forefront of recruiting, training, and supporting Democratic women up and down the ballot.

We work around the clock – not just during a presidential election – to help women get elected from school boards to Congress.

This year, we witnessed a win rate of around _**70%**_ for our alums who ran for office and there is no other organization in Democratic politics that is consistently successful in helping women win! This critical work is _only_ possible with your support.

_**This is the beginning and an opportunity to take action and we are already seeing a big uptick in interest from women wanting to train and run.**_ That’s why we’re moving full steam ahead and hosting dozens of state-based and national virtual trainings in 2025 for women who want to run for office. However, it will take significant resources to ensure we can keep up with the demand and train as many women as we can.

[_**We need your help to ramp up our recruitment efforts! Will you contribute today to show your support for Emerge and help us kick off recruitment season strong?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97105810/512295431/-247203143?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-11-14_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhNDQwZmE2LWUwYTItZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xjVjtYlHXhKla-sUFadfguv_n_B-rcQDXcDBHhpKUv8=)

name: YourVoteCounts
subject: Harris County Election Fraud proven by independent data analytics experts...lawsuits going forward
body:
"I'm sick of this election fraud. I want integrity restored to the vote." Joseph L. Trahan GOP Candiate for SD 15 Founder & Executive Chairman BIZP
| | [](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/48843?id=795548.376.1.0c892515f5598c86dc34612a7bd7a5ac)
---
[](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/48843?id=795548.377.1.fbfd4f7a3107b537c74c0b58d1bf5d5b) |
---
**_"I'm sick of this election fraud. I want integrity restored to the vote."_** **Joseph L. Trahan** **GOP Candiate for SD 15** **Founder & Executive Chairman BIZPAC.us**
---
I just spoke with Caroline Kane after a lengthy briefing on Harris County Election fraud from first hand witnesses to Central Count, Early Voting Pole Watchers, and this report form the outside data analytics expert firm retained to track and trace the election fraud in Harris County. Along with other lawsuits, this suit now has specific demonstrable election fraud documented and going forward for prosecution.
# Understanding the Vote Fraud machine inside Harris County:
The following data will enable you to understand how the Democrats have been stealing elections in Harris County for at least a decade. Dr Steven F Hotze hired a data analytics company to determine how many illegal names were on the Harris County voter file, as of August 22, 2024. Based upon the National Change of Address file, obtained from the U.S. Postal Service, there were 586,811 illegal names on the voter file: **26,879 names of individuals who had moved out of the state** **384,007 who had moved out of Harris County** **151,578 who had moved within Harris County, but had not updated their voter registration with their new address** **24,347 names with addresses at commercial buildings, churches, vacant lots, government buildings, charitable organizations, postal boxes, etc.** The post-election data analysis follows below. The voter IDs (VUID) of the illegal names were then compared with the file of the names of those who had voted. _Example:_
---
|
---
**197,788 votes were cast for names of individuals who lived out of Harris County** **3,846 votes were cast for names of individuals who lived out of the state** **80,186 votes were cast for names of individuals who lived in Harris County, but had incorrect addresses** The Texas Election Code (TEC) requires counties to update their voter files on a monthly basis. The Harris County Tax Assessor-Collector is the effective voter registrar, in charge of maintaining the voter files. Ann Harris Bennett-D, the current Harris County Tax Assessor-Collector, has not updated the voter files since taking office in 2020. The illegal names are maintained on the voter file, so that they can be fraudulently voted. As you can see, this is what was done. The Democrats have been in control of the Tax Assessor-Collector office since 2013. A list of illegal names on the voter files is easily obtainable by the Harris County Tax Assessor-Collector’s office. These illegal names are distributed to individuals working at the polls who then cast illegal ballots. This vote fraud needs to be investigated by the Harris County District Attorney’s office, the Secretary of State’s office, the Texas Attorney General’s office, and by the Texas Rangers. Vote fraud is a second-degree felony in the state of Texas, a crime punishable by up to 20 years in prison. The data analytics company will gladly file an affidavit confirming this information.
---
Steven F. Hotze, M.D.
November 14, 2024 View non stop ballot printing in the 1000's per day all day for the last two weeks. Blatant, nonsensical, no track and trace and with constant obstruction to the certified election watchers.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/48843?id=795548.378.1.52314d3ac7c75d55c280a1c4961f8bd5)
---
## My message to Harris County District Attorney Kim Ogg:
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/48843?id=795548.379.1.714a9320879032a13e91868c90cc60df)
---
---
---

---
| [Web Version](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/48843?id=795548.380.1.c191021919b4b59cb9efc0c366607962&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxODQ3ODgyMzgtMDE5MzJjYzMtNjBlNi03ZTI1LWIyOTUtYWFkZTFjZjY2ZGM3LTE1NzVhYTJjMmRlODAwZTFhYjE3M2U2ZTY3NDA3NTA5YTY5OTIyYTAiLCJ7e2VtYWlsSWR9fSI6Ijc5NTU0OCJ9 "Web Version") [Forward](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/48843?id=795548.381.1.3eb3030827baa6acace59295c0ae296d&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxODQ3ODgyMzgtMDE5MzJjYzMtNjBlNi03ZTI1LWIyOTUtYWFkZTFjZjY2ZGM3LTE1NzVhYTJjMmRlODAwZTFhYjE3M2U2ZTY3NDA3NTA5YTY5OTIyYTAiLCJ7e2VtYWlsSWR9fSI6Ijc5NTU0OCJ9 "Forward") [Unsubscribe](https://gem.godaddy.com/opt_out?pact=795548-184788238-01932cc3-60e6-7e25-b295-aade1cf66dc7-1575aa2c2de800e1ab173e6e67407509a69922a0 "Unsubscribe")

name: Bob Casey HQ
subject: How our democracy works
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Pennsylvania is on the frontlines of the fight for voting rights.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4846%2E552475%2E_O6kZ8)
Pennsylvania’s Senate race is **not over.** We need your help to re-elect Bob Casey. **[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241114-5?refcode=em20241114-5&refcode2=4846_552475__O6kZ8&akid=4846%2E552475%2E_O6kZ8)**
---
If we’re going to protect our fundamental freedoms, we must re-elect Bob Casey. Bob has always stood up for women’s rights, workers’ rights, and voting rights — and he’s not going to stop now.
Our democracy only works when every voice is heard. As tens of thousands of votes are still being counted across the Commonwealth, we need the resources to fight back against efforts to disenfranchise Pennsylvania voters.
**[So please, donate whatever you can to Bob Casey’s campaign today so we can keep up the fight to protect voting rights and our democracy.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241114-5?refcode=em20241114-5&refcode2=4846_552475__O6kZ8&akid=4846%2E552475%2E_O6kZ8)**

name: Mark Takano
subject: It’s my honor to serve California’s 39th district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
Thank you, Peter.

| Peter, thanks to your support over these past two years, I am thrilled to have been re-elected as the Congressman for California’s 39th congressional district. I could not have done this without your support. From knocking doors, to making phone calls, talking to neighbors, or whether you chipped in $1, $5, or hundreds of dollars – your support made the difference in this race.

Look, Peter – the brutal truth of this election is that we have lots of work to do. Losing all three levers of power in Washington will force us to look inward and re-build our party and our next winning coalition.

In the days and weeks ahead, I hope to hear from you directly on what you think went wrong, what needs to change, and how we can rebuild.

But for now, Peter, from the bottom of my heart, thank you for your support and dedication to our movement. The road ahead will be difficult, but we will traverse it together.

Onward.

Mark Takano
---
| | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517
www.marktakano.com
